name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: What this is all about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Look, this isn't about wanting to silence people's opinions. If someone wants to believe these radical conspiracy theories, we can't stop them.
This is about lies being taught as the truth when we need to live -- and vote -- in a world of facts. How can we expect teenagers to learn their important role as the future of our democracy and trust our elections when their state department of education is forcing them to accept falsehoods as facts?.
Your $25 -- or whatever you can pitch in -- helps us better inform voters nationwide about our country, our laws, our fundamental rights, and so much more >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=5E5HtvpYE1qwbWSLIYGowUejUNpKV2tM2nAtyyalHXhdgpzjiyjAYgUog5qlQao87WMfdt6X+AHX6mOhtSROqAp+IdrULtllUatm9VIGcQM=]
Popular Information: New Oklahoma curriculum includes pro-Trump conspiracy theories [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=5E5HtvpYE1qwbWSLIYGowUejUNpKV2tM2nAtyyalHXhdgpzjiyjAYgUog5qlQao87WMfdt6X+AHX6mOhtSROqAp+IdrULtllUatm9VIGcQM=]
This is hard to believe, Team, but it shows just how deeply misled some opponents of voting rights are.
Recent reporting shows that " beginning in the 2025-26 school year, thousands of high school students in Oklahoma will be required to learn about President Trump's debunked claims that the 2020 election was tainted by fraud. The lesson will not be part of a course on conspiracy theories, but an official component of the new social studies curriculum created by Oklahoma Superintendent of Public Instruction Ryan Walters ."
As fanciful as it sounds, here's a direct quote from the curriculum itself. Students will:
" Identify discrepancies in 2020 elections results by looking at graphs and other information, including the sudden halting of ballot-counting in select cities in key battleground states, the security risks of mail-in balloting, sudden batch dumps, an unforeseen record number of voters, and the unprecedented contradiction of “bellwether county” trends. "
Is it any wonder why faith and trust in our elections are declining? Opponents of voting rights pulling stunts like this shows why our work is so critical. It's on us to ensure accurate, truthful statements are made about our electoral system -- all while we work to register new voters, activate registered voters, and fight suppressive laws to make sure every vote counts.
Please, we can't afford to let attacks on our elections like this slide. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today and help discredit conspiracy theories about our elections and so much more >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=15.00&tknfa=z17o6yXYconVko64vI9wisX1-uLD5zfhr1IxNyq0_N0=&contactdata=5E5HtvpYE1qwbWSLIYGowUejUNpKV2tM2nAtyyalHXhdgpzjiyjAYgUog5qlQao87WMfdt6X+AHX6mOhtSROqAp+IdrULtllUatm9VIGcQM=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&tknfa=z17o6yXYconVko64vI9wisX1-uLD5zfhr1IxNyq0_N0=&contactdata=5E5HtvpYE1qwbWSLIYGowUejUNpKV2tM2nAtyyalHXhdgpzjiyjAYgUog5qlQao87WMfdt6X+AHX6mOhtSROqAp+IdrULtllUatm9VIGcQM=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=50.00&tknfa=z17o6yXYconVko64vI9wisX1-uLD5zfhr1IxNyq0_N0=&contactdata=5E5HtvpYE1qwbWSLIYGowUejUNpKV2tM2nAtyyalHXhdgpzjiyjAYgUog5qlQao87WMfdt6X+AHX6mOhtSROqAp+IdrULtllUatm9VIGcQM=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=100.00&tknfa=z17o6yXYconVko64vI9wisX1-uLD5zfhr1IxNyq0_N0=&contactdata=5E5HtvpYE1qwbWSLIYGowUejUNpKV2tM2nAtyyalHXhdgpzjiyjAYgUog5qlQao87WMfdt6X+AHX6mOhtSROqAp+IdrULtllUatm9VIGcQM=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=250.00&tknfa=z17o6yXYconVko64vI9wisX1-uLD5zfhr1IxNyq0_N0=&contactdata=5E5HtvpYE1qwbWSLIYGowUejUNpKV2tM2nAtyyalHXhdgpzjiyjAYgUog5qlQao87WMfdt6X+AHX6mOhtSROqAp+IdrULtllUatm9VIGcQM=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=5E5HtvpYE1qwbWSLIYGowUejUNpKV2tM2nAtyyalHXhdgpzjiyjAYgUog5qlQao87WMfdt6X+AHX6mOhtSROqAp+IdrULtllUatm9VIGcQM=]
In March, Oklahoma Superintendent of Public Instruction Ryan Walters said the purpose of this new curriculum was to teach " students to think for themselves " and " not be spoon-fed left-wing propaganda ." According to Walters, there are " legitimate concerns " about the integrity of the 2020 election that were " raised by millions of Americans in 2020. "
We know he's wrong. We know there are no "discrepancies" in the 2020 election results that validate the claims of Trump and his allies that the results were fraudulent. We know Mail-in Ballots are safe and secure. We know that ballots were "suddenly dumped" because certain states forbade mailed ballots from being counted before Election Day (precisely to fuel these conspiracies). We know these "legitimate concerns" were debunked as lies.
We know we can make our country the democracy we've all been promised. But we need your help, especially when we are confronted by obvious partisan lies from elected officials like this and the support they receive from dark money groups like The Heritage Foundation and the so-called "Moms for Liberty".
Help restore our democracy with $25 or however much you can to protect the right to vote and so much more from the threats we're facing across the country >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=5E5HtvpYE1qwbWSLIYGowUejUNpKV2tM2nAtyyalHXhdgpzjiyjAYgUog5qlQao87WMfdt6X+AHX6mOhtSROqAp+IdrULtllUatm9VIGcQM= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=5E5HtvpYE1qwbWSLIYGowUejUNpKV2tM2nAtyyalHXhdgpzjiyjAYgUog5qlQao87WMfdt6X+AHX6mOhtSROqAp+IdrULtllUatm9VIGcQM=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=5E5HtvpYE1qwbWSLIYGowUejUNpKV2tM2nAtyyalHXhdgpzjiyjAYgUog5qlQao87WMfdt6X+AHX6mOhtSROqAp+IdrULtllUatm9VIGcQM=]

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Here’s the summary of it | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=19800f11a9a14127b0844e55abbe6cc1&_e=t47jEKC0LF3xUSrPhDGmPqlbM__OcWgRJNyQyYLo-FfS4rRSeqsMsVBDo1GVKL0s-m0YhfeWcbAt-NumIUdVS77MpkZI4XLrVTI5jC8J83Q_XwMKiXepKMm11K_fClCxVoSpp-2pDgDeqzc_SRQNTAaWxgM1ikb7shNYnFo6Hvus5asZw4zVsRs-qUNxGXYthX22238NNHIswpf990S9DIVsXJZV5OK2AVImGFcIRFGWTY7WMW_wIcq8Z9uHHU_rZAQblpL9aa3ZzVdG1tN-2roU-Qp4YdhuvLboydYhAQbmMiVZ4_LTCoGLOwAPQyOhYopBta4aXSp3BgY05V_jF1vRJamQCxuxrQJjVcX18e7AnICQ9KV1a8JgR4BCb2otvXS96VOhljdVMHhQBrBLJstVX0gFy4aHPc95M6agOReo2bkYxerwpW776gpuGwKuawP7T-YdaLho9byg2OCcO0OC43LD_S7AQ-7476ot53uCpBsyv-zPTa1mThPuhl0QE7oHxMkobGq4GOA37YugvfA-8Y-gx2YT7dmoEZXv8a0b80JciFHKVZQGtYc2OkJZ)
---

Peter,

**Did you have a chance to watch my interview with Stephen A. Smith?**

We had a great conversation, and I appreciate him giving Steven Bannon and me the time to talk about this country and the nationalist-populist movement known as MAGA. It’s not just a slogan; it’s essential in every way.

Stephen A. Smith, who’s always been regarded as a leading sports commentator and reporter, has recently interviewed political candidates on both sides of the political aisle. His interview with me was one of the fairest discussions I’ve ever had with the media, and I encourage you to watch it on your own time.

| [ **SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=19800f11a9a14127b0844e55abbe6cc1&_e=t47jEKC0LF3xUSrPhDGmPqlbM__OcWgRJNyQyYLo-FfS4rRSeqsMsVBDo1GVKL0s-m0YhfeWcbAt-NumIUdVS77MpkZI4XLrVTI5jC8J83Q_XwMKiXepKMm11K_fClCxVoSpp-2pDgDeqzc_SRQNTAaWxgM1ikb7shNYnFo6Hvus5asZw4zVsRs-qUNxGXYtGZhHBHic2XaeUND3QjBW1iYV2aD5ti1ZAujKaezI2l1NRhLRlg2HoI4tF3qq7OdsDBbK-S6osI2D0_n5Wp1JsZkNaYY-IAGumZjDXTwsopHvRRS5lHnhAe-BMo3PLtj85EkkwA-8pc8zi_yk874aD87tA0nyWaYGl-Vx0vHONRQ-x6eeAHM1A6Ekg1Ss3LUWSyd09fsm70DAunul48K36_Z-4qrCHGHzI-hR597MmhBAvfp_8-4dBY0nbGp1VtTqGPyaEOWiY9OqWIYwKJhFjNsm2UhB2-QMkESdzSnMr3pZqaCfPQWaBwI3hhSAIVXDvLgbjeW0vOKw77Gx4Gm4DC2nEWl9bRrvY0SlN1DkbNlQxG33m0moD6Iv_yWPcwHJ)
---

I’ve always been an unorthodox candidate who scares the establishment GOP more than Ilhan Omar and AOC. These Uniparty Republicans can raise a lot more money talking about them than they can talking about me. I scare them, and that’s why they attack me.

_**Good.**_

_President Trump came in and changed the old guard of the Republican Party. He punched them in the gut, and now they have to eat the crow and bend the knee. Honestly, I’ve enjoyed watching it._

**I’ll always be the target of both the Radical Left and the Uniparty Republican Establishment.** That’s precisely why I need YOUR help. I’m running for Senate in 2026 to give Americans and Minnesotans the most honest representation they’ve ever seen from a United States Senator.

[**Can you chip in $10 to my MAGA campaign before midnight?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=19800f11a9a14127b0844e55abbe6cc1&_e=t47jEKC0LF3xUSrPhDGmPqlbM__OcWgRJNyQyYLo-FfS4rRSeqsMsVBDo1GVKL0s-m0YhfeWcbAt-NumIUdVS77MpkZI4XLrVTI5jC8J83Q_XwMKiXepKMm11K_fClCxVoSpp-2pDgDeqzc_SRQNTAnktVZEpZAeLKlF3nPctpJtNAtsSG_TB8dKTd6QPdevZM10o65Cpcv5RWJcUs-UFqwAYc5c-4wRPZ7JAsv-kA8kO1MPoyZCXfH0vchUoaD7ONOyAy4gTfMSplnClr0_brnrXHVtRcltMKqGSkuVsu_VnzcP_OAw869n_gvYvMb6RJiAnQvL7lvsDpavOYSeoyPTzHIZrtEM_MkeE6vqRornW9_7TvsExQwavk-8uWRnm9e24mTFYS9bsQz_AifA_B24j_oS8LJ3AI9zJup48DjmdTS-aSAMjOAumddga9fSHEjoEsFjHDw4ExmPwfSNDRMtcyfNC1srWJFc6oJPFKznWQSU6vjg9OsTyPkfDe7E5VIvR8PD3tGLjkm_Kznc3yRefA6p5LIEVijYyzda3XtoyK3hBDLUGYH8wUj-dk6A)

**I rely on your small donations to fuel my campaign.** Unlike the established politicians of America, I don’t have access to the huge Deep State donors who buy elections for their candidates. If we truly want change in America, I need you to support me so I can punch the establishment and the Radical Left in the gut just like President Trump.

[ **DONATE TO MY PEOPLE-FIRST CAMPAIGN** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=19800f11a9a14127b0844e55abbe6cc1&_e=t47jEKC0LF3xUSrPhDGmPqlbM__OcWgRJNyQyYLo-FfS4rRSeqsMsVBDo1GVKL0s-m0YhfeWcbAt-NumIUdVS77MpkZI4XLrVTI5jC8J83Q_XwMKiXepKMm11K_fClCxVoSpp-2pDgDeqzc_SRQNTAaWxgM1ikb7shNYnFo6Hvus5asZw4zVsRs-qUNxGXYte63xsWrw2bc9xMYH3jIcNnTG85S3wyUgobBbBB6SYBaPbvPrd-UGXvbYw5rkwA62UiNaqlr9zXCaiBpkLLwMqU5U13yaTt1E5u7C7QsRxEWj4NrFnjzG_cX_TPc30zFH7MWS9Ch29APBlMMP0qts9kitYu8sgdwan_Rg7e639ArbLyYkZ5HUCafPRIw1ErZr6rrbpcO3fcHEu5tHHThJMGlJPQQLeyAFIQcFY6sa1styXc-BmcTbttSaPLXMsEx4ebRt8BTdZ9cmeanteGh4cJQuR1fn8z6T8xsI1DAmnnhg9JKwVL0nV2LQgmGlI4myz9uTcRVja119fbSPUDizBe-NxlL-wCeVDrqfX9m-bhbp2BQRMOfXLjL1gdVvJ56e)

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=19800f11a9a14127b0844e55abbe6cc1&_e=t47jEKC0LF3xUSrPhDGmPqlbM__OcWgRJNyQyYLo-FfS4rRSeqsMsVBDo1GVKL0s-m0YhfeWcbAt-NumIUdVS77MpkZI4XLrVTI5jC8J83Q_XwMKiXepKMm11K_fClCxVoSpp-2pDgDeqzc_SRQNTAaWxgM1ikb7shNYnFo6Hvus5asZw4zVsRs-qUNxGXYtjZAQnzQBo5L0M1N5EjoxOa_ml7hxP_8zGdsgqs2WzPQLwR0Pd6FTT8kkC2hrp3rF7V37-C60DLm5agSfzwsvpC7Td9OVIFgxuFaEp6W58zGxbrbdF81DuE9KCbFAgi18vBUQJ4fhFyNnIbKVvwIMsNdJD2ZQTyY5ZW7ZKGmG9xUAtEB9oZ_TEpD8lJPTPJ4Zu8hSQ3jFvBBdT7Sv9x9U7uzfvRO88e2M_FQ3zXXz1bR7sR2LJhIEhDvRBLNJ8FVdeu8XUf0Q3TJMS06PmNlYh5nnedpG4F0Q8djDMTl7FyNz5mbCFBuDp8qUkmiwEscAq7-I72SS9tz99-0Ft4ulkzOIPn83zk7owsPXUqiRQUGFnsZQOFR8Zam9h4i1OaLE)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=19800f11a9a14127b0844e55abbe6cc1&_e=t47jEKC0LF3xUSrPhDGmPqlbM__OcWgRJNyQyYLo-FfS4rRSeqsMsVBDo1GVKL0s-m0YhfeWcbAt-NumIUdVS77MpkZI4XLrVTI5jC8J83Q_XwMKiXepKMm11K_fClCxVoSpp-2pDgDeqzc_SRQNTAaWxgM1ikb7shNYnFo6Hvus5asZw4zVsRs-qUNxGXYtzmR-3ndmwKPQNbhgOP9ILKqy6NqnQ_r3ATHrSvpxAHF7zjm6DT1Ys5z8dyLEjWH2GPGESBAUfLKd3s58cTWPMWGsBb88dRidtak9jjfPa7LZzYRJoVU0ucuFtP83siG_NOBJvyOOiDl-IycVGESknnU_-tUt-gLmVKFftrc3TKkVtNNcnQgvorH5-GKZBG_Z_c2x7yjEwMrOPpwYPb9Ka5_a_UEpS_gxDnk2enHzpuWquy9RZ23ZhVaeTSm2ESjn67-3HmchXlLKoUVDsiLHionfieuksUWXJpY3jYsb6MMIrSgdMzq7352WdZlUvR6NNv5E_sDbCIoTNdrE8CcV0pFwZfYUHCyjtwZP3uEaG85tsGty-kHgDTsL5aIpDNgR)

name: Lynn Whitney, Campaign Manager
subject: Endorsed by AFSCME
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the JB Smiley Jr
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92850/images/AFSCME.gif]
Dear Friends,
Have you heard the great news? The American Federation of State, County, and Municipal Employees (AFSCME) Local 1733, one of the largest and most respected labor unions in the region, formally announced its endorsement of JB Smiley Jr. in his campaign for Shelby County Mayor on Tuesday, April 29th, 2025.
“Smiley doesn’t just talk the talk, he shows up when the cameras aren’t around,” said AFSCME Local 1733 President Adrian Rogers. “He listens, he advocates, and he has a proven track record of standing with working families in Shelby County.” [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2KpQ6IgorEWrIEj5AQW0eg2?am=50&contactdata=&sourceid=&nvep=&hmac=&emci=260329ca-742b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
With the endorsement of AFSCME Local 1733, Smiley continues to build momentum among grassroots supporters and key local institutions. This marks the second major endorsement Smiley has received since announcing his candidacy for Shelby County Mayor.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Alcatraz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8552%2E5257348%2ENB8oTb ]Adam Schiff for Senate

I can’t believe Trump is talking about reopening Alcatraz in
2025, Derek.

The last time that prison was open, Robert Kennedy was in the cabinet. And
I’m not talking about RFK Jr. (I mean the good RFK, the original). And no,
I do not think we should be reopening Alcatraz as a federal prison — a new
idea posited by Donald Trump this week. Probably after watching Netflix.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8552%2E5257348%2ENB8oTb ]Trump on Fox News. Chyron reads: Trump: Alcatraz represents something
strong

“Look at it, it’s sort of amazing. It sort of represents something that’s
both horrible and beautiful and strong and miserable and weak, it’s got a
lot of qualities that are interesting...”

This isn’t a serious proposal.

Millions of tourists visit Alcatraz every year, bringing in $60 million
for the National Park Service. And hundreds of millions more in tourism.

But instead of keeping this popular tourist attraction open, Trump wants
to reopen it as a federal prison, even though it was incredibly expensive
to operate in the 1960s when it closed and would be incredibly expensive
to reopen today. Even then, it was three times as expensive as any other
prison. Because it lacks fresh water and is, well, AN ISLAND.

This fundamentally unserious idea is part of his tough guy
persona, Derek,
and his effort to distract from his abysmal handling of the economy.

And it does absolutely nothing to help address the country’s most pressing
concerns. Nothing to help families struggling to make ends meet. Nothing
to make violent crime go down. Nothing to help bank accounts or 401ks.

While Trump is focused on Alcatraz, [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8552%2E5257348%2ENB8oTb ]I’m focused on supporting families.
Chip in to help power this work.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1040?c0=q22025_abs_em.efKol3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8552%2E5257348%2ENB8oTb ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q22025_abs_em.t0y3Np&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8552%2E5257348%2ENB8oTb ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q22025_abs_em.AXrWKq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8552%2E5257348%2ENB8oTb ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q22025_abs_em.9qgQdN&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8552%2E5257348%2ENB8oTb ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q22025_abs_em.D7tjFE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8552%2E5257348%2ENB8oTb ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8552%2E5257348%2ENB8oTb ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks,

Adam

P.S. If you’re interested in Alcatraz, I recommend The Rock, Escape from
Alcatraz, or Birdman of Alcatraz. They are fiction, but are far more real
than anything Trump is proposing.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8552%2E5257348%2ENB8oTb ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=q22025_abs_em.kWZd31&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8552%2E5257348%2ENB8oTb ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

name: James Carville
subject: A bellwether for the entire country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88376?refcode=em20250507-8923&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8923%2E614464%2EEs9pyI)
Peter,
I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: **this one is as important as it gets.**
The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead.
**[So, before I continue, can I count on you to split a contribution between Abigail Spanberger’s campaign for Governor of Virginia and State Democrats Committee?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88376?refcode=em20250507-8923&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8923%2E614464%2EEs9pyI)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88376?refcode=em20250507-8923&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8923%2E614464%2EEs9pyI)**
Here’s what’s got me terrified:
The _Cook Political Report_ has called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025.
If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen.
Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment.
That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference in keeping Virginia blue and in keeping the Democrats on track for victory in 2026.
**[Will you contribute right now to State Democrats Committee and Abigail Spanberger to help Abigail Spanberger win this race and deliver a major victory for Democrats?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88376?refcode=em20250507-8923&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8923%2E614464%2EEs9pyI)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88377?refcode=em20250507-8923&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=8923%2E614464%2EEs9pyI) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88377?refcode=em20250507-8923&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=8923%2E614464%2EEs9pyI) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88377?refcode=em20250507-8923&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=8923%2E614464%2EEs9pyI) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88377?refcode=em20250507-8923&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=8923%2E614464%2EEs9pyI) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88377?refcode=em20250507-8923&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=8923%2E614464%2EEs9pyI) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88377?refcode=em20250507-8923&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=8923%2E614464%2EEs9pyI) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88376?refcode=em20250507-8923&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8923%2E614464%2EEs9pyI)
---
Thank you,
James Carville

name: Sen. Steve Daines
subject: ⚠️ Impeachment Articles filed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
We’re barely 100 days into President Trump’s term in office, and Democrats have ALREADY filed Articles of Impeachment |
---

Fellow American,

**“Republican Jefferson Griffin concedes N.C. Supreme Court race after months of legal battles” —NBC News** Republican Jefferson Griffin just conceded the North Carolina Supreme Court race to Democratic incumbent Justice Allison Riggs, bringing closure to one of the nation's most contentious and drawn-out judicial elections. Peter, the 2024 election cycle is finally over — more than six months after Election Day. As Attorney General Eric Holder said today: "Justice Allison Riggs's dedicated efforts to vindicate the rights of North Carolinians are a lesson to all Americans in the fight to protect democracy on so many fronts: never tire, never back down. _Never_.

“Pressure from the people works to hold leaders accountable. Fighting in court works to enforce the laws enshrined to protect our rights. These are the lessons from this protracted struggle in North Carolina.

“Make no mistake, the delay in the certification of this free and fair election was completely unnecessary. **Wherever our democracy is threatened, we must — no matter how long it takes — stand up for what is right.”** **This isn’t just a victory for Justice Riggs — it’s a victory for our democracy.** The NDRC was proud to endorse Justice Riggs as a Democracy Defender. We were honored to stand by her as she fought to uphold the will of the people. And with your help, we'll continue to support candidates who will serve as key firewalls against Republican anti-democracy agendas across the country. clean_body: When our democracy is threatened, we must stand up for what is right, no matter how long it takes. | “Republican Jefferson Griffin concedes N.C. Supreme Court race after months of legal battles” —NBC News Republican Jefferson Griffin just conceded the North Carolina Supreme Court race to Democratic incumbent Justice Allison Riggs, bringing closure to one of the nation's most contentious and drawn-out judicial elections. Peter, the 2024 election cycle is finally over — more than six months after Election Day. As Attorney General Eric Holder said today: "Justice Allison Riggs's dedicated efforts to vindicate the rights of North Carolinians are a lesson to all Americans in the fight to protect democracy on so many fronts: never tire, never back down. Never. “Pressure from the people works to hold leaders accountable. Fighting in court works to enforce the laws enshrined to protect our rights. These are the lessons from this protracted struggle in North Carolina. “Make no mistake, the delay in the certification of this free and fair election was completely unnecessary. Wherever our democracy is threatened, we must — no matter how long it takes — stand up for what is right.” This isn’t just a victory for Justice Riggs — it’s a victory for our democracy. The NDRC was proud to endorse Justice Riggs as a Democracy Defender. We were honored to stand by her as she fought to uphold the will of the people. And with your help, we'll continue to support candidates who will serve as key firewalls against Republican anti-democracy agendas across the country. = — Team NDRC | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Josh Harder
subject: What is Trump talking about?!
body:
This is insane.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107283581/544223096/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTk5MzM5ZmMtYTgyYi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mPWlymytOyncoicx0oUuCcKvcjQBXYjfU792Yf2QPx4=) | Peter, At the start of every term in Congress, I take the exact same Oath of Office as the President of the United States. With my hand on the Bible, I solemnly swear to preserve, protect, and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic. It’s a responsibility I take incredibly seriously. **So when I heard Donald Trump say he “doesn’t know” whether he needs to uphold the Constitution, I was flabbergasted. In what world is that an acceptable answer??** Upholding the Constitution is literally the President’s job. But clearly Trump believes differently. And we don’t have to take him at his word, we can take him at his actions. He continues to undermine the rule of law, our system of checks and balances and the foundation of our democratic values. It should frighten every one of us. **We have to stop this assault on our democracy, and we need Democrats to win back the House. As one of the 13 Democrats representing a Trump district, I am on the frontlines of this fight - we have to win here to have any shot at taking back power.** [_**Please consider making a donation today to help defend our democracy and ensure we have the resources to keep this seat blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107283582/544223097/-1759382976?&refcode=E13209-20250507-TrumpConstitution-SL-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTk5MzM5ZmMtYTgyYi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mPWlymytOyncoicx0oUuCcKvcjQBXYjfU792Yf2QPx4=) \- Josh

Peter,
The Republican-controlled House Oversight Committee is calling on Governor Walz and other prominent Democratic governors to testify in an upcoming hearing about so-called “sanctuary states.” **Since Minnesota isn’t a sanctuary state, one can’t help but wonder if this is politically motivated. **
While Governor Walz is working every day to improve the lives of Minnesotans, Republicans in Congress are staging political stunts to divide and distract the American people. They want to draw our attention away from their deeply unpopular agenda—threatening Social Security, slashing Medicare, gutting the Department of Education, and more—by stoking fear and spreading misinformation about immigrants.
Governor Walz is heading to Washington anyway. He’ll tell the truth, stand up for our values, and reject the fear and misinformation the GOP is spewing. Because here in Minnesota, we lead with courage, compassion, and common sense.
**We need your support to keep standing strong against these attacks. **

Lindsey Graham’s suggestion may come across as a joke (understandably!) but many MAGA Republicans have already expressed interest in it. We assume most Democrats would oppose this, but just need to know for sure... name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: 📱 MAKE CALLS to stop dangerous GOP bills in their tracks / HAGA LLAMADAS para detener los peligrosos proyectos de ley del Partido Republicano 📱
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
CRUNCH TIME:
Urge your state rep. to vote down bad right-wing legislation
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Bad%20Bill%20Alert.png]
The Texas House is preparing to vote as early as this Friday on dangerous Republican-authored constitutional amendments that would roll back our rights, waste taxpayer money, and increase the number of people jailed pretrial — many without due process. We have to speak out NOW.
SJR1: This problematic proposed constitutional amendment would unjustly deny bail for people charged with a felony offense simply because they are of undocumented immigrant status. It’s unconstitutional, unworkable, and would significantly increase jail costs for counties already stretched thin.
SJR5 and SB9: These bad proposals would allow judges to deny bail to more people — without requiring evidence of danger, without guaranteed legal representation, and without considering less restrictive alternatives. They would lead to more people being jailed pretrial simply because they can’t afford bail or are accused, not convicted.
Call your state rep. NOW to urge them to:
- Vote NO on SJR 1.
- Oppose SJR 5 and SB9 unless major reforms are made.
FIND AND CONTACT YOUR STATE REP. HERE. [https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home]
TOP IN THE STREETS:
Making May Day memorable
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/May%20Day%202025%20Action%20collage.jpg]
This International Workers’ Day — from Houston, to Dallas, to San Antonio, to Fort Worth — TOP staff and members joined forces with our labor allies to make clear that it’s WORKERS (not arrogant billionaires) who keep this world turning each and every day.
No matter our age, race, place, gender, who you love, or who you pray to, we as Texans know our worth — and we are worth so much more than what this backwards administration would have us believe.
From sinking our economy with reckless tariffs to purging our federal workforce, Trump and his MAGA cronies are as anti-worker as they come.
It's up to US to continue to show up and send a message that there is power in numbers, and that through unwavering solidarity, our people-power is unstoppable. Let's keep up the momentum!
Condemning Abbott's school voucher scam
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Don%27t%20mess%20with%20Texas%20public%20schools.jpg]
Greg Abbott’s school voucher scam isn’t about improving student outcomes; it's about lining the pockets of his campaign donors and dismantling public education in our state. Abbott’s billionaire buddy Jeff Yass bankrolled this legislative scheme [https://www.texastribune.org/2024/07/17/greg-abbott-jeff-yass-campaign-donation/] at the expense of Texas kids, parents, and teachers. SB2’s passage once more proves our governor will always carry water for his wealthy backers before ever passing meaningful policy to benefit working Texans families.
Abbott couldn’t care less about the unpopularity of his school voucher scam. His crusade for years, our governor spent millions bullying Texas GOP legislators into submission to pass it. Under the guise of ‘school choice’ – which Texas already has – Abbott pushed vouchers like a snake oil salesman, casting them as a magic elixir to help students and families.
In reality, he sold the public a slick, right-wing think-tank repackaging of what school vouchers were proposed decades ago for – to perpetuate racial and economic segregation in our schools. [https://www.tpr.org/education/2023-05-11/texas-almost-approved-a-school-voucher-program-in-the-1950s-to-avoid-desegregation]
Working with pro-public education allies, TOP stands ready to make sure Abbott and lawmakers who supported his scam hear from us at the ballot box and feel the political consequences of their cowardice.
TOP Tip: Fight MAGA fascism -- Protect local public media
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Protect%20Public%20Media.png]
For decades, PBS and NPR have provided millions across the country — young and old — with wholesome, enriching programming that continues to educate, entertain, and inspire. With Trump and MAGA hellbent on slashing federal funds for these public media outlets, it's on US to come together and demand Congress reject these cuts. Find out how you can protect PBS and NPR here. [https://protectmypublicmedia.org/]
Español
URGENTE:
Pidele urgentemente a tu representante estatal que vote en contra de una mala ley de la derecha
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/ALERTA%20DE%20MALA%20LEGISLACIO%CC%81N.png]
La Cámara de Representantes de Texas se está preparando para votar tan pronto como este viernes sobre unas enmiendas constitucionales peligrosas escritas por legisladores republicanos que recortarían nuestros derechos, malgastarían el dinero de los contribuyentes y aumentarían el número de personas encarceladas antes de juicio — muchas de ellas sin el debido proceso. Tenemos que alzar la voz YA.
SJR1: Esta propuesta de enmienda constitucional negaría injustamente la libertad bajo fianza a personas acusadas de delitos graves simplemente por ser inmigrantes indocumentados. Es inconstitucional, ineficaz y aumentaría considerablemente los costos de las cárceles en condados que ya están saturados.
SJR5 y SB9: Estas propuestas permitirían que los jueces nieguen la libertad bajo fianza a más personas — sin requerir pruebas de que representan un peligro, sin garantizar representación legal y sin considerar alternativas menos restrictivas. Esto llevaría a que más personas estén encarceladas antes del juicio solo porque no pueden pagar la fianza o porque están acusadas, no condenadas.
Llame a su representante estatal AHORA para instarlos a:
- Votar NO a la SJR1
- Oponerse a la SJR 5 y la SB9 a menos que se implementen reformas importantes
BUSQUE Y CONTACTE A SU REPRESENTANTE ESTATAL AQUÍ. [https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home]
TOP EN LAS CALLES:
Haciendo que el Primero de Mayo sea memorable
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/May%20Day%202025%20Action%20collage.jpg]
Este Día Internacional de las y los Trabajadores — desde Houston, hasta Dallas, San Antonio y Fort Worth — el personal y la membresía de TOP unimos fuerzas con nuestros aliados del movimiento laboral para dejar bien claro que son las y los TRABAJADORES (no los multimillonarios arrogantes) quienes hacen que este mundo siga girando todos los días.
Sin importar nuestra edad, raza, lugar de origen, género, a quién amamos o en quién creemos, como texanos y texanas sabemos lo que valemos — y valemos mucho más de lo que esta administración retrógrada nos quiere hacer creer.
Desde hundir la economía con aranceles irresponsables hasta despedir a miles de empleados federales, Trump y su grupo MAGA son lo más antiobrero que hay.
Nos toca a NOSOTROS seguir presentes y mandar el mensaje de que el poder está en el número, y que con solidaridad firme, ¡el poder del pueblo no se detiene! Sigamos con el impulso.
Condenando la estafa de los vales escolares de Abbott
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Don%27t%20mess%20with%20Texas%20public%20schools.jpg]
La estafa de los vales escolares de Greg Abbott no tiene nada que ver con mejorar el aprendizaje de los estudiantes; se trata de llenar los bolsillos de sus donantes de campaña y desmantelar la educación pública en nuestro estado. Su multimillonario amigo Jeff Yass financió este plan legislativo [https://www.texastribune.org/2024/07/17/greg-abbott-jeff-yass-campaign-donation/] a costa de las niñas y niños, madres, padres y maestras/os de Texas. La aprobación del SB2 es una prueba más de que nuestro gobernador siempre se pondrá del lado de sus patrocinadores ricos antes de aprobar políticas significativas que beneficien a las familias trabajadoras de Texas.
A Abbott no le importa en lo más mínimo que su estafa de vales escolares sea impopular. Durante años ha gastado millones presionando y amenazando a legisladores republicanos de Texas para que se rindan y lo aprueben. Bajo la falsa bandera de la “libertad de elección escolar” – algo que en Texas ya existe – Abbott promovió los vales como si fueran una solución milagrosa, vendiéndolos como un remedio mágico para estudiantes y familias, como un charlatán.
La realidad es que le vendió al público una versión renovada, con envoltura de “tanque de pensamiento” conservador, de lo que los vales escolares siempre fueron desde que se propusieron hace décadas: una manera de perpetuar la segregación racial y económica en nuestras escuelas. [https://www.tpr.org/education/2023-05-11/texas-almost-approved-a-school-voucher-program-in-the-1950s-to-avoid-desegregation]
En alianza con quienes defienden la educación pública, en TOP estamos listos para asegurarnos de que Abbott y las y los legisladores que apoyaron su estafa nos escuchen en las urnas — y que sientan las consecuencias políticas de su cobardía.
Consejos de TOP: Lucha contra el fascismo MAGA -- Protege los medios públicos locales
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Protect%20Public%20Media.png]
Durante décadas, PBS y NPR han brindado a millones de personas en todo el país —jóvenes y mayores— programación educativa, enriquecedora y de calidad que sigue enseñando, entreteniendo e inspirando. Ahora que Trump y el movimiento MAGA están empeñados en recortar los fondos federales para estos medios públicos, NOS TOCA a nosotros unirnos y exigirle al Congreso que rechace estos recortes. Descubre aquí cómo puedes ayudar a proteger a PBS y NPR. [https://protectmypublicmedia.org/]
Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved.

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=v%2Bs8zb0KSrCEo4CpjKsXjp5ZGGQuUjOhra4Ge5GLpbBBs7ipxHT%2FDToYHX3OvIXYq7ChH7erPyNpe7LpvdTjH3j6ARFUVOY9ispvxwwI5DKVGiqyoj5c6hvmkNz%2FjzpQVL9IjZsRizmDUwhlY%2Bas9MqtgEvy074kNKoKTaRrptfphuIiEiACxgHZpsU2qGh02VZjEpAUbO6eQi7Y%2FQRRHjLxYtOWWI7U2jUVLziJqBjoueMqI0rLHqpRu3cZ049C6E3Am4q9RUcH4K6O9g0N%2Baw1gRUG8XwfwrnFTDeBl0nkJkY9g29b2LJOlyWZaPSM5bFR8ybecTrP0RVCSc5QGAAlmjs63re0STjAxZJMXBCjpx6r%2FR%2FCoioic74y7s1Ky%2B8S1nZesV2KwSaDUWD6xK9HWzF6lCJ6otFFF0AVw6E%3D .

Consejos de TOP: Lucha contra el fascismo MAGA -- Protege los medios públicos locales [] Durante décadas, PBS y NPR han brindado a millones de personas en todo el país —jóvenes y mayores— programación educativa, enriquecedora y de calidad que sigue enseñando, entreteniendo e inspirando. Ahora que Trump y el movimiento MAGA están empeñados en recortar los fondos federales para estos medios públicos, NOS TOCA a nosotros unirnos y exigirle al Congreso que rechace estos recortes. Descubre aquí cómo puedes ayudar a proteger a PBS y NPR. [] Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved. Texas Organizing Project 700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212 San Antonio, TX 78207 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Elizabeth Economou, Communications Director
subject: OSPI Under Investigation by DOJ and Dept. of ED
body:
The Trump Effect: WA's First 100 Days | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/please-support-wagops-election-integrity-efforts-2698922?e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| |
#
** “There Will Be a Reckoning...”**
**Bellevue** —"The one-party dominance of WA state politics for so long has led to decadence—a kind of institutional weakness that I believe is in its last stages" says WAGOP Chairman and State Rep. Jim Walsh.

Currently, institutional weakness is eroding the integrity of the WA Office of Superintendent of Public Instruction (OSPI), led by radical [Chris Reykdal](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9210d11b8e&e=6a281f566d). OSPI is being investigated by the US Justice Department and the US Department of Education for allegedly violating federal law.

“There will be accounting. There will be a reckoning. It will happen, in part, because the federal government is making it happen," adds Chairman Walsh.

If you haven’t already, [please watch Chairman Walsh’s recent update](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9aa0227d9b&e=6a281f566d) brimming with important information on what to expect in the weeks and months ahead.

Thank you for your time and support.

Best,

Elizabeth Economou
WAGOP Comms. Dir.
---

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Stand with Charlie Kirk, Vivek, and Kirk Cameron
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Let’s Make California Golden Again!

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zokpi8i92neeaaff2l4oclkpjkg3229kuad22lcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie1ob6chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make **_[_California Golden Again_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkj2q1sk4mgfr9a71scgqq9f1qqafmune3kq0ero_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie1ob6chh2bs)_.** Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpt4t7mei09f9879jhsu07ub7t30mds9pb5tap88_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie1ob6chh2bs)
---
There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with:
---
# GREAT JOBS
---
# **GREAT HOMES**
---
# **GREAT KIDS**
---
We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, **one million new Republican voters** have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that **48%** of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me.
---
[ **PLEASE ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z87ukb62kp5ikcfgaj883nm54umv4t6dml8a1vb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie1ob6chh2bs)
---
To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise _I will never bend the knee to the left_. I truly appreciate your help.
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkbajgbd88h2tf5vh56i4lokkiort4j0g4pq1n4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie1ob6chh2bs)
---
With your support, we’ll make **California Golden Again.**
---
Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zans7g9l9v8v4v1oq8fpis9ndct5b7934fvgld1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie1ob6chh2bs)
---
# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---
[ **SUPPORT STEVE** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4m8u7r45tjaabbdvmlp712aicuc4ng6bg41ga10_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie1ob6chh2bs)
---
|
---

FPPC ID#1480425
---

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zta0oiiop8c9hr930uk27jcpu3e0a8sqir392jbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie9pj1clh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoggrj0qdupc28p2dm35f4ir66t25cv0dq7qblsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie9pj1clh2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziientn4b95bheh8ournhpoi3528cspflep0sigg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie9pj1clh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmp03m9d7tmbpkv48mfifvi5hlgq91lff2c5urgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie9pj1clh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---

---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make **_[_California Golden Again_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf2l2ifk37qqnjbdmmtut0hpto4micmtlusi74ao_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie9pj1clh2bs)_.** Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z405a07je2d1m9na3oi4c8ssb0g8jn1cn72acfa0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie9pj1clh2bs)
---
There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with:
---
# GREAT JOBS
---
# **GREAT HOMES**
---
# **GREAT KIDS**
---
We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, **one million new Republican voters** have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that **48%** of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me.
---
[ **PLEASE ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ziagequ449clf9lo3ejlqd3437plsco3qc4rbcio_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie9pj1clh2bs)
---
To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise _I will never bend the knee to the left_. I truly appreciate your help.
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zp0gbeoq5mvd40sft9qim1l2la8sha41qbqebli0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie9pj1clh2bs)
---
With your support, we’ll make **California Golden Again.**
---
Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0as9uub8grbffsr92ilkkh3c3962874strlt0s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie9pj1clh2bs)
---
# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---
[ **SUPPORT STEVE** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr1ak34b5hinr8n4fqq4aqfa86p7dau0o2sbdfb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdie9pj1clh2bs)
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
FPPC ID#1480425
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: URGENT: The America First budget bill can’t wait
body:
Use our guide to pressure Congress and get this done now. The grassroots must light a fire now.
| | | |

| Patriot-

---
| **** The America First budget reconciliation bill must pass--and it has to happen now. **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ TAKE ACTION ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aad4f19d/1edb9794aad49cc2)
---
| **** This isn't just another bill. It's the budget that decides whether President Trump's pro-growth, pro-family agenda moves forward--or gets stalled, gutted, and buried. The Left is targeting members of Congress who should support the reconciliation bill, but who they believe are vulnerable to their pressure. They are intimidating these members so they will abandon the spending cuts we need. As a result, there have been massive delays, infighting, and exactly the kind of dysfunction the Left wants. Time is running out. After months of work, there's still no agreement, which, again, is exactly what the Left is working for. Their goal is clear: stall progress so Americans won't feel the benefits before the 2026 midterms--and claim Trump accomplished nothing. The Left would rather Americans continue to suffer if it helps them win elections. We cannot let them or chaos control the outcome of this process. We also must not let weak members of Congress hand it to them. This bill won't move unless members of Congress who should be supporting it feel immense pressure from the conservative grassroots. That's where you come in. **ACTION:**** ** We've created a **[step-by-step guide](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aad4f19d/1edb9794aad49cc4 "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/download-budgetbattle-guide/")** with everything you need to take action--scripts, templates, samples, and more information and resources. **The time is now, while Congress is marking up the reconciliation bill. If we want them to actually make spending cuts and not raise taxes, we must take action now and throughout the mark-up period.** **We must get this bill passed. If we don 't, the agenda stalls--and the American people pay the price. **It has to happen _now.___**** **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************

name: Team Abdul
subject: Are you ready to send a real fighter to the Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
In the richest, most powerful country in the history of the world, it shouldn’t be this hard to see a doctor, afford your groceries, or pay your bills.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea4ef5b5-d968-4d6d-8f30-0765b7e06350/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, For too long, billionaires and their lackeys have controlled what happens in Washington. They’ve used their wealth to block progress by funding the campaigns of politicians like Mike Rogers, who’s taken more insurance company money than anyone in Michigan. He’s the reason you’re paying high healthcare bills. He’s the reason why over a million Michiganders have medical debt in collections. In the richest, most powerful country in the history of the world, it shouldn’t be this hard to see a doctor, afford your groceries, or pay your bills. That’s why Abdul is running for Senate — to take on the system that’s been rigged against the very people who make it work. Abdul is a dad, doctor, and a life-long Michigander who’s dedicated his career to making government work for people. We’re proud to be a part of his campaign, and we hope you are too, Peter. [If you’re ready to take on the billionaire agenda and send a real fighter to the Senate, split a donation of $10 between Abdul and Blue Amp Action to become a founding donor of our people-powered campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3cfc500e-5fcb-43f4-9bca-28167f9db7d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b19d99a-7ee8-4a0c-b383-a0b7a753809a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

That’s why Abdul is running for Senate — to take on the system that’s been rigged against the very people who make it work. Abdul is a dad, doctor, and a life-long Michigander who’s dedicated his career to making government work for people. We’re proud to be a part of his campaign, and we hope you are too, Peter. | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Abdul | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: The Flyover
subject: U.S., China to Meet, New Surgeon General, and a Mission to Mars
body:
U.S. and Chinese officials will [begin talks in Switzerland from May 9-12 to address the escalating trade war](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOrCAYhZ8GujE_CIgFxW3s5rZbEsBfxUWZIKOZt9-4r7DdyTnJl5Pv62mfLqa4z__dhqZO2e54HQlrxWLfR1ji7mreEOvdv8uMeZ_RcuDyAfIB2o4upo8VdDQTIseWomGdUKrvQQBdDA-95Mz7IPWklW5b2SvQzINQnjEpaDQ3DSRoBgzavmHglRRd12mBQY-MCMAx1lyaNce9LjilTz6xNCFvNJml1tdB2n-ED4QP13U13od7I3y4TxM-uFJjSHjHoMtccP0-tzXTYsbXFVOKh-qIgHlzMf1S659UnIb_BAAA___QJHHj), with the U.S. imposing up to 145% tariffs on Chinese goods and China retaliating with 125% levies on some U.S. products.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM_KqzAQxZ8m7pTJf11kcUHcfV0V7lJSM9FcopGYtvTtL-krfJsZZs7h8OP8_Zl_bIjhWG92R1N8mg98XxFLwTw_r2ULhy1pRyz1_8wrpmPFmQGTLcgW-tnZED-zaJzxiAx5g4ZqodQwgIBmM7J3fhmUdwKF5Mi1dGqw1jtLJePeNcHUNJDQU6DAh47CQ0mhte4FLr2jRAC6UFLu_qVwlA19_KQX5m5JexPNVsp5Ef6HsImwyT-6w5bwwtOWrToIm7Krozu3k_DpCo7wkYKShKnz-SB8ZAKk5oSphdbrS0Npe59uPuSrtEwDVJURPtbNCR_v063Jxp3vEGO4lCYC1t2G-IUqv2ryZdj_AAAA__-9a4Dj) | |
# Thursday, May 8, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1945, the U.S., U.K., and other Allied nations celebrated [Victory in Europe Day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAQhuHTmA40NuavcJGGbtOmRF48wETGXtmzIG4fEeUGad9HmpG-r8f0sOQprJ92R8NLnAKe2SMzpumd542C5bgj8t3facUYVpwUqKaEpoR-cpb8NenCmQVRYV2gkZ1u22EADcVmEKx9Lu0TUcmh7l0nazfrxQ5Wy1ZDU5C5r0EDvQQJ9VBJeLaN7rqu1zj3TgoN6Ihjqr4jBd5w8Vc8MFVz3AtvNuZXFvWHUKNQ43me1UaZY7puF2rkjXLp7FVSKP9EqHG3V9kLNR403-VGfKf4wiIZ9zrJe8ptJzSsuyX_-4r_tc9h1E8AAAD___HlewY), marking the defeat of the Nazis in World War II. Remember full-service gas stations, and when a single income could cover a mortgage? Today, we're revisiting the everyday comforts [Americans once enjoyed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAQxfHT4M5obIavwkWa7TZtSmRgACfGszKzi_b2EblC2vekX_H_ug93H2JI66ffycnCQ6LziCRCeXge0xaSF96J5NqfeSVOKw0WbK2h1tANsw_xPaCa3UJkqVLkTItN0_eAoDaHk23qBdHD5NGPhH1FRD1WpgFPo1XBXRrU0BkwUPWlgbGpsW3bDmnqZlMg0ByEc_nNIclGS3zzi3I58a6i20QeR1F9FPZW2Nt5nqXneH2FvZleyxbSeuiRead8aGH-0Wv2SWjWpgUA6ExXbrJHld38OEOM4WjaAmHdffiDlPyrzMvZ3wAAAP__S593LA) that now feel like luxuries. ## U.S. and China Begin Trade Talks
U.S. and Chinese officials will [begin talks in Switzerland from May 9-12](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOrCAYhZ8GujE_CIgFxW3s5rZbEsBfxUWZIKOZt9-4r7DdyTnJl5Pv62mfLqa4z__dhqZO2e54HQlrxWLfR1ji7mreEOvdv8uMeZ_RcuDyAfIB2o4upo8VdDQTIseWomGdUKrvQQBdDA-95Mz7IPWklW5b2SvQzINQnjEpaDQ3DSRoBgzavmHglRRd12mBQY-MCMAx1lyaNce9LjilTz6xNCFvNJml1tdB2n-ED4QP13U13od7I3y4TxM-uFJjSHjHoMtccP0-tzXTYsbXFVOKh-qIgHlzMf1S659UnIb_BAAA___QJHHj) to address the escalating trade war between the two nations. The U.S. has imposed up to 145% tariffs on Chinese goods, and China retaliated with 125% levies on some U.S. products. U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Trade Representative Jamieson Greer will meet with Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng in the first high-level meeting since Trump’s January inauguration. China announced [major economic stimulus measures Wednesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3unDAUxE8DnVfPxl8ULtJs90-bEhn7GRwZjMxjV3v7iL1CypmRRr-ZPz_Tj88l78tvv6GjVKcd32dBImzTdYY1757qhki3f7UF677gJEAoBoqBnaLP5TPJPrqEKHDo0XEjtR5HkNCvTmtpg7fRahvCLBIkbbgapLV6BMPnPru7DRRYDhyG8cFh1koaY6zEYCPvJGDMVNvjb807rZjKp76wPULd-uJWouPshl-deHbi6Y8b9I5u0SiHgp14foewvBM2PIk1T8jCRYzatR2MfMspnQxD3ev2YT6pIfg0RoWSz5JLMUSwKnmvg1Fc9s3F451Lyac2nYRl87l8cei_Pnw58S8AAP__f_OFMA), including interest rate cuts and looser lending rules.
## Trump Swaps Surgeon General Pick
President Trump on Wednesday pulled his nomination of Dr. Janette Nesheiwat to be U.S. surgeon general and [tapped Dr. Casey Means](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwyAQhU-DO6IB_-AUFNu4y7ZbWgTGNgkeLMCJfPuVo73BNlPMkz697_3cxpvxwdP8bVbUZYoj4TsHLAXTuGe7eDIlrojl_O9pxkgzjhJky6Hl0I_O-HCMTeX0hCixrlAL1XTd9QoNVIt2tTUgRK2Em-6qt3Zy0gqHtq2lc_e68vqkQQu9AAH19SLg3rWNUqpv0PZOsAbQ-RLT5RE9lQWncMQXpouNaxX0UsqWWf3F5MDkQMcWczkjJocTzOQAn6OYHPbMTw8mh5L2deOHoWfmLvGHodOZE-YF_duUzCmup7yPxKeY-J88n5EwmcANOW6I4k4WP1S-eftkcqiSdtvbh-Bzp1gD82p8-HQt_xr4peVvAAAA__9-D5G2) instead, citing her “impeccable credentials.” Means, a physician and author, is set to [work alongside Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb3OnDAQRZ_GdLOyjRfYwsVGCd2XJkVKZOwxeNc_yDaLePuIKG-Qdkaauefc31_Tl3LexeWnCiirTVPEo3isFfO0F726qGoKiPWa73nBFBecOOV3oHegw2SU8-ckGiMtIse2Qcl60XWPBxW0WaVVTLcdn_thNj3Olut5oFwzJlg_C4ONk9c1eqcDo4y2jxujc3cXfd8PAvVgGBEUjasp317Jxbqi9Wf6YL7pFBov11q3Qton4SPh43Ect1DitSN8xAh7IXy8whM-prpiJnyseQ8bbLv3BTan32BThn90sGDErDyYDC8VLxMQsazoDlXBRbDqkzIkC9m-4ZVBeX-CVgVPCKji9UdleD7ZjyDMStoxaWdI-_3bZRmP8gvz1mRptsN570rXE0GXoJz_y1P_q4SP5H8CAAD__4VGntQ) on a national health agenda focused on reversing chronic diseases. ## Netflix Shakes Up Its Look
Netflix is rolling out its [most significant TV interface update](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGunCAYRp8GdxhAEFmwaNrY1XTbpVH50b9BmAA6M2_feF_hbr-TfDk5fx_TY8aAcfszH2CrT1OEVwlQK-TpLOuOca7pAKj3fuYNUtxgEkwoyhRlw-RmDJ9JNs56AAFdA5Zr2ffGMMma3freDMb13PjF8W6Qol-cMkaCY7PWXjRo7zem2MAZZ51pOVt6JbXWg4R1cJxIBg5ryu2_hLHu4MMnXZDbNR1NsHutz0K6H0SMRIzzst6m7ZZuTMT4-3GTn2eoZwYixgjVB3zTM16AodAIL1ovCu8nZIS4AvUZyk4dFNwiEWOpKX9IN6Ij3S8uuFJKS9lk654vDAFLr4lk2zFj-DKq38p4WfE_AAD__z4Khmk) in over a decade, with a redesigned homepage built to make browsing faster, smarter, and more intuitive. For the first time since 2013, the main navigation menu will [shift from the left side of the screen to the center](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAUhJ_GdI78BzaFi9vQ5bZbImMf4KwMjswJ2bz9irzCViPNSN9o5us-3gNm3Jf_YQNPcxl3eB0ZiKCOzyOuuAcqGwBd_rMuUPYFRiVUy0XLhRtTwPweTZP8DKBAN-ClNV3X98KIZvXaBhNi6F1rk1admaSJ06xF0jb1c5QN-osmWuGkkEL3NymmrjXWWmcguiSZEZCQSr19F9xphTm_ywn1FsvWZL8SPQ6m_zE1MDWcoSLQ-8qYGi4yUwOdTA3XgI_QnPGHV0hw4LIffC0bPMICPCCPa6CpEJdKd9o51zqmhqb69Hhhznh0lhmxbAHzp53-dNnp1W8AAAD__6lsfqs), featuring prominent shortcuts for "Search" and "My List." Title cards will also highlight accolades like "#1 in TV Shows" or "Emmy Award Winner" to help users make quicker decisions. The update includes smarter recommendations that refresh in near real time, adjusting to your moods, interests, and browsing behavior. Other features in the works include [AI-powered search and vertical scrolling](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO4yAARb_G7ogA87ALim3cZdstLWIuhhWGCEgy-ftR5hemvVc6Rzr_rtvVxhTz8deeMN2XLePVEnpH3R5tDzHbXk6gf_ZHPVDygY1TLgmVhM6bszG9NzE64wGOaYRhWii1LFTQMRghFZRXC_NUYqZaSqcX4Z3SywQ2szGaD41KOjPK6LRcGL0pKbTWs8A-OzYIChd7qZf_JeYe4NO7PFEveznHZELv9zZMfwa-Dnw9bQv2lvA5B77a2uOeMPA1o_sUv8gebD7QSCgn7vYAsZE02LoHkvEiHrY_KtpYjbu_YkqxKT0Iepw2ph9j_1Wmp-HfAQAA__-JCX0e) previews on mobile. Netflix said it has no plans to raise subscription prices again anytime soon.

clean_body: U.S. and Chinese officials will , with the U.S. imposing up to 145% tariffs on Chinese goods and China retaliating with 125% levies on some U.S. products. | | | | | | Thursday, May 8, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1945, the U.S., U.K., and other Allied nations celebrated , marking the defeat of the Nazis in World War II. Remember full-service gas stations, and when a single income could cover a mortgage? Today, we're revisiting the everyday comforts that now feel like luxuries. Read more in one of our favorite rotators, Throwback Thursday. We will email you later today on behalf of our partners at to share an exciting investment opportunity in their luxury home platform. We're sponsored today by our friends at Be sure to review their messages below. | Don’t feel like reading The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | U.S. and China Begin Trade Talks U.S. and Chinese officials will to address the escalating trade war between the two nations. The U.S. has imposed up to 145% tariffs on Chinese goods, and China retaliated with 125% levies on some U.S. products. U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Trade Representative Jamieson Greer will meet with Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng in the first high-level meeting since Trump’s January inauguration. China announced , including interest rate cuts and looser lending rules. Trump Swaps Surgeon General Pick President Trump on Wednesday pulled his nomination of Dr. Janette Nesheiwat to be U.S. surgeon general and instead, citing her “impeccable credentials.” Means, a physician and author, is set to on a national health agenda focused on reversing chronic diseases. Nesheiwat, who was nominated months ago, will shift to another role within the Department of Health and Human Services. Means co-wrote the bestselling book, Good Energy, in 2024 with her brother, Calley Means, a health advocate who helped connect Kennedy and Trump after last year’s assassination attempt in Pennsylvania. . Netflix Shakes Up Its Look Netflix is rolling out its in over a decade, with a redesigned homepage built to make browsing faster, smarter, and more intuitive. For the first time since 2013, the main navigation menu will , featuring prominent shortcuts for "Search" and "My List." Title cards will also highlight accolades like "#1 in TV Shows" or "Emmy Award Winner" to help users make quicker decisions. The update includes smarter recommendations that refresh in near real time, adjusting to your moods, interests, and browsing behavior. Other features in the works include previews on mobile. Netflix said it has no plans to raise subscription prices again anytime soon. # **Still Feeling the Biden Hangover?**
---
| | |
---
The last administration got drunk on spending, and it’s STILL poisoning the economy. **You’re not imagining it —** Biden’s binge wiped out 20% of your buying power. And for years, we've been mixing bad decisions with stimulus spending and easy money... **So it’s no wonder the economy’s hung over.** We know Trump’s doing his best to fix the mess left behind by Biden... But now, Mike Johnson says Trump’s strategy to restore the economy is “going to work.” **Then in my recent interview with President Trump he said:**
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkkE-P2yAQxT8NvmHBYAwcfNitk6qqWqlb9e-lIoBjtmA7xo6bfvqKZBtV6hzf_Oa9mdFxCr67NEg8IoDe24QAEHtAAKdvW5zX5_j2NdaXzy0-1e8jz1149YKe4Q4PRrvfjx-_fxVvnpPeueUd_6XO9I4vl8nd4ZfQ0kXtQ1ZFW9iGdZZUhWuoqOpaKclp0TdcHahSnbG2c-5QKyOoU8yyihPQrGKFb4AAJ5xISgCILI2A6iB1x1zlnHQUVeSaU-roZm80Tcum53kcY2nGWISmX5YpXRfbI9hv21Yex2CTD2c3__QLvk2bMSLY93oY_HLBmcA3BGfmEFaHCaMSeLZh-9QZbxFrBaEfepLr0-nx6QFBHRJiLSEU77Iv_qJn_DRm89oMiLWSc1wrgSWRHEG9LvFHGtfZOMTaf9isR2f9GhFrd7c_XkWj46T9cfg_u5gbO20-BJ9qgSpy_HtXcW7gTwAAAP__8wKeVQ)
---
| | And this gives us hope, because he continues, "**_It's a restructuring of the American economy. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future._** " But if this restructuring of America takes six months... Then Trump gave you the heads-up you need to ride it out. So If there’s a practical way to prepare, without betting against America, then it’s worth knowing about. Optimism shouldn’t mean ignoring reality.
