subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8lyvbAXjokb7tibn8AG9Gw~~/AARclBA~/um4ctk37D3z-t6ARH71Y-EFJpwkfMMzXqW42nj0Ivw6d2I_m1JXyZlXRlVlCCnadpKlKLnemAVaYHePmBqVCmUQmcxwzt-0rJKaDY63mweDQMeNg-PnoV0G_1WGG_t17ghHSV_n1LbYDLDt2aLEuRvALz-vhhcD42agAAo8j9fP2iJ6YmfcNiTobWdNqeFsCMDe-2a8JXBMqM2ZZ8jisDjjmuU2uySGIj8akwLOOFpgtyvZqDqvgePh43m_mQoihqfoJTu98c78_z5z6DnIIHx-4eb1uatFczXaERugOPwqSXKzdyO7MBZbuU-xWHiFj)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8lyvbAXjokb7tibn8AG9Gw~~/AARclBA~/um4ctk37D3z-t6ARH71Y-EFJpwkfMMzXqW42nj0Ivw6d2I_m1JXyZlXRlVlCCnadpKlKLnemAVaYHePmBqVCmUQmcxwzt-0rJKaDY63mweDQMeNg-PnoV0G_1WGG_t17ghHSV_n1LbYDLDt2aLEuRvALz-vhhcD42agAAo8j9fP2iJ6YmfcNiTobWdNqeFsCMDe-2a8JXBMqM2ZZ8jisDjjmuU2uySGIj8akwLOOFpgtyvZqDqvgePh43m_mQoihqfoJTu98c78_z5z6DnIIHx-4eb1uatFczXaERugOPwqSXKzdyO7MBZbuU-xWHiFj) [NO](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8lyvbAXjokb7tibn8AG9Gw~~/AARclBA~/um4ctk37D3z-t6ARH71Y-EFJpwkfMMzXqW42nj0Ivw6d2I_m1JXyZlXRlVlCCnadpKlKLnemAVaYHePmBqVCmUQmcxwzt-0rJKaDY63mweDQMeNg-PnoV0G_1WGG_t17ghHSV_n1LbYDLDt2aLEuRvALz-vhhcD42agAAo8j9fP2iJ6YmfcNiTobWdNqeFsCMDe-2a8JXBMqM2ZZ8jisDjjmuU2uySGIj8akwLOOFpgtyvZqDqvgePh43m_mQoihqfoJTu98c78_z5z6DnIIHx-4eb1uatFczXaERugOPwqSXKzdyO7MBZbuU-xWHiFj) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8lyvbAXjokb7tibn8AG9Gw~~/AARclBA~/um4ctk37D3z-t6ARH71Y-EFJpwkfMMzXqW42nj0Ivw6d2I_m1JXyZlXRlVlCCnadpKlKLnemAVaYHePmBqVCmUQmcxwzt-0rJKaDY63mweDQMeNg-PnoV0G_1WGG_t17ghHSV_n1LbYDLDt2aLEuRvALz-vhhcD42agAAo8j9fP2iJ6YmfcNiTobWdNqeFsCMDe-2a8JXBMqM2ZZ8jisDjjmuU2uySGIj8akwLOOFpgtyvZqDqvgePh43m_mQoihqfoJTu98c78_z5z6DnIIHx-4eb1uatFczXaERugOPwqSXKzdyO7MBZbuU-xWHiFj)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

## Deal Reached on Property Tax Relief
State lawmakers in the House and Senate appear to have reached a deal to provide [more than $3 billion in new property tax relief](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ8GuokGg_kpXKS4dHfbLdGAJ8G6Nkb2bCBvvyLSPsGWR0fn09H3-3v6Jufd9vxFgY2cjzhtfGTPIpymPcWdk7yFzsTe8SNLTMFSmBQqDagB-8mS8--pKa2Z0Q5VyabqmrZDhbotV4MtLQqHuddVM6sOccC2G6juO54R57505oKhxr6qEHV9q3GpFz0PTdsPjdW2aJCtk5husrLwSfnh3_HF6bbEUHqziuy5qO-FGgs1HsdxC3m7ukKNvMGfXKgxxI3fhRqFTr7yBwOejkA_nDIkpmUFAsvkQVYSOJz38HQvhn8WQOiEOTH9ZJAIawwcj43TxaME93v1ZfevoUzG7tfa5bYrGnwGcv5zVf5P8MuovwEAAP__WDyRrQ) from the $24 billion surplus for the current budget cycle by increasing homestead exemptions and sharply raising business property tax exemptions. Under the tentative agreement, the homestead exemption for school property taxes will [increase from $100,000 to $140,000](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAMhp8GtqAQkgBDhi5s17UjMsQ5ogaCEvfg3r7iqnuCjrb1f_L3f93GG_jgt_snrGjodHHc8MgBiTCNe4o7JnoSnAmDR5cpptXCOgouFOOK8W604MNzlKU1E7d9XaKpW6lbLrjS5WIcKgFO9wI63bVOzGJuXVc70LK1k3KlNxeMK97VNeeqqRo-N7Oaeqm7XlplC8nReoqpogUJT8guPOMDUzXHtQxmIdpz0XwUYijEcBxHNU_5srjuhRhekUIM1-o9soBgMWWWKflvZMAsQmBxY29nRnCyP2vmYmJLXDEe25WBzbLpJ_sNc8YLWSZj98OH4LNuC8nvK_jw-o7-1-nDiN8AAAD__0u9j6U), with seniors and disabled residents receiving an extra $60,000 exemption. The business property tax exemption, meanwhile, will jump from $2,500 to $125,000. The plan also allocates an additional $3 billion from the surplus to fund statutorily required property tax rate “compression.” When combined with funding to maintain current tax cuts, lawmakers are expected to [allocate $51 billion to property tax relief](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAQhZ8GMyxE8Scg2MTsbrqh1Uh7paYRC5jBefstp2r3BW7SSXefU9_352v5Akfu-P4NHnW-trAcWBJhzhiXM4YTY35nuCKSwy3lEL0Fv0ghFReKi3Gx4Oi9dJXVRtipqVA3Q9cPQgrVV7sehw2NgWlUBrAfwUiL_TABSDTTCKpy-g4TSoxNI4Rq61as7arM1PXj1FllWSfQuhxinXfMeEHa6B1eGOs1-Ir0nvOZWPuLyZnJuZRSr-TWh9zDM-Vw3FdMzjcWk_Pnn8n57mRyFv_HZ8H34DGUA2Pia3iS5QmRUygY-T8ZPMPFjSNK3G3cIhDfYvA84vk05FY4OEHx8LhDTkgJ774qansWR-RSP7BOfHtw9AHIP9P-0vJvAAAA___JUJrF) over the next two years. While the deal signals compromise on an issue fiercely contested two years ago, it falls short of Gov. Abbott’s [call earlier this year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDvSmzAUhVcDnZirJ6hQkcad06ZkBLpgTYTFSHcM7D6Ds4S_P6_v_HmOTx9TfK-__YaOziWPbzxqQiIs417yjoUu8mfBFHGplMsW_DYKEJqBZjCMwcd0jaoNboJgeYuO98r0IECb9uUGbSVfuLQGZsOt0KJfhlkKOdugzDC10d1hoGHgHEDLTsIsZz1ZZQargg6NAgyRcunohYSnr0u68gdLN-etTe5FtNdG_mrEoxGP4zi6G-FA_HsLGvH4ehj5k_2nYLu_WPGxYmVrwZX5acpE7N7BFbTFhf2IKcVq-kbBuvmYvl30s4c-TvwLAAD__zbTeqs) to provide $10 billion in property tax relief from the budget surplus.
## Storms Cause Flooding, Property Damage
Heavy rains and strong winds caused flooding and property damage across Central and East Texas on Tuesday. Over 40,000 customers [lost power](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OgzAUhE8DHej5D5vCxTZ02XZL5OBHsGTHyH4bwu1X5Apbz-gbzfdzm28uxPB8fLuElt5rnp941IhEWOa95B0LneTeBWPAtVIuybs0c-CqA9WBmb0L8Zxl6-0d_MhatEzLQQMHNbSblUyjMMxLwfSo3aLuWq3LqgZtgI-ct8FeMFBgGANQohewiEXdRzmYUXrlGwnoA-XS04aEb1fXeOYXln7JqY12I9prI74aPjV8Oo6jP92W85U2fLruNHy6-p2EDgC6D6NbfivlhKV2zHAQjJuh3yjFtli_HyHGUAfdSHgkF-Jniv4n6GX5XwAAAP__BWJ4wQ). In Jewett, storms [toppled trees and ripped off roofs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE9jMo8aY8MQONiE7G-6IWpwA9YYjOxmgNuvZq7wk0pKeqp6_376H_TBb_NfXMnyNcV-ozMHYqbU7ynulPhmvBIFT1PmmFaHa69AGQlGwrN36MPd68LZAVxbFmTLRtcNKDB1sdhmcFS15TRRq7VBKLHVuoRnjQNiberC2w8MDDzLEsBUjwrGajRDq-tnq51xQgM5zzE9eCGmC_MU7vim9BjjWgS7MO9ZVH-E6oTqzvN8vAa-PqVQ3YctVAffaITqvhckE6YseUnxmBcZKG5yjMfGt3S44kxZLnGlLIcj-41ypixfWxxfWcaD5R5PSkJ1RbJuP30IPteN0DCv6MN3Ff_O5duq_wEAAP__xNyKEw). Officials believe a tornado might have come through the area, but the National Weather Service has not yet confirmed it. In McLennan County, first responders rescued a man [trapped in his car](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0bGu4ywQBeCnwd1EGAyYwsXfuLt_u6U1wDhBF5sIz43jt19l2y23PUc60qfz62v5wlzyfv8fN5r4vdZlp_MoxExtebb6pMYX47tRybQeXNuWcFuUVAakATkuCXO5lqFLU5DJ9x1NvRusk0oa2z0m77xX2liLztDqZFgHdKhHTcb3LuguT58xaeTY91IafdMy6miCH-zoh2SSGCSlzLXd-EFMbzzWctUXtVusW1emB_PzEPo_oWah5vM8b9-Rdn59aqFmbJxjIaHmj0youdSIRah5i4X2HXeI9Wfn6-8EAjIXgoLfBK1igpaPvN_hRKYGERs0OuIPwYYXWPg4hJqNlKC91U6Sh9GGAEMaNASNCvrVhjFGg73puzal55lLyYd1YpD3DXP5Y-J_e-I1qd8BAAD__zn7m-k) by rising floodwaters just seconds before the vehicle was fully submerged. In East Texas, large trees fell on homes in Bullard and Frankston. “ _I got in the closet and sat there, and the wind was just really hard. It was blowing like crazy and just real loud_ ,” [said a Frankston resident](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCnMZ0jY2MChYtr6P5rr0QLHhIrJkb2Csjbn8gr_OVqpdE38-9n_KEQw_vxl1Y4Ppc0vnGUCGbkcctpQ-YP05kRA5bCKa-e1lErbaWyUnWjpxA_Y1N5Nynf1xVcfW_au9LKttXTmaWtyc6T7QwWQ72dyPSTxjwtC3VGV8FdYcqqrq6VsuZm1GxmO_VN2_WNt140Cj5wyjd-gnFSWeIn7ci3Oa1VdE_mrQjzR-hB6OE4jtsL_LqeQg9XG6EHTpu88AHfi16QJGNKL1mwI0MeIH4iywjaUSROxruEHdLTSg9ImnMqRYIKy69B6KHKzm9HiDGU9i4a9VgpxC-Kfzfl7vT_AAAA__9rLYxE).
## West Texas Ranch Opens to Public
An environmental nonprofit has acquired [a 671-acre property](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypCAQRb8Gs54CFBkDggnW7G26odVKM1IPwQL2Of79lv7CZl3Vp073vX--pi_0wcf3b9zI1I9LU6SjBKqV8rTntFOuZ8VPpuDJlZryZnGbJJcKuAL-nCz6cE5dY83M7SAaMkJ3veaSq75ZjUanSfRDT4uzs3CkWiu1dJ3gauBaN95cMq74UwjOVfto-dIuah66_jl0VlnWcbK-pvyoK1X6YHHhTD-UH0vammDWWvfC2heTI5PjcRyPrcRrx-RIEf4WJscrFJPjPWeMywqRMMPs3zBTtBCx-hQxwI75Gw4fAsR0wEywYcQ3WZhPuG_fRAGM9sJs8I6YHDHD6yV-re363WRj98vgS69Zx98b-nC_Wv-v4B8j_wUAAP__5eCRqQ) near Big Bend National Park that the Texas Parks and Wildlife Department (TPWD) will manage for public use. The Nature Conservancy in Texas recently [purchased Heath Canyon Ranch for $1.2 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOgzAQQE9jOtDgX6BwsQ1dtt0STfAQLBkbmUmA26-yV9gLvKf3fu7jHUMM6fmNKzk-5zwmOvZIzFTGreSNCl-MZ6EYaN45l9XjOkqQpgZTQzd6DPEadeXdA3zfVuTam7Y3kGBstThQpoep7SR2fd9asFYpC9JLDwpnPVfBfWBgoGtbAKMaBZOazKPXtuu1N15oIB84l4YXYjpxn-OV31SaKa9VdAvztgv1JeQg5HAcR5OQX4WaXJ5CDpTq1y7k8OkqOa9CDgshL_WE6cqpLpimRcihKs5vR4gx7PYmNDxXDPFPwf8b83byNwAA___MBHd9). Its acquisition adds to the lands designated for conservation in the region, including the Black Gap National Wildlife Management Area and the 10,000-acre Brushy Canyon Preserve. The property is home to over 250 plant species—some of which [aren’t found anywhere else on earth](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGupDAQBNDTQGbUNjYwgYNNyP6mG6I2bgZrjY3s3s9w-9XMFX5aKpWe6s_X8oUhhvT8jQdZfm15SXTVSMxUlrPkkwrfjK9CMdBWOZfD47EoUEaAETAtHkO8F91668A_ZEtWjnoYQYEZ2t2OMGwoJzc-pINpnWhwftMAm3SGvIc22PcYGJikBDB918Par8Y99DA9tDe-0UA-cC4d78T0wrrFO39T6dZ8tNHuzGdt-l-Nmhs1X9fVHXfFhIlzCvldatQcw0aV70iNmvM_9jmX2qgZC4f1E7rwFI6SFwk55IRRnFj-ip2Qd7FiunMSBdO6iw9BKOilnmDozv1si_XnFWIMdRgbDc8DQ_zo-Gefflv1PwAA___FtY45)—and boasts over a mile of Rio Grande riverfront that includes the only access point for the popular multiday Boquillas Canyon river trip. "_The Heath Canyon addition will expand outdoor recreational opportunities from river access, to hiking, wildlife viewing, and public hunting. We are excited for Texans to enjoy this unique property_ ," [said TPWD representative Alan Cain](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD0SmzAQhU8jOjHLggQUKtKoc9qUjCwttsbiJ9LG2LfPwExOkGabnfnee9-v23RzMcX18dMtZPgzb9NKR0nETHna87ZT5i-7T6YUaS685SW4ZUJAJUFJGKbgYvpOXRXMHcLYVGSavtM9IChdPU0_6hk8BDfoQCNhhwCjQgyN70fV9FU0JwwUDE0DoNq6Bd96dR87PYxdUEF0QCHylmt-EtPHlTl9tzfl2m9LlcyTeS-i_SHQCrTHcdSv4vh8CrTnGoE2bd4lgfaMEmjhOlqgvXhyd_lVpFuDPGIKKc4kA-0u80IrS-d__4mZitR9I53PJP-JkXGVBxWWF0agrbIJ-xFTikX3ooPH4mK6evL_2X0b_BsAAP__TcmOpg).

Under the tentative agreement, the homestead exemption for school property taxes will , with seniors and disabled residents receiving an extra $60,000 exemption. The business property tax exemption, meanwhile, will jump from $2,500 to $125,000. The plan also allocates an additional $3 billion from the surplus to fund statutorily required property tax rate “compression.” When combined with funding to maintain current tax cuts, lawmakers are expected to over the next two years. While the deal signals compromise on an issue fiercely contested two years ago, it falls short of Gov. Abbott’s to provide $10 billion in property tax relief from the budget surplus. name: Jessica Hamilton, Evergreen
subject: Take action to stop deadly pollution
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Your Senators need to hear from you
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3568288/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| Republicans are trying to eviscerate decades-old clean air standards and **increase** deadly transportation pollution.

If they succeed, it will mean all of us paying the price—with our health, economy, and future. Fight back by urging your senators to stop these attacks on life-saving clean air protections. [SEND A MESSAGE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3568289/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi—

Last week, the House of Representatives voted to roll back decades-old Clean Air Act standards (also known as the California waivers) that enable states to clean up the air we breathe and accelerate the transition to electric vehicles.

And House Republicans did it by **hijacking the rule of law and setting a dangerous precedent that would give them unchecked power** to dismantle other rules they don’t like.

If these heinous resolutions get greenlit by the Senate, it would mark _the first time in the history of the Clean Air Act_ that Congress tried to take away states’ rights to set vehicle emissions standards that are stronger than what’s federally required.

As a result, **we’d see dirtier air, higher prices at the pump, and more health problems in low-income communities and communities of color who live near busy thoroughfares where tailpipe pollution is prevalent.**

We’re hearing that a vote could happen in the Senate as soon as next week, which means there’s still time to call out this petty political stunt and stop our lawmakers from poisoning our communities. [**Send a message right now urging your senators to save these lifesaving Clean Air Act standards.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3568290/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3568291/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Transportation is the largest source of emissions in the country and a primary source of harmful air pollution, especially in historically disadvantaged communities that reside near major highways. That’s why it’s critical for states to lead on setting their own standards. Without state standards, cars and trucks could spew more than 1.6 billion metric tons of climate-harming pollution into the air—leading to more premature deaths, more childhood asthma cases, and more destruction and damage caused by climate-fueled disasters.

**And as far as our wallets go, these state standards have been a game-changer for bringing more electric vehicles to the market, helping drivers cut climate pollution AND fuel costs.**

Republicans love to talk about “states rights”— _that is, until states stand up to fossil fuel interests._ The reality is that these CRA resolutions are nothing but a bad faith attempt to protect corporate polluters at the expense of clean air and climate protections.

With a vote scheduled for next week, your Senators need to hear from you.

[**Tell them to oppose any attempt to roll back state vehicle standards that cut pollution, drive innovation, and protect public health.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3568292/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| Thanks for being a part of this fight, |
---
| | |
---
### Jessica Hamilton
Senior Director - Digital Advocacy and Platforms
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 5/8/2025 🌹
body:
“Don’t scatter roses after I’m gone” – what my wife’s words taught me during Brain Cancer Awareness Month
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Heidi here! ICYMI, the RMV team hit the airwaves yesterday—I filled in on _[The Dan Caplis Show](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ___and was joined by our team member Laci Williams, while Tori guest-hosted _____[The Jeff and Bill Show](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_!__
With session chaos coming to an end, today’s newsletter opens on a more heartfelt note with hopes to lift some spirits. We’re honored to share a powerful piece from our dear friend and RMV team member, Drake Hunter, in honor of Brain Cancer Awareness Month. In “[Don’t Scatter Roses After I’m Gone](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.),” Drake reflects on his wife Sherrie’s journey with Stage Four Glioblastoma—a moving reminder to live fully and love deeply.
And a big shoutout to our friends at [Liberty Scorecard](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), who just dropped their 2025 legislator ratings. Curious who stood up for your freedoms this session? Check out libertyscorecardco.us—also ALWAYS linked in our [site’s menu bar](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for easy finding.
Now onto the news... Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** Keep your eyes peeled for a special Rocky Mountain Voice rundown of this year's session—the good, the bad, and the ugly. In the meantime, here's a couple of quick hitting updates on HB25-1312, which passed and is [awaiting Polis' signature](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and the "Yes In God's Backyard" bill, which [failed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** A judge blocked a conservative school board from [removing explicit books](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), citing partisan motives. Rep. Boebert joined Trump in urging the [release of Tina Peters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, five were indicted in a [major fentanyl trafficking](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) case led by ICE, FBI, and DEA.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** The U.S. Supreme Court has allowed Trump’s [transgender military ban](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to take effect while lower courts continue reviewing the case. The policy revokes Biden-era rules and orders the discharge of transgender service members.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Michael Hancock argues the Left uses [chaos as a tool](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for control, not just crisis response. Colleen Enos warns Colorado laws are [sidelining parents](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and moral boundaries. Greg Walcher says federal overreach is threatening [Colorado River rights](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) under the guise of drought panic.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, May 8, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Hunter: “Don’t scatter roses after I’m gone” – what my wife’s words taught me during Brain Cancer Awareness Month](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
For decades, I’ve stood in uniform beside the flag-draped coffins of fellow servicemen. I’ve stood at the front of church sanctuaries to bless weddings full of joy and eulogize lives full of sorrow. I’ve held hands with the grieving, prayed over the broken, and offered words when there were no words.
But nothing—absolutely nothing—prepared me for this.
On January 3, 2024, my wife, Sherrie, and I were pulled into a world no one ever wants to enter: the world of brain cancer. The diagnosis was brutal and blunt—Stage Four Glioblastoma.
It sounded like a sentence, not a diagnosis. And for over a year now, we’ve lived with it. Fought it. Prayed through it. Cried under the weight of it. And in moments of grace, even laughed despite it.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Backlash ignored: Senate approves HB25-1312 without parental rights protections](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* HB25-1312 passed the Colorado Senate 23–12, with Republicans and two Democrats voting no. It now awaits Gov. Polis' signature. If signed, it will go into effect in August of this year.

* All Republican attempts to add parental consent protections or remove Section 4—allowing schools to use students’ chosen names without informing parents—were voted down along party lines.

* Critics warn the bill disconnects parents from their children and could be used in custody cases. Supporters claim it protects transgender students from being outed in unsafe homes. The bill now awaits the governor’s signature.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[A turning point for Colorado: RMV announces first Mountain Majesty Gala featuring Eric Trump on June 21](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[GET YOUR TICKET HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Boebert presses FBI, joins Trump and allies rallying to free ‘political prisoner’ Tina Peters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Rep. Lauren Boebert sent a letter to the FBI calling for an investigation into Tina Peters’ nine-year sentence, describing her imprisonment as “cruel and unusual punishment” and politically motivated.
* Boebert revealed President Trump has taken personal interest in the case, publicly calling for Peters’ release and warning Colorado could face consequences for ignoring due process.
* Peters, a 69-year-old cancer survivor, is reportedly in declining health. The DOJ recently filed a statement of interest in her federal habeas petition, raising additional scrutiny over the severity of her sentence.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[“Parents Last”: Senate Democrats Advance HB25-1312 Despite Mass Opposition, Custody Concerns](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY TORI GANAHL****| STATE | MAY 6** _Colorado’s controversial “Kelly Loving Act” is one step away from becoming law, after the state Senate advanced HB25-1312 in a party-line vote Monday night._
**[Members left in the dark: LPEA board spends big while margins shrink and bills climb](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | MAY 5** _When La Plata Electric Association (LPEA) members open their May power bills, most will see the effects of a 7.72% rate increase that quietly took effect April 1. While LPEA’s board says the hike is needed to cover infrastructure and supply costs, many members are beginning to ask harder questions – not just about what they’re paying, but about how their cooperative is being run._
__
**[Michelle Chandler stopped a predator — and uncovered victims who may never know](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | MAY 5** _On May 11, 2024, at Nordstrom Rack in Lakewood, Colorado, Michelle Chandler caught a man filming her inside a women’s fitting room. She didn’t freeze or panic. Instead, she confronted him, pinned him to the ground and held him until help arrived – or so she thought._
__

**📺 DID YOU KNOW?** Nearly 97% of U.S. households have **at least one television** —meaning only 3% go without. Then again, with so much content available on phones and computers, maybe that’s not so surprising. According to Nielsen, 125 million American households had a TV in 2023–2024, representing about 315 million people—a 1% increase from the year before.

|

**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Good intentions will always be pleaded for every assumption of authority. It is hardly too strong to say that the Constitution was made to guard the people against the dangers of good intentions. There are men in all ages who mean to govern well, but they mean to govern. They promise to be good masters, but they mean to be masters." – Daniel Webster

All Republican attempts to add parental consent protections or remove Section 4—allowing schools to use students’ chosen names without informing parents—were voted down along party lines. Critics warn the bill disconnects parents from their children and could be used in custody cases. Supporters claim it protects transgender students from being outed in unsafe homes. The bill now awaits the governor’s signature. | | Rep. Lauren Boebert sent a letter to the FBI calling for an investigation into Tina Peters’ nine-year sentence, describing her imprisonment as “cruel and unusual punishment” and politically motivated. Boebert revealed President Trump has taken personal interest in the case, publicly calling for Peters’ release and warning Colorado could face consequences for ignoring due process. Peters, a 69-year-old cancer survivor, is reportedly in declining health. The DOJ recently filed a statement of interest in her federal habeas petition, raising additional scrutiny over the severity of her sentence. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ BY TORI GANAHL**| STATE | MAY 6 Colorado’s controversial “Kelly Loving Act” is one step away from becoming law, after the state Senate advanced HB25-1312 in a party-line vote Monday night. JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | MAY 5 When La Plata Electric Association (LPEA) members open their May power bills, most will see the effects of a 7.72% rate increase that quietly took effect April 1. While LPEA’s board says the hike is needed to cover infrastructure and supply costs, many members are beginning to ask harder questions – not just about what they’re paying, but about how their cooperative is being run. JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | MAY 5 On May 11, 2024, at Nordstrom Rack in Lakewood, Colorado, Michelle Chandler caught a man filming her inside a women’s fitting room. She didn’t freeze or panic. Instead, she confronted him, pinned him to the ground and held him until help arrived – or so she thought. __ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 📺 DID YOU KNOW? Nearly 97% of U.S. households have at least one television —meaning only 3% go without. Then again, with so much content available on phones and computers, maybe that’s not so surprising. According to Nielsen, 125 million American households had a TV in 2023–2024, representing about 315 million people—a 1% increase from the year before. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "Good intentions will always be pleaded for every assumption of authority. It is hardly too strong to say that the Constitution was made to guard the people against the dangers of good intentions. There are men in all ages who mean to govern well, but they mean to govern. name: The Bolt News Flash
subject: Shocking email scandal hits Shapiro admin
body:
The Bolt: New breaking news from Broad + Liberty | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **NEW:**_**Shapiro admin deleted accuser’s emails — while senior aides’ records were preserved**_
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f18314c4e3&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| Internal records obtained from Governor Josh Shapiro’s office suggest the email account of a top aide who accused a cabinet secretary of sexual harassment was **deleted under suspicious and possibly selective circumstances — and not as part of any routine records policy.**

The aide, who resigned in 2023 after lodging the allegation, appears to be the only official whose **email records have been entirely wiped from state servers** during that period.

The absence of any preserved messages raises sharp questions about whether the Shapiro administration took steps to erase a digital trail tied to a politically sensitive personnel matter — and whether broader email retention practices in the governor’s office are compromised or selectively enforced.

The accuser was a young woman in her early thirties who, in the earliest days of the Shapiro administration, accepted a job as a deputy in the Governor’s Office of Legislative Affairs headed up by Mike Vereb, who had held the same position for Shapiro in the attorney general’s office. Vereb, a Republican, had a long history with Shapiro, given that both served as state representatives from Montgomery County in the General Assembly slightly more than a decade ago.

Feeling immense pressure, the young woman abruptly quit just weeks into her job, and later filed a complaint with the Pennsylvania Human Relations Commission. Although she left her job in March of 2023 and the complaint was filed just weeks later, Vereb managed to stay in his position until September of that year, even weeks after the governor’s office settled the matter out of court for $295,000.
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5683786a79&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")
---
|
---
|
## Related top stories:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=78844d676c&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
### _Shapiro admin can’t locate key emails in sexual harassment case — “zero emails on the server...is preposterous”_
"A week’s worth of emails from a former Shapiro administration deputy cabinet secretary no longer exist.

That’s what an attorney conceded in court last month as he represented Gov. Josh Shapiro’s attempt to suppress _Broad + Liberty_ ’s legal effort to obtain more documents on the biggest scandal Shapiro has confronted in his first term."

[Read more](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=70bc78ccf2&e=b7b3eddce2) at _Broad + Liberty_.
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=39e9e16125&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
### _Pennsylvania’s Dem. senators united in silence about Shapiro administration’s missing emails_
"Pennsylvania’s Democratic senators are united in their silence when it comes to new revelations that Governor Josh Shapiro’s office deleted emails for a young deputy in his administration who quit after claiming she was subjected to weeks worth of sexual harassment by one of the governor’s top aides."

[Read more](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8552759d8e&e=b7b3eddce2) at _Broad + Liberty_.

name: Byron Donalds
subject: My mother would’ve ripped DEI to shreds
body:
She always taught me our country was built on hard work

| | | | |
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztomo646bj9ijihnel8g1iavu5so5l1if9od9ut8_)
|
---
I was raised by a single mother.
I learned to fight with my back against the wall with no way out but through.
So when the radical left Democrats get up in my face & call me a “race-traitor” after I applauded Trump for abolishing DEI, I’m left speechless.
My mom _**never**_ taught me to hate my fellow Americans.
She always instilled in me the values of _hard work_ and _merit._
**If I told her I was a _victim_ like someone in the Woke Mob, she’d probably just laugh like it’s some kind of joke.**
**That’s the America I believe in**. And that’s why I’m a MAGA Patriot who loves President Trump and the America First Movement.
But after I stood with President Trump as he abolished DEI, the attacks against me have been horrendous.
The race-obsessed left just sees me as another Black Man who should sit down, shut up, and vote blue for the rest of my life.
Their hypocrisy _disgusts_ me, and I can brush off most of their attacks, but here’s the _**[real problem](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zkve3eesoh5d5158vb6an5r9e88t3cgiea8lfkrg_)**_ that I can’t solve on my own.
Right now I’m running for Governor in Florida, and truth be told the radical-left is dropping the hammer on me. They’re prepared to spend **millions of dollars** to prop-up a Democrat that could flip MAGA’s hometurf **BLUE**.
I’m committed to being President Trump’s STRONGEST Governor ally in the nation. But I can’t do this alone.
_**[So before the day is over, can I count on your support to keep me in the fight?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z2lonh68pmiq6j2cul0fns6k7o81sju0np3abimo_)**_

|
---
[CHIP IN HERE](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgmjsj10nif2kb4mffhl1f0u1vnpp1ajr2upkipo_)
|
---
God bless you,
Byron Donalds

So when the radical left Democrats get up in my face & call me a “race-traitor” after I applauded Trump for abolishing DEI, I’m left speechless. My mom never taught me to hate my fellow Americans. She always instilled in me the values of hard work and merit. If I told her I was a victim like someone in the Woke Mob, she’d probably just laugh like it’s some kind of joke. That’s the America I believe in. And that’s why I’m a MAGA Patriot who loves President Trump and the America First Movement. But after I stood with President Trump as he abolished DEI, the attacks against me have been horrendous. The race-obsessed left just sees me as another Black Man who should sit down, shut up, and vote blue for the rest of my life. Their hypocrisy disgusts me, and I can brush off most of their attacks, but here’s the that I can’t solve on my own. Right now I’m running for Governor in Florida, and truth be told the radical-left is dropping the hammer on me. They’re prepared to spend millions of dollars to prop-up a Democrat that could flip MAGA’s hometurf BLUE. I’m committed to being President Trump’s STRONGEST Governor ally in the nation. But I can’t do this alone. | | God bless you, Byron Donalds | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid by Byron Donalds, Republican, for Governor 10941 Harmony Park Drive, Suite 4 Bonita Springs, FL 34135 Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Chaos, chaos, chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
When Donald Trump was inaugurated a little over 100 days ago, he inherited the strongest economy on the Planet Earth.
Last week, that strong economy — which was growing for three years at a solid pace — officially shrank.
So we’ve got a contracting economy, the chaos of the stock market, declining consumer confidence, projections of recession by major economists... How did we get here, after Trump promised a “golden age”??
We got here because one individual decided to bypass Congress, take taxing and trade power into his own hands, and take a chainsaw to the American economy.
The truth is, President Trump finds Congress an inconvenience. He doesn’t want debate, committee hearings, deliberation, or votes. He wants complete, personal power — and he’s taking it.
We have to turn this around. The good news is that the Senate has the ability to do it! The bad news? So far, the GOP has largely cowered under Trump’s threats and refused to stand up for the American people.
I’m working as hard as I can in the Senate to urge my Republican colleagues to take action — but I need your help.
You have the power to to stand up and say you won’t just watch one wannabe-dictator tank our economy. Whether it’s through protest, calling the Capitol, or spreading the word to your friends and family, please join me in this fight.
If you’re in this, will you add your name to my petition today? Having your signature truly helps us gain momentum. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xovxERy1Ek6S5EkwFadcUA2]
Thank you very much,
Tim Kaine

body:
we’ve reopened our letter for one more hour!
| | **_TIME-SENSITIVE FOLLOW UP FOR: YOU_** Hi there, you were personally chosen as a top Democrat to represent your state in our letter to Rep. Hakeem Jeffries!

Unfortunately, our records indicate you’re the only supporter left who hasn’t responded – we’re hoping this is a mistake!

**We’ve reopened the letter for ONE MORE HOUR to ensure you have a chance to sign.** [**Add your name ASAP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89902?t=6&akid=19773%2E878179%2EkFNrgS) | [**LAST CHANCE TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89902?t=7&akid=19773%2E878179%2EkFNrgS)
---
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
**_Hakeem Jeffries Launches Day of Action:_
“Push Back Against the Diabolical Republican Scheme to Enact the _Largest_ Medicaid Cut in History!”**
Leader Jeffries is calling EVERY Democrat to action — but we’re still missing critical support in your state.

**So we’re giving you an exclusive chance to join the fight:** [**Sign our letter thanking Hakeem Jeffries for his hard work and answer his urgent call to action NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89902?t=8&akid=19773%2E878179%2EkFNrgS)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89902?t=9&akid=19773%2E878179%2EkFNrgS)
[**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89902?t=10&akid=19773%2E878179%2EkFNrgS)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: GUTTING Medicaid, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we flip the House in the midterms and STOP Trump in his tracks!**

[**I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join your critical fight and to help Democrats flip the 3 seats we need to take back control! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89902?t=11&akid=19773%2E878179%2EkFNrgS) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89902?t=12&akid=19773%2E878179%2EkFNrgS) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89902?t=13&akid=19773%2E878179%2EkFNrgS)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
Thanks so much for signing!

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19773%2E878179%2EkFNrgS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19773%2E878179%2EkFNrgS).**

body:
Their party is a hot mess

_[Breaking News: Democrats have finally figured out what we've known all along - their party is a hot mess!](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpgq5ge7j7llppn5v0nj2nv6dme3nmuf0ivn0blo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cth6cor6chh2bs)_

One of their own just spilled the beans: "This is worse than 2016... Our party is so weak and so diminished."

Yeah, no kidding!

But don't get too comfortable, folks. When Democrats panic, they're like a bad cook in the kitchen - they start throwing everything at the wall and hoping something sticks.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Not Again…
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

A new Fox News poll just dropped — and its bad news.

Democrats are in a stronger position heading into the 2026 midterms than they were in 2018 when they flipped 40+ seats and took back the House.

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

We cannot let history repeat itself.

Because if Democrats seize the majority again, they won’t just raise taxes and open the border — it’ll be endless impeachment hearings, sham investigations, and non-stop political warfare aimed at one man: President Trump.

That’s why I’m stepping up to defend our majority — and launching my America First Majority Fund – but I can’t defend it alone.

[So please make a contribution to my America First Majority Fund so that we can defend the Republican House majority and continue delivering victories for President Trump and the American people.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=25)

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=50)

[CONTRIBUTE $75 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=75)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=100)

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=250)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A&amount=other)

This isn’t just about winning re-election. This is about defending the entire America First agenda, and I’m ready for the fight!

I was just in Michigan, campaigning for one of the most critical toss-up races in the country — and that’s just the beginning. I’m taking the fight to every battleground district where the majority will be won or lost.

The Democrats have already lined up their donors, their attack ads, and their media allies.

But we’ve got something more powerful: the truth and millions of Americans behind us.

If we fail to defend the House, they’ll bury President Trump’s agenda and put America last once again.

We’ve got to fight like hell and hold the line.

So I’m asking — will you step up today and be one of the first supporters of my America First Majority Fund?

Let’s win this fight together.

In Service

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Dan Crenshaw

| | Friend, **The most powerful force behind any winning campaign is its supporters.** Whether you're the neighbor proudly spreading the word, a volunteer knocking doors and making calls, or a donor fueling our message on TV and online—**you are the reason we win...** or don’t. Running for the House is a two-year journey—just like the two-year term. And while it’s never too early to show your support for Congressman Tom Kean, **our top priority right now is building the war chest we’ll need to win again.** Last cycle, Team Kean raised over $6 million thanks to more than 2,500 individual supporters. This cycle, we are aiming even higher: **500 new donors** and over **3,000 total grassroots supporters.** That’s why we’re focused on **_donors over dollars._** It’s not about how much you give—it’s about standing up and being counted. **Even $1 sends a message:****_I’m in._** [**Will you join our 2025 donor drive today—**** _even just a buck_****—to help us reach our goal?**](https://link.tomkean.com/s/c/uKlRis52DesQxJYkDmSEKjAAxUQxBZEeh0sTXkw-d0980JFEdTMfKlEaLXlAIL8bnLyQLQUrFZi_NAyAfrn6AvCLXbFnIutCb8OBDQuZ94jNXHOKOb-FmR11PPjRhMIO9VHBTplZDmSclkOFhJGdwFkZuiT2Pxq9-sUgta7ZdvIyZbZEzqu_NUOnP2hJeoMlcCxsJyC0-CM7gJoD_osE_A83vcWk1OVuqZ3mCy4cvF_hkueCxkNrhb4DaoBlvI9QpW1Qx_MTPnVqm3MWyQgXDd31bNMrUBGBscRSJW9wVwk9LmhCPYf4jshdOlUIBuXr699PoUs2_-sq7SpwyKpj7nQpfMocPqcfB_d86xBtey4yndhjxjTOYRBhFHfnR5YMThMMJLbXhsnweKNp4SSNFVpN50fL8B7982r7sO-1KTTinUICRIvEeKG4/z5kyh4PN_jeifbqSftbyl04xvoiLBM8E/8)

clean_body: Working on something and want to share.| | | | | Friend, The most powerful force behind any winning campaign is its supporters. Whether you're the neighbor proudly spreading the word, a volunteer knocking doors and making calls, or a donor fueling our message on TV and online—you are the reason we win... or don’t. Running for the House is a two-year journey—just like the two-year term. And while it’s never too early to show your support for Congressman Tom Kean, our top priority right now is building the war chest we’ll need to win again. Last cycle, Team Kean raised over $6 million thanks to more than 2,500 individual supporters. This cycle, we are aiming even higher: 500 new donors and over 3,000 total grassroots supporters. That’s why we’re focused on donors over dollars. It’s not about how much you give—it’s about standing up and being counted. Even $1 sends a message:I’m in. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being part of this team and helping drive Congressman Kean to victory. ### Watch Maxine Waters humiliate herself in front of the nation
May 8
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=163084278&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMDg0Mjc4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NjcxMjE2OCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ5MzA0MTY4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jg9uoMCTB3ahXWbjqAw51SVIRUNDt01QhGOqMk2JPt4&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---

U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent **[took down Democrat Rep. Maxine Waters](https://substack.com/redirect/3921de63-cc33-4ff6-a2fe-e67434b211b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during intense questioning at Tuesday's House Appropriations Committee hearing.
**[Bessent was just too smart for her...](https://substack.com/redirect/3921de63-cc33-4ff6-a2fe-e67434b211b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3921de63-cc33-4ff6-a2fe-e67434b211b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3921de63-cc33-4ff6-a2fe-e67434b211b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**[Waters pressed Bessent](https://substack.com/redirect/3921de63-cc33-4ff6-a2fe-e67434b211b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on if "DOGE employees" received appropriate security training before being granted access to Treasury databases.
"Again, they were granted read-only access at Treasury,..." Bessent explained.
"Please! You can't filibuster here, this is not the filibuster playground!" Waters snapped. "What you did was, you let these strangers into our Treasury with access to all of the data, all of the personal information and you just opened the door! Why did you do that?!!"
"No ma'am," Bessent fired back. "They were Treasury employees."
Waters asked Bessent to say under oath that "all of them" who were given access were Treasury employees. Bessent doubled down, assuring her that they were in fact all Treasury employees.
**["There were DOGE employees also!"](https://substack.com/redirect/3921de63-cc33-4ff6-a2fe-e67434b211b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Waters again snapped.
"Well, there is no such thing as a 'DOGE employee',' there were Treasury employees," Bessent corrected the frustrated congresswoman.
Watch the clash here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3921de63-cc33-4ff6-a2fe-e67434b211b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**[Together With Health Science Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/906ab4b3-472e-41ba-86bd-325c852d5865?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Big Food is ATTACKING RFK Jr
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/906ab4b3-472e-41ba-86bd-325c852d5865?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
They're terrified. RFK Jr announced a ban on using government welfare payments for sugary drinks...
And Big Food has launched an all-out assault on him and President Trump.
But it's nothing compared to the fight **Big Pharma** is likely preparing. RFK Jr is poised to reveal _their_**[biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/906ab4b3-472e-41ba-86bd-325c852d5865?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
And Big Pharma will stop at nothing to keep it hidden.
It's **[a secret](https://substack.com/redirect/906ab4b3-472e-41ba-86bd-325c852d5865?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that could cost them billions in profits and dark money political donations... But it could just save your life.
That's exactly why we're not waiting around, we're releasing full details in **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/906ab4b3-472e-41ba-86bd-325c852d5865?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** today... while this information is still accessible online.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/906ab4b3-472e-41ba-86bd-325c852d5865?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. No matter who you voted for in the last election, Big Pharma is the true enemy. So **[click here now](https://substack.com/redirect/906ab4b3-472e-41ba-86bd-325c852d5865?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to learn exactly what they've been hiding from you and your family.
* * *
# Trump makes Canadian PM PANIC, tries to buy Canada on the spot
President Donald Trump **[shocked Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney](https://substack.com/redirect/5642e8f2-77d3-40c1-8ea1-e78e6fac84f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , Tuesday, putting him on the spot about the U.S. buying the nation of Canada and turning it into the 51st state in front of the press and millions watching.
"It would really be a wonderful marriage," Trump said, not joking one bit. Watch the mortified Canadian PM try to to quickly wiggle his way out of the conversation.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5642e8f2-77d3-40c1-8ea1-e78e6fac84f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The tense conversation started when a reporter asked Trump if he is still considering plans to make Canada the 51st state, also asking for the Prime Minister's response.
"I believe it would be a massive tax cut for the Canadian citizens, you'd get free military, tremendous medical care and other things," Trump answered. "You know I'm a real estate developer at heart, when you get rid of that artificially drawn line,... I'm a very artistic person, I say that's the way it was meant to be, but we're not going to be discussing that unless somebody wants to discuss it."
Trump continued on with his impromptu sales pitch, directed at the asking reporter but no doubt meant for the Prime Minister to hear and consider. He added that the U.S. provides free military protection to Canada already, "It would really be a wonderful marriage!"
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5642e8f2-77d3-40c1-8ea1-e78e6fac84f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Add your name: tell my colleagues NO military parade for Trump
body:
During President Trump's first term in office, he tried and tried again to hold a military parade. Not one that would honor the troops -- but one that would honor him.
#

During President Trump's first term in office, he tried and tried again to hold a military parade. Not one that would honor the troops – but one that would honor him.
He wanted helicopters flying, tanks rolling through the streets, and members of the military saluting as they passed an observation deck where he'd sit and smile as they marched by.
This from a man who secured multiple deferments when his country called on him to serve.
As you know, I was an infantryman in Lima Company, 3rd Battalion, 25th Marines. We fought in Anbar, Iraq. They called us “Lucky Lima” because we didn’t have a single casualty in the first two months of our deployment.
Our luck didn’t hold though. By the time our deployment was over, we had more casualties than any unit in the Iraq War.
I joined the Marines to serve my country, but I ran for Senate for the guys I served with. They’ve been let down too many times, and I ran to change that.
And a parade that will cost significant money at a time Trump wants to cut veterans' health care and housing programs is even more abhorrent.
I would like to try to stop this parade – or at least let my colleagues know what a mistake it is. And I would like you to join me in that effort – so when they ask, I can tell them it's not just me, it's people everywhere who oppose this parade.
[**Please add your name to tell Congress – my colleagues – you oppose a military parade on Donald Trump's birthday. The military should not be used as a prop to celebrate any president.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_military_parade/?source=em250508-1-90&akid=3847%2E734936%2EytFVk7) A military parade honoring our president is not something we do here – it's something that happens in Moscow or Pyongyang. Thank you for speaking up, Ruben Gallego [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_military_parade/?source=em250508-1-90&akid=3847%2E734936%2EytFVk7)
Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=3847%2E734936%2EytFVk7). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=3847%2E734936%2EytFVk7). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=3847_734936_ytFVk7&akid=3847%2E734936%2EytFVk7)

Hi Peter,

We are thrilled to announce that Her Bold Move will be co-hosting a virtual event with **WomenCount, EMILYs List, Virginia’s List, Elect Black Women, the Next 50, and Electing Women National Capital Region** – and we are especially excited to extend a special invitation to the Her Bold Move network.

**_You are invited_ to join us for the _Virginia Is for Women_ virtual event, which will give guests the chance to hear directly from 10 candidates for statewide and state legislative offices in Virginia.**

[**RSVP TODAY to join us on Zoom at 7:00 p.m. ET on Thursday, May 15. A $50 donation will save your spot AND go directly to the campaigns of the phenomenal candidates you’ll meet at our event who are running for office this cycle. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107309184/544271320/1919652656?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlNDZiMjhhLTEwMmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Hpcw7e2DttFLS4RpWUpVDV2oxHfvTB2o58EL5kU4sJM=&emci=1fa8b5ef-872b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ce46b28a-102c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=32015042)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107309185/544271321/1919652656?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlNDZiMjhhLTEwMmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Hpcw7e2DttFLS4RpWUpVDV2oxHfvTB2o58EL5kU4sJM=&emci=1fa8b5ef-872b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ce46b28a-102c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=32015042)
---
All eyes will be on Virginia this year as 100 House of Delegates districts are on the ballot, plus the Governor’s, Lieutenant Governor’s, and Attorney General’s offices, which are up for re-election in November.

This election year will give Virginia Democrats the opportunity to not only increase their majority and flip executive offices, but also to hand national Democrats a roadmap for making national gains in 2026. Not to mention, with abortion on the ballot, a Republican Governor who has said he’d like to pass an abortion ban, and a 1 vote margin in the VA State Legislature, _the stakes could not be higher._

**Here are the Her Bold Move candidates that this event will support:**

✅ Lt. Gov. candidate Ghazala Hashmi – Senator Hashmi helped draft the language for VA’s constitutional amendment protecting safe and legal abortion, and served as a Chief Co-Patron for the legislation. **She is the only woman in a seven-candidate primary, and is the most experienced legislator in the race.**

✅ Elizabeth Guzmán – A former Delegate who was redistricted out in 2023 and is running to reclaim a seat for pro-choice Democrats.

✅ May Nivar – Running for a seat that has been named the TOP pickup opportunity for Democrats in Virginia. Her GOP opponent was rated one of the least effective legislators in the entire state.

✅ Jessica Anderson – In 2023, Jessica lost to the current Republican incumbent by **only 1.9%** after being vastly outspent. She is already outperforming the incumbent this time around, and is very likely to win the rematch in November.

✅ Kimberly Pope Adams – Like Jessica, Kimberly fell short of flipping this district by **less than half a percentage point** in 2023. She knows exactly what she needs to do to finally win this seat and help VA unseat one more anti-choice vote in the General Assembly.

**Some of these candidates are facing competitive primaries on June 17 and are lagging behind their male opponents in fundraising. We need to ensure they have the support they need to WIN. We hope you can join us to hear what these candidates need, and their visions for Virginia’s future with an even bigger Democratic, pro-choice, female majority!**

[**Please RSVP TODAY to join us on May 15 at 7:00 p.m. ET for this very special _Virginia Is for Women_ virtual event to hear directly from these amazing women. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107309186/544271322/1919652656?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlNDZiMjhhLTEwMmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Hpcw7e2DttFLS4RpWUpVDV2oxHfvTB2o58EL5kU4sJM=&emci=1fa8b5ef-872b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ce46b28a-102c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=32015042)

We hope to see you there!

Team Her Bold Move

name: Team NPP
subject: As Trump’s threat looms, we are counting on your support.

Fellow activist,

As the threat of the Trump administration stripping away tax-exempt status for nonprofits looms, which would be a blatant attack on what he sees as his political opponents, we are once again reminded how critical your grassroots support is to the success of our work.

While it’s harder to raise funds in odd-year elections, the support is just as important. This is especially true for Pennsylvania this year as we gear up for judicial elections that will have BIG impacts on our community and nation, but are often overlooked by the electorate. We are working to combat that, but we need your help.

NPP is grateful to have received multi-year funding that has allowed us to maintain our staff and programmatic efforts through the early parts of 2025. However, **we rely on grassroots support to continue providing consistent voter engagement throughout the year. **

[**Will you help us continue to fund our voter engagement efforts ahead of the primary elections happening this month by rushing $25 or more today?**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz5lM5B4-2FXq1Zv5A9UwINUXwz5yDfbea-2BhqkX-2Fa9Xu20TD6hBxklE06ggBzrBGtcKyud88ebknDIMjDzKNrfTwfQAgTWW479p5Uzcj7ZAcnTHltJW0DcKu3p9OsU-2BCgBTMQ-3DV6-j_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYvmh9dci74u-2FMpaHFoZIHdOkf2O0fTX0NnvPftSguBPo58PaGdu1amm8BRGkHJCofIemnggq9ze3P-2BD-2F2KVJ-2Bav5k3RlB4jjzHl7tXTEw0w-2BGU5oJLJsNOX9vQ-2B8DZ8tINhtlP3xDby5Dd9FdXYHaLQeS7VLj-2BA-2FdS-2B8ufO-2B3b-2Fqv9c2CnPhQMIjknScui54V)
Low turnout in judicial election years can be credited to low information/civic education around the elections, the judicial candidates, and the roles judges play in defending our democracy. To change that, we must INVEST in year-round civic education and engagement.

Our voter engagement does not stop after a presidential election – our staff continues to engage Pennsylvanians year-round as we know that consistent civic engagement is the way to truly build community power, increase voter turnout, especially in odd-year elections, and expand the electorate. But we cannot do it alone.

**We need your help not only to maintain our current level of operations but also to ramp up as we prepare for the crucial Supreme Court retention elections and other judicial, local, and municipal elections in Pennsylvania. Can we count on you? **

**[Help ensure that we can continue to fund our voter education and engagement work by rushing $25 or whatever you can now →](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz5lM5B4-2FXq1Zv5A9UwINUXwz5yDfbea-2BhqkX-2Fa9Xu20TD6hBxklE06ggBzrBGtcKyud88ebknDIMjDzKNrfTwfQNxPvfiYYqzl53hz0pnWjLHockQv8lQpzmYK5hARc5I0-3DvZNz_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYvmh9dci74u-2FMpaHFoZIHdOkf2O0fTX0NnvPftSguBPr6gkNYSWOIbO89kAFyxm0mtkJaaBd8Alx-2FvJ7NCyVbKb7bUFX8JTTk2bUiuJQdF7K3GxjmJEGCVo7-2BrCksaGAFfUSpMKc63DMeq993KHONb1qegRhZONYb8wH-2B6exh-2BWT9IrDHCiYgj1b1MTrX-2B-2Bgo)**

_Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round._
---
| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, As the threat of the Trump administration stripping away tax-exempt status for nonprofits looms, which would be a blatant attack on what he sees as his political opponents, we are once again reminded how critical your grassroots support is to the success of our work. While it’s harder to raise funds in odd-year elections, the support is just as important. This is especially true for Pennsylvania this year as we gear up for judicial elections that will have BIG impacts on our community and nation, but are often overlooked by the electorate. We are working to combat that, but we need your help. NPP is grateful to have received multi-year funding that has allowed us to maintain our staff and programmatic efforts through the early parts of 2025. However, we rely on grassroots support to continue providing consistent voter engagement throughout the year. Low turnout in judicial election years can be credited to low information/civic education around the elections, the judicial candidates, and the roles judges play in defending our democracy. To change that, we must INVEST in year-round civic education and engagement. Our voter engagement does not stop after a presidential election – our staff continues to engage Pennsylvanians year-round as we know that consistent civic engagement is the way to truly build community power, increase voter turnout, especially in odd-year elections, and expand the electorate. But we cannot do it alone. We need your help not only to maintain our current level of operations but also to ramp up as we prepare for the crucial Supreme Court retention elections and other judicial, local, and municipal elections in Pennsylvania. Can we count on you? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ** | | | | | | | | Thank you, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information** New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 193814126996771 | | | |

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc70f44a5-8237-44dc-a6ec-7eac09452529/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

## California Motorists Could Face $8 Gas Next Year
THE CENTER SQUARE—A new analysis has found California gasoline prices could rise to $8.44 per gallon by the end of 2026 after the pending closure of two refineries—one-fifth of the state’s refining capacity—and the onset of new state regulations. California gas prices are already the nation’s highest, at $4.78 per gallon for regular-grade gasoline Tuesday, [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/RfK9-2-i4ERxzrUpsHFCMshnAxY0fUXDN-YBpS0mTYHf3zstGlh55MSbPUuxg4OvDJJPk-_kLWpDStxBdRG9NLPb8cEWiOhI1xS35W0EKNtyd2eQlBIH7Jz6K7ycjDaYh9Y1jdc203FrjvcK82g_VVV2F9Z2v6oswXynV8VJEsu6gfEw1oy0DV2E1kiQXyAd5JRCKFiFtELZFrA2N6b8Jy5TMwuzRdsgnjwxwr_Xuk4L3DSJLzx0lNUWbLTnaSwLgiqbDXsLu7ZW3mTGTGSIbNME6aw7otVSSe1mhCtw25omz99AXGBGqonN53BIQw6Ph_Lr9GRxtAM/whttgzifWehbDRbSVMzMryKDA0x2qw4O/8)

## Essex Files: 80 Years After V-E Day
As we stand in 2025, marking the 80th anniversary of Victory in Europe Day, the world pauses to honor the moment when the bloodiest conflict in European history drew to a close on May 8, 1945. From the vantage point of today, the formal end of hostilities in Europe—ratified in Berlin with the unconditional [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/d-DL6kVo8f0V-I9mu_o-DwIjRCAAvA2SCT3DvEKCSIRyd7FNsTGNnL1ga9seBbBoHBz2mQRhKorV6opJTNHc8YgMIJohakTRMX37FYlP1Zqjgnb1RYu4y6uxBJu-0tJYeP1sMHsWnCVKFujAAk3U5troQ9VOmGrR3eIVo7DNXLuQfhriDOqIhHbJzM6TXbwtUv4pYuwbZ4hZCwruMCWrzEXqK_eappXLAZ5jmBX2YMBW7jjew_1nzRscDOr4wMuKi1qu107MHNnfMOmYvlekLmrtfMpFMo83duNvZof9GKAzD707cEgcFFFw7w/uS4o5UxjP9iKTq8zMrr2cRuAW1CCa5Ha/8)

## The Tables Hilariously Turn on Columbia Pro-Hamas Activists After They ‘Occupy’ the Library – RedState
Are you ready for a healthy dose of schadenfreude? Because pro-Hamas students at Columbia just provided one of the most hilariously satisfying videos of the week. Setting the scene, chaos broke out at the left-wing Ivy League university on Wednesday, and as of this writing, things were continuing to [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/ltHbq5SYwKnA4GNQa70bqhBhyZpCPlI8jBLvAqGhxVpr1OWkmgg4XpOPrcFI1R6qTMdJQDAcesIIoEVRVqt7x-w5Jy8pFIREIxJBD_OHcqWGQjIsZuGNGCo584hy1G7Qfnj_6hO7FsK74F9p04Oa1YYYQSCQDLImwB5D-QSheBAMV8sJvxJsJikOF3hW7NfRGbuIcydCUZswM_y9OnZFNU_rP6z_cWKx4T0FCkkqAIKFbv6ob6KCNj06Acw9c9JvhVTJr054bDkoXbj4jF5haWychUYmjNIthoaWu8azTskyVcfpU3vK54aiK6O8f_lB9mY-_2gOEdM4MhYFrDHE6ZkuSx3kJhqO0KDYngyTkhFpMyHIQ5Msl5St_TxYFfZDUvA4JK6wQii8JQI/tMK5wpNQmxaBLlgUH_MOuwkKPa06dX2y/8)

## Rep. Eric Burlison: Abolish the ATF
On Feb. 28, 1993, 70 agents with the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives laid siege to the home of the Branch Davidians near Waco, Texas. By April, skirmishes with ATF and a fire resulted in the deaths of more than 80 men, women, and children. Significant questions still linger about the events of [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/xtV-D2Fifnir4bq5nMdm04D8zmbC7XBiwokT3FdCleFLfJTPa-XIipPeikJ8278jRg2UfswERs5vefisymmxim7cuNJV1lrwU2A1wPEsiLJ8wxQeZQxT_m8NL-jEccUXwhSY-S5B4cUSsuGB1IsTLh-08Kcqx-DStW9PiyyCF3WolLZDBORDn9hcgdzmFsZp_Gb3ePApL9oGd9LPO31Ct_1HJTQnsrkzXsBwRbcgfRkNkp0BwXkIY8eyEqzDnpS7o2Ypxh0hDgnzFgtAKoqkYgi1O60162AXhkDJx8YW1aCxHOJ1drIobrTR/yQ445_FLLkpdwMgxwHaq-LROmJ7PL5Bk/8)

## Socialist Sanders Has Exactly Zero Apologies to Give for Hollywood Lifestyle – RedState
There’s nothing that spells hypocrisy more than elites like climate fraudster John Kerry galivanting across the globe on high-priced junkets to “save the world,” or the thousand plus jets that regularly descend upon at the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland (along with countless ten-SUV motorcades), or Doom Pixie Greta Thunberg showing up all [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Ol_cWbFBaKXqUouKPxTonwuF9-hRM_qUIx8qgX-feskKAfpPr1xuYgbk4aX926SxJu54fzelLU4BDpIesqEeXmjZ_ko5z5O0XftFBJR3UbR741f8fAM5IygJb5D3TDsOPTQqBFZUIXvJJMU8wod8HlQvLyPzAu01b1ygpd3fC_dy7OwhW4jLJgzcY6xGA2deQrlue98zk4PY7ozWcG1_fEHInsUJbCM7S8YVdyDnmgF9ObqMKubBMVVgt_ViiDcpPqPV7EtapTNtqR0Qp42v6fNjb7gvZjjFboh7smBYvrcJVjD14jBJcvJ0SkbOb39zFYYgITzI62eolDSBLAFIaOSDDB6tS_awwJpQ8mVQDt2y1wR_C8kacN1PjnZsyw/VBHNj2BSfqYecg4D0APuVa5YYa5HDMK9/8)

name: President Trump
subject: Is this Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

Friend,
---
Something deeply troubling is happening in our country.
---
Judges are inciting legal warfare against our Republic...
---
...A rogue judge issued a restraining order against Elon Musk to shut down the Department of Government Efficiency.
---
...A rogue judge wants the Trump Administration to get individual warrants for EACH illegal alien that the Administration deports!
---
**_And now, the fate of my freedom – and frankly, my _life_ – is in the hands of a judge appointed by Obama’s Homeland Security Secretary, Janet Napolitano._**
---
_This is the same Homeland Security Secretary who issued a report to crack down on “rightwing extremists” in America._
---
Those so-called rightwing “extremists” are you and me: _people who believe in freedom, individual rights, true justice, and limited government._
---
**And now I’m being put on trial in a sham state case where President Trump has NO AUTHORITY to pardon me.**
---
_When I hear the Left call us “rightwing extremists,” I’m reminded of the time Democrats arrested me in one of the most violent jails in America and called me_ **_P01135780_**.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=85a68582de274f8992b96f1629d7617a&_e=661rG13p4rV5WgQvCiQwEewPC13BlDkuOOOQHkfXMZMwBIWY_Ct1s-dzReYgK94-WDnQCjElPKXv92Sa1h8yl0uImvVtgHn5grPCG5Dtd4tTmGkLDfLqZuQfbAtL2NiR_LHIXO8WBGVz2s9PEYzfEqT9B7I7pP3QGOj1SAh2x5VSWB87YngyAtVNgwXkrJ0XcJCi84Ajah7VIqmjw8VLakcJ0loxnXlVO4tvxRjD2oNRAOUZUqiv5pvFEgszaIgTdNpxMYvgw-_mGCGjvwr8OONre8qPwPAsvoLoURQmUDshbQCWWcQyfRkuDLZ5kq4r4ZkEfrrVz4_hcbeL8f1fAN6VwSiEVjL7_EYbVGyrhXQ3HbNkZHsSkzAXo_m9QL7T)
__
---
_The “P” in my mugshot number is supposed to stand for “prisoner.” But to me, it stands for**PATRIOT!**_
---
_The Left sees all of us freedom-minded individuals as prisoners, deplorables, and extremists. But we’re one thing and one thing alone – _PATRIOTS_._
---
**And as a red-blooded patriot, I will fight for my rights, I will fight for my justice, and I will fight for my LIFE so that I do not spend my 100th birthday in a prison cell as an innocent man.**
---
But to WIN against the cabal of rogue judges that want to treat us like political prisoners for simply believing that we have a God-given right to life and liberty, I’m going to need your support funding my Legal Defense Trust – which truly stands as my last remaining hope.
---
**_But if you cannot afford to, please just stop reading here and go about your day. I mean it!_**
