Our Revolution is working every single day alongside Bernie to push
Democrats to reclaim a clear, bold, progressive vision – not just regain
power and preserve the structures that have failed working people for
decades.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1108&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250508nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8417%2E5885482%2ERM0uDM ]We’re mobilizing the grassroots, doing the work to win elections, and
holding our leaders to account. But we don’t take corporate money and
can’t do it without your support. Can you chip in right now to support Our
Revolution as we fight for the soul of the Democratic Party?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1093&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250508nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8417%2E5885482%2ERM0uDM ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1094&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250508nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8417%2E5885482%2ERM0uDM ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1096&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250508nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8417%2E5885482%2ERM0uDM ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1097&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250508nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8417%2E5885482%2ERM0uDM ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1098&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250508nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8417%2E5885482%2ERM0uDM ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1099&amount=9&refcode=email-20250508nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8417%2E5885482%2ERM0uDM ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Here's the reality: Democrats haven’t succeeded because they’ve hesitated
to boldly confront corporate greed, exploding inequality, and climate
catastrophe. Instead, they’ve prioritized half-steps of watered-down
policies that don’t fundamentally change the lives of everyday Americans.

Right now, the Democratic party faces a choice. And Bernie made it clear
exactly what is at stake when he said: "The status quo is not working and
cannot continue to be defended. The American people desperately want this
country to move forward in a new direction: economically, politically,
socially and environmentally. And we are enormously proud that we’re
helping to shape that path. If we stand together, we have the power to
create a government and an economy that works for all of us, not just a
handful of billionaires."

This message is RESONATING – as was made clear by the electric Fighting
Oligarchy Tour. But right now, powerful interests and establishment
strategists like James Carville are working tirelessly to silence our
voices and slow our progress. Corporate lobbyists and big-money donors
know what's at stake – and they’re pouring millions into primary campaigns
against progressive candidates.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250508&t=1111&akid=8417%2E5885482%2ERM0uDM ]Headline: James Carville says Democrats need to stop letting Bernie
Sancers and AOC define the party

That's why we ALL must step up immediately and build the resources we need
to mobilize behind Bernie and elect revolutionary leaders across the
entire country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1105&amount=22&refcode=email-20250508nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8417%2E5885482%2ERM0uDM ]Will you stand alongside Bernie and Our Revolution with a contribution
today – helping build a Democratic Party that works for ALL of us, not
just billionaires?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: EMILYs List Press
subject: NEW: North Carolina Republican CONCEDES in state Supreme Court race!
body:
EMILYs List President Jessica Mackler released the following statement: |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107314508/544285735/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE519_20250508_RiggsWin_PL&sourceid=1056059&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWUwMGFkYy0xNDJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pTA2mgDLqxBA1-tvodtsJ6u-I9NkZVgdTxhRXL6QGkY=) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
May 8, 2025 **EMILYs List Statement on Jefferson Griffin Conceding to Justice Allison Riggs in North Carolina State Supreme Court Race** WASHINGTON, D.C. — Yesterday, Jefferson Griffin, the Republican challenger for the North Carolina state Supreme Court seat, conceded to Justice Allison Riggs following a lengthy attempt from Republicans to overturn the November election results and disenfranchise voters. Justice Allison Riggs won her election in November 2024 and her win was confirmed by two separate recounts, but her opponent refused to concede for nearly six months and attempted to throw out 65,000 legitimate votes. EMILYs List President Jessica Mackler released the following statement: **"It's about damn time.** **Today, democracy prevailed. Because we didn't back down, Justice Allison Riggs is headed back to North Carolina's state Supreme Court, and the will of the voters was upheld. At a time when Republicans are doing everything in their power to silence us, EMILYs List is fighting for candidates like Justice Allison Riggs who are critical to defending our rights and our democracy."** | [DONATE TO ELECT MORE WOMEN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107314509/544285736/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE519_20250508_RiggsWin_PL&sourceid=1056059&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWUwMGFkYy0xNDJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pTA2mgDLqxBA1-tvodtsJ6u-I9NkZVgdTxhRXL6QGkY=)

clean_body: EMILYs List President Jessica Mackler released the following statement: | = FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE May 8, 2025 EMILYs List Statement on Jefferson Griffin Conceding to Justice Allison Riggs in North Carolina State Supreme Court Race WASHINGTON, D.C. — Yesterday, Jefferson Griffin, the Republican challenger for the North Carolina state Supreme Court seat, conceded to Justice Allison Riggs following a lengthy attempt from Republicans to overturn the November election results and disenfranchise voters. Justice Allison Riggs won her election in November 2024 and her win was confirmed by two separate recounts, but her opponent refused to concede for nearly six months and attempted to throw out 65,000 legitimate votes. EMILYs List President Jessica Mackler released the following statement: "It's about damn time. Today, democracy prevailed. Because we didn't back down, Justice Allison Riggs is headed back to North Carolina's state Supreme Court, and the will of the voters was upheld. At a time when Republicans are doing everything in their power to silence us, EMILYs List is fighting for candidates like Justice Allison Riggs who are critical to defending our rights and our democracy." | = = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. * The Department of Justice is all too often being twisted into a political weapon.
* Centuries-old laws meant to protect voting rights could be turned inside out.
* The possible message would be: “If you help someone vote, we’ll come after you.”

subject: 💥 THURSDAY SPECIAL! FREE School Board Candidate Training!
body:
Don't miss out on free candidate training Wednesday May 14th! | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b0d79b9f43&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=dad499e6a4&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")

| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=732405a068&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| **CANDIDATE TRAINING ALERT: HOW TO RUN FOR YOUR SCHOOL BOARD
WEDNESDAY MAY 14th at 7:00 PM by ZOOM!
JOIN IN YOUR SWEATPANTS!**
---
|
---
| Our good friends at **OSBCC** , the **Ohio School Board Constitutional Coalition** , are holding a **FREE training session for school board candidates** next week! They asked us to help them get the word out. **PLEASE SHARE THIS WITH ANYONE & EVERYONE YOU KNOW WHO IS RUNNING OR MIGHT BE CONSIDERING RUNNING FOR SCHOOL BOARD.**

"Thinking about running for school board? Ohio School Board Constitutional Coalition ([OSBCC.org](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1037787a07&e=5c740fa3e2)) can help you run your best campaign possible! During the 2023 election cycle, **about 40% of the candidates OSBCC worked with were elected** , and they think they can help even more in 2025!

**The first training session is on Wednesday, May 14 at 7 PM via Zoom.** To get the training link and other details, **become a member of OSBCC (FREE)** by going to [https://osbcc.org/membership-application/](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=eb66aadaa5&e=5c740fa3e2) and fill out your contact information and sign the OSBCC pledge. An email will be sent out with all the training details. **Running for school board is critical to America's future, and there have never been more resources to help you get elected!"**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9095a015e8&e=5c740fa3e2)
---

He can and will do the job to secure Ohio's elections and clean up Ohio's registered voter rolls, which contrary to what you hear from our current Secretary of State, are a MESS. | | _Peter,_ For decades, my home state has been represented by two Democrats. I’ve spent enough time in Washington to know one thing: the system protects itself. And unless we change the players, nothing else changes. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate — because the 2026 election is a turning point for this country, and Michigan is ground zero. President Trump is leading the charge to take our country back. But if we don’t send him backup in the Senate, the same self-serving politicians will block his every move — just like they did before.

name: Polling via New Dems:
subject: Trump’s 100 day report card is in and it’s brutal...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Join Democrats in rejecting Trump’s agenda! >>

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107316589/544290303/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGU0NTQzYS0xODJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xKCHqYwqZVn9ZFcTPvwdug7dW_QWe0jeWpFGY7cOYO8=)
---
**Last month marked President Trump’s 100 first days in Congress and he rang it in with an dismal approval rating of 41%** – _one of the lowest in modern history._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107316590/544290304/305557911?refcode=NDCAF_20250508_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGU0NTQzYS0xODJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xKCHqYwqZVn9ZFcTPvwdug7dW_QWe0jeWpFGY7cOYO8=&emci=e4660017-852b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c0e4543a-182c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=48524772)****The numbers say it all: The American people are rejecting his MAGA agenda** – slashing Social Security, hollowing out vital federal agencies, and trampling the Constitution with reckless executive orders.

Instead of lowering costs for working families, he’s driven up prices with costly trade wars and wants to waste $90 million on a self-glorifying military parade.

**Trump isn’t governing for us, he’s governing for himself and his billionaire buddies like Elon Musk.**

Now is the time to channel this momentum into action. ---|---|---
_Post by**Jane Turner,** Board Member of the National Whistleblower Center._
The IRS has admitted a staggering statistic:
Whistleblowers who report _**wealthy tax cheats**_ wait, on average, **10 years to receive awards.**
These unacceptable delays affect whistleblowers and the average taxpayer, as tax evaders continue to exploit the system. This is just one of several issues with the IRS Whistleblower Program.
Since its inception, the program has recovered over **$6 billion** from tax evaders.
Without urgent reform, brave whistleblowers are left unprotected, and the integrity of our tax system is at risk.
_**Now is the time to act.**_
Senators Mike Crapo and Ron Wyden have released a bipartisan discussion draft of the [Taxpayer Assistance and Service Act](https://substack.com/redirect/24679443-d447-42e9-9ef6-33ace6cf3b81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which aims to fix longstanding problems with the IRS Whistleblower Program.
This long-overdue legislation offers reasonable solutions to the flaws in the IRS Whistleblower Program.
[We urge you to take action today to call for the passage of this important piece of legislation.](https://substack.com/redirect/272eb2a2-f424-43de-92c9-9570fdd9278e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
NWC Board Chairman Stephen Kohn said, _" The reforms found in this bipartisan bill are desperately needed [...] They are common-sense reforms which directly address issues plaguing the program, ensuring that tax whistleblowers can continue to root out tax cheats."_
**Raise your voice.** Urge Congress to support this much-needed legislation.
[Click here to email your representatives](https://substack.com/redirect/016904dd-c53e-4b76-b556-a06d8f285046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The form will automatically email your representatives using a template that you can change and/or modify.
Here is the template:
> Dear Senator:
> I am writing you today to urge for the passage of the recently released draft of the Taxpayer Assistance and Service Act. In particular, I urge for the passage of the whistleblower protections outlined in Title VII, Section 701-708. These protections mirror those outlined in the previous IRS Whistleblower Program Improvement Act and would redress the untenable delays that the IRS Whistleblower Office currently experiences in issuing Congressionally mandated whistleblower awards.
> The IRS has admitted that award delays average 10 years at the agency, leaving whistleblowers who have spoken out against large tax-cheats languishing for years. This is unacceptable. The passage of the Taxpayer Assistance and Service Act and the whistleblower reforms outlined therein are essential to the proper functioning of the IRS Whistleblower Program. Since its inception, this program has recouped over $6 billion in stolen funds, it is critical that we ensure this program run as efficiently as possible. Not only would the passage of this Act benefit your constituents and our neighbors in our district, but it would help whistleblowers across this nation and bolster the work they do to recoup fraudulently stolen taxpayer dollars.
> Many whistleblowers lose their jobs, their careers, and their hope for economic survival relies on their compensation promised under law. Untenable delays in award payouts essentially nullify whistleblower programs. It is essential that Congress takes action to redress these delays. I am not alone in this belief. A Marist poll from 2020 shows that 86% of voters support whistleblower protections, a belief that holds consistent across party lines and voter demographics. Additionally, 44% of voters reported they were more likely to vote for a Congressional candidate who supported strengthening whistleblower laws.
For more information on this request, please reach out to National Whistleblower Center (NWC) at programs@whistleblowers.org.

clean_body: Post by Jane Turner, Board Member of the National Whistleblower Center. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? This post is FREE and available to the public. Whistleblowers need someone they can trust to bring important news to people. I'm proud to be a source for all those who seek to bring truth forward. Upgrade your subscription today to access all breaking news and archives, and to help whistleblowers bring their stories forward safely. May 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Post byJane Turner, Board Member of the National Whistleblower Center. The IRS has admitted a staggering statistic: Whistleblowers who report wealthy tax cheats wait, on average, 10 years to receive awards. These unacceptable delays affect whistleblowers and the average taxpayer, as tax evaders continue to exploit the system. This is just one of several issues with the IRS Whistleblower Program. Since its inception, the program has recovered over $6 billion from tax evaders. Without urgent reform, brave whistleblowers are left unprotected, and the integrity of our tax system is at risk. Now is the time to act. Senators Mike Crapo and Ron Wyden have released a bipartisan discussion draft of the , which aims to fix longstanding problems with the IRS Whistleblower Program. This long-overdue legislation offers reasonable solutions to the flaws in the IRS Whistleblower Program. NWC Board Chairman Stephen Kohn said, " The reforms found in this bipartisan bill are desperately needed [...] They are common-sense reforms which directly address issues plaguing the program, ensuring that tax whistleblowers can continue to root out tax cheats." Raise your voice. Urge Congress to support this much-needed legislation. The form will automatically email your representatives using a template that you can change and/or modify. Here is the template: Dear Senator: I am writing you today to urge for the passage of the recently released draft of the Taxpayer Assistance and Service Act. In particular, I urge for the passage of the whistleblower protections outlined in Title VII, Section 701-708. These protections mirror those outlined in the previous IRS Whistleblower Program Improvement Act and would redress the untenable delays that the IRS Whistleblower Office currently experiences in issuing Congressionally mandated whistleblower awards. The IRS has admitted that award delays average 10 years at the agency, leaving whistleblowers who have spoken out against large tax-cheats languishing for years. This is unacceptable. The passage of the Taxpayer Assistance and Service Act and the whistleblower reforms outlined therein are essential to the proper functioning of the IRS Whistleblower Program. Since its inception, this program has recouped over $6 billion in stolen funds, it is critical that we ensure this program run as efficiently as possible. Not only would the passage of this Act benefit your constituents and our neighbors in our district, but it would help whistleblowers across this nation and bolster the work they do to recoup fraudulently stolen taxpayer dollars. Many whistleblowers lose their jobs, their careers, and their hope for economic survival relies on their compensation promised under law. Untenable delays in award payouts essentially nullify whistleblower programs. It is essential that Congress takes action to redress these delays. I am not alone in this belief. A Marist poll from 2020 shows that 86% of voters support whistleblower protections, a belief that holds consistent across party lines and voter demographics. Additionally, 44% of voters reported they were more likely to vote for a Congressional candidate who supported strengthening whistleblower laws. For more information on this request, please reach out to National Whistleblower Center (NWC) at programs@whistleblowers.org. | A guest post by| Advocate You 're currently a free subscriber to Mesoscale.News with Rebekah Jones. Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Patriot,

The nightmare I could have never imagined has played out since February 2023, when my hand-selected board at Project Veritas **ousted me from the organization I founded** in a small room on top of a carriage house built by my grandfather.

As you know, Project Veritas sued me, and I counter-sued**. They are now on the run**.

**I’m not seeking revenge or retribution . . . I’m seeking justice** , and [**I recently decided to tell the full, behind-the-scenes story**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GSmzAQBuCnER2MtEIICoq7ME6RyRVJk6TJLNKCdUGAhbDjPH1GjMfVlfvr0-z-6NfJDfeW6VcGcHZ2YwBMvjCAy8-bD_u7__I5f1svL_mlevMqvcKnB73CE88G6d_r918_vu3vG5ZX91X9ba7iyeN9pSd-LC3Io5tSqrvMtnKwvMyoFbqstFANh-zcWttjo5qhrGulaehBK25IEcpaCE4icy1wUFzxWpRKlLyoKt0Q4sA11cYKyUp-7CnQU3AGxRZvGMKy-MIsPpvac4zrdhx2YnDayOyBCpzJLjEJBqfJ9RTiPR93DDbNY94Hwj9uHvPNTTQbyn2fH5bJ0x79723ZgyEmuw8sgyoRT9btnsku_TuSSCHNtyAegUG_ohtnJjvfM6jQL_scmexAZaG1681Nk9sqzUo-Hh1To2sL_wMAAP__tNaT9g) of what has happened and is happening with Project Veritas and the board members behind the coup.

I’m seeking justice , and of what has happened and is happening with Project Veritas and the board members behind the coup. , you’ll be able to see the first few chapters of the legal battle unfold, but the FULL TRUTH must he told and that will take our day in court. To get there, expose the whole story and finally get my day in court. My attorney will be working incredible hours this month with five more LENGTHY depositions that will cost around $18k each. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Clear as day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream
| [](https://fight4progress.org/ossoff?t=kaqQoeHgDThR&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-05-07_1&amount=25)
---
Let me lay this out, clear as day:

I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.

And the President said he’ll back Marjorie Taylor Greene to challenge me.

This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.

_**[If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight — please split $5 between my re-election campaign and Fight for Progress today.](https://fight4progress.org/ossoff?t=u6A8VDjyjRi5&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-05-07_1&amount=5)**_
| | | [SPLIT A DONATION ](https://fight4progress.org/ossoff?t=QekraVE0JNy6&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-05-07_1&amount=5)
---
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.

Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.

More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.

Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.

I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.

I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.

**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.
* Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.

This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.

**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**

Now we must win again. And we will win again.

Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.

So I’m asking:

_**[Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Fight for Progress today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.](https://fight4progress.org/ossoff?t=tu7G9gUk6gRQ&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-05-07_1&amount=5)**_

The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.

All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
| | | [CONTRIBUTE ](https://fight4progress.org/ossoff?t=gaHRbl9Hqgwp&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-05-07_1&amount=5)
---
Thanks for being part of this team.

As always,

Jon Ossoff
* * *
| | [ ](https://fight4progress.org/wrapper?t=D4jTLEl5zx0j&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-05-07_1&amount=25)

---
Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
Fight for Progress PAC
PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003
United States
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://fight4progress.org/wrapper?t=wGTCosTpII7h&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-05-07_1&amount=25)
---
[CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY](https://fight4progress.org/wrapper?t=N236glXmRU8U&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-05-07_1&amount=25&recurring=1)
---
Emails are crucial for communicating with top members of the Fight for Progress PAC team. However, If you would prefer to receive fewer emails, [_click here_](https://fight4progress.org/l/mREvYwlctuZ4).

If you would like to stop receiving email communications from us, please [_unsubscribe here_](https://fight4progress.org/l/fxlUExbsbsl3)
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

subject: Can I count on you?

body:
| | | Patriot, When I served as an Apache pilot in the U.S. Army, my co-pilots were everything to me.

Neither of us could achieve our missions alone, and our unwavering trust in each other helped us get the job done and DEFEND America.

I may be out of the pilot’s seat, but now, I need a co-pilot for our new mission: defending our values and keeping the American Dream alive for the next generation.

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Did you see this headline?
body:
Peter, Did you see this headline? Former Senator Bob Menendez was convicted on charges of federal corruption last year. He used his elected position of trust to personally profit and undermine the interests of the
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, Did you see the headline?
---
|
---
Former Senator Bob Menendez was convicted on charges of federal corruption last year. He used his elected position of trust to personally profit and undermine the interests of the United States. He has been sentenced to serve 11 years in prison. Color me skeptical that he will actually serve that time... The state is (rightly) working to ensure he’ll never hold any such position again. But frankly, he’s not the only one who should be banned from public office for abusing their position. AG Matt Platkin waxed eloquent about his passion for holding politicians accountable for corruption, which, frankly, made me choke on my coffee. Give me a break. Platkin’s description of a high ranking politician using his office “for his own personal and financial benefit, betraying the people who elected him and the oath he swore to serve their interests and not his own” could describe the majority of Trenton and way too many electeds at the municipal level. Consider headlines like these...
* [Did Steve Fulop Win His First Election With the Help of Voter Fraud?](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/fe3b6da5190a328586ef5ccdcb6a51d9/eJyNkEFPwzAMhf9LzjVlXQdSb9M0TVW3HRCcUdS4ikeaRInbUab-dzJAO4HE1f7ee36-CEYrLddKVOKdP4piKTIRsCVPaHnjLMv2a1usysVykQlD9m0X3OBFdflVfAOu49VjeZ8Jnjwm5PlpvWnq4-51Xx-bRHoZUsb_fMri4eazPazrvZjnP42xJ96OyTuKisOA10aKUit-CSbxmtnHKs9PLfHE1GO8a12fK1IQGUeEbjDOw5ksaIrQUYgMaJKenE1j1sAaQaPx4DoYHWOALshB5Sldeo9W_byuwen7hvkTdeN5jg==)
* [Newark mayor, ex-campaign treasurer fined $30K over election law violations ](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/dd89e5820123e353403f0d876a5178f9/eJyNUE1Pg0AQ_S97ZsUC1YRb0zQNofZg9GxGmOoI7G5mB1ps-O8uanrSpMc38-Z9zFkJGjBS1CpXJ_lMklRFirEiR2hkbY1A9b1NltkiXUSqJdNs2fZO5ec_jy-Eeby8z5JIyegwUJ4eV-uy2G9fdsW-DEwHHDyu08mSu4vO5mFV7NQ0_SuMHclmCNpe5cI9zo1qCq3kmdvAfxdxPo9jg8cPZI9jZw2J5ZvKdvErEx78vANudAejZY0nXUHngN6MFkbwPSPrAxmsdXrbaDsEiG0wIGt0C0c9kG1hRj4OgcA5NPXvN0scf2JNXwZRgVA=)
* [Phil Murphy’s office using taxpayer resources to shamelessly promote wife Tammy’s US Senate bid](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/28dae1ec196bcd0838104509a1e0b959/eJyNkEFPwzAMhf9Lzg1Zsw5Eb9M0TVXHDgjOKLQujWgSy3FhZep_JwO0E0hc7e89v-eTYPDGc9WKUhz5Q-ulyARBY9GC503wbJqvrV4V-TLPxGD9647CiKI8_Sq-AOfx6qYoMsETQkIe7tebujrsnvbVoU4kGko3_udT6OuLz_ZuXe3FPP9pDM7y9i15R1EyjXBu1NrUih9pSHzPjLFUyk8YIl81wSm90IVa5ErfKgdMQWFvB-lGwn6KMnSdbUCO0foXyeaIZgKSBDGM1ECUHCRScIFBvtsOEuJckj3bVnaBkk7G1JBBpXAGEXz789kapu-I8ydD6YQD)
* [North Jersey council president charged with illegal gambling, racketeering](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/3a81578725e56b6781aba70a9c897368/eJyNkMFOwzAQRP_F56ROnYRAblVVVVFKDwjOyHJWjZvUttYbQqjy77iAQEhF4rozO_tmz4zASENVw0r2Sm9CpCxiCEo7DYbW1pBUH6rIs2W6jFivTbdFOzhWnq8ufxsu47zIbiJGk4NgeXxYretqv33eVfs6OJ3EcON_OZn4ydncr6odm-c_g-GkafMSsj0rCQe4NGp0aEVP2Ad_S-R8yfk4jgtjkdojoIdpoeyJe7I4cQOj5056L7XiDq13YTkOwB0Xich5kvHk7rcQm2Os7GCU7mOH4HUTAGLVSjxAE6NUHRAAanPgt2myLPJUJEnBA650Dkzz9esapk_o-R0UwIkr)

Need I say more? Which politicians do you believe should be banned from office for life? Reply to this email and let me know your thoughts. **What can WE do about it? Vote. Vote in the June 10th primary. And vote EARLY.** The only way to kick out the lemons in both parties is to make our voices heard at any and every opportunity.
---
[ **I pledge to vote in the June 10th Primary!** ](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/08388e33e8c7885f136a66a633fd3c86/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnEXxq8KbiIhoHqLOITrQku4u65iZ-N9bKzwVdJ153md4ZwJCXnJKawjgTg_HccEAhRWTDDlFglNZvbaO79mubUDD-DVRopcQTF_DK7CM_a23M4BGiRo5HsIoS4vknKdFpklZKn3jP4_nbFZPvA_THOb5pxhbRvFNuzsISPW4NKqZbkUn1Wj-QiS7wLKGYTAFxwa7rsFWcLMSraX7WtpRSom8_jwgw_Ftmp9IemPM)
---
Finally, I want to invite you to send a message to Governor Murphy and your legislators on two critical issues. We’re partnered with our friends at Americans for Prosperity and Jersey 1st!
1. Stop the Sticker Shock! Tell your officials to STOP $28/Mo Electricity Rate Hikes. [Go here >>](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/a338c7cce7826bfd3bb82fd59adc2842/eJyNkEFPwzAMhf-Lz83KuhWk3qZpmqqOISE4o5CmrVmbRLGHKFP_Ox5MO4HELY6fv-fnE7B12nFZQwEf_JllC0ggWoMBreO1d6zNdzfLl_PFPIEe3WEb_TFAcfp1-Co4f-d3-U0CPAYrkqfH1boq99uXXbmvRBl0FI__cZbZ7ZWzuV-VO5imP8F2QN68C5ug4Hi050Q1Sip-jr3oO-ZARZrqwUY02lHjY4iegpQ8ziSxkeE4M35ILyd4aBo0qHtKiX1Q3FlFnTcH1WDbsXrV8tStRkes3JsiFZHQtcr24iomwlXGk2yUgA7BuvoCruz4s-T0BW5jhy4=)
2. Demand the Governor and Legislature exercise fiscal restraint and stop excessive spending in the state budget. [Go here >>](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/15dd86fbac904374a8c75eb4b43a94f6/eJyNkE9rwkAQxb_LnBODq7GQm4hIiH9A2nNZNhMcTXaX3VGMku_esRVPLRTmsjO_9x5v78BoteWyhgKufFNqAgkENOQJLS-cZW2-ryqfjifjBFqyp1VwZw_F_VfxC3is87dcJcC9R0He9_NFVW5Xn-tyWwnpdZCM__lM1ezls9zMyzUMw5_G2BEvL-IdoeBwxkejmqQVf4RW-AOzj0WW6Q4DGW1j44IPLnp5cj-SxkbEYWRclz2_YNc0ZEi3MYu6T61LWUZf0wOdMNpjqiRWe4-2fgoq7H_Chy9jCHd6)

Thank you for making your voice heard on these Common Sense priorities! Let’s go! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
---

Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line) Mailing Address: Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen. Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Shining a spotlight on the Trump administration’s attacks on our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8554%2E5257348%2EJBdGC4 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

As the minority party in the Senate, Democrats aren’t able to call formal
hearings or issue subpoenas to investigate Donald Trump.

That being said, there are other ways to hold him accountable. We have
tools at our disposal that we can use to shed light on their corruption
and attacks on our democracy.

And you better believe I’m going to use all of them.

One of those tools is what’s known as a “shadow hearing” — which is
essentially an unofficial hearing that we can hold to question individuals
willing to testify about the Trump administration’s abuses of power.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250508_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8554%2E5257348%2EJBdGC4 ]Politico: Democrats plan 'shadow hearing' to question lawyers pressured
by Trump administration

Alongside a few of my colleagues, including Congressman Jamie Raskin, I
held a hearing last month during which we heard testimony from former
Department of Justice employees who refused to be intimidated by Donald
Trump’s threats.

Their testimony highlighted what we’ve known to be true for quite some
time: Donald Trump is trying to remake the Department of Justice in his
image, threatening and firing career attorneys who refuse to go along with
his attacks on the rule of law and replacing them with extreme loyalists
who are willing to bend to his will.

Despite what Donald Trump may think, the lawyers at the Department of
Justice are not his personal lawyers. They are the people’s lawyers tasked
with defending the Constitution, upholding the rule of law, and protecting
our democracy.

We’re living in unprecedented times,
Derek. Trump is working to turn
the Justice Department into another political arm of his administration —
and Republicans are dead silent as he chips away at our democracy every
single day.

Republicans may refuse to speak up against his lawless actions, but my
colleagues and I will continue to hold shadow hearings and utilize all the
other tools at our disposal to hold his administration accountable and
defend the Constitution.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250508_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8554%2E5257348%2EJBdGC4 ]I will never stop seeking the truth and pursuing accountability for
this corrupt administration. If you agree, pitch in today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Tell Congress: Protect the Veterans Crisis Hotline.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Lost in the chaos (but not to us) is the incredible damage Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and DOGE are doing to the Department of Veterans Affairs.
#
Lost in the chaos (but not to us) is the incredible damage Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and DOGE are doing to the Department of Veterans Affairs.
Take just one instance — the Veterans Crisis Hotline.
DOGE laid off nearly 1000 workers at the VA early on in its efforts, including those who handled the hotline, ended remote work for others, and froze hiring for new employees.
Many of the sudden personnel moves had to be reversed, causing mass confusion. Further, the “return to work” directive caused therapists to hold remote sessions with Veterans in non-private spaces, and warn Veterans that their privacy could not be guaranteed.
It's a disgrace.
The good news, Tammy Duckworth is introducing legislation to "protect the Veterans Crisis Line, its workers and the Veterans it serves against the Trump Administration’s ongoing attacks against the VA."
We're asking for your help in getting it passed:
[**Please tell Congress to pass Tammy Duckworth's legislation to protect the Veterans Crisis line. This should have bipartisan support, but you never know these days. So please make your voice heard.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250508_vv_em_crisis_hotline/?source=em250508-1-30&akid=34400%2E3013755%2EYeCzyt)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250508_vv_em_crisis_hotline/?source=em250508-1-30&akid=34400%2E3013755%2EYeCzyt)
---
Here's Senator Duckworth talking about the bill on CNN:
[](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250508_vv_em_crisis_hotline/?source=em250508-1-30&akid=34400%2E3013755%2EYeCzyt)
[**Please tell Congress to pass Tammy Duckworth's legislation to protect the Veterans Crisis line. This should have bipartisan support, but you never know these days. So please make your voice heard.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250508_vv_em_crisis_hotline/?source=em250508-1-30&akid=34400%2E3013755%2EYeCzyt)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250508_vv_em_crisis_hotline/?source=em250508-1-30&akid=34400%2E3013755%2EYeCzyt)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

subject: Urgent: Left-Wing Groups Attack Florida’s Election Integrity Law!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF FLORIDA
body:
Fellow Conservative, Florida Republicans passed a critical law to safeguard our ballot amendment process, ensuring fair and secure elections. But the Left is fighting back—hard. Well-funded, out-of-state liberal groups, backed by shady donors, have launched an aggressive legal assault to dismantle this vital election integrity law. |
---
[
](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5705d36df7044137bcb04be0a328b8de&_e=CabmqD_dHrNbkPfRX6vFhnSmTIK2uiLGZjMmAm1g85buKXC-BR6pWaVTtDob8HjakRexfHPrdr4pFvJzBdglx87NZ9mTjpeWSAhKhIe4YOEopkFGuNWD433jFqQ5dF6nBth1_B0e5Cu1IJ3X61X7thNX-GHOVxEjNoNwPQbQeKjHmUgT2aMhAaS2VEEmuWlCeia7MDWeeN-8kqlurAys-xQBAYyKn8nEIjeeyENYxuVcQI-vBQa3lSxF7_bgHXbrS3CrV8P45NubU7xO2ph-AjxflRWI4Uiuo1KEtCxZklTXMygmKCPOWO7lxtMyKe7ZayIY3QIePh_LydVf4axDltVR2nk-Z1pxfNCVpF2SAsF2JjPqJEP7mDjUa0FD293bTobXV9i45VWOnact4tTSa2WE2sYLMytuGS4qeI8OTej7Qs8l9PayhKdJCDtypB6R)
Fellow Conservative,

Florida Republicans passed a critical law to safeguard our ballot amendment process, ensuring fair and secure elections. But the Left is fighting back--_**hard.**_

[**Well -funded, out-of-state liberal groups, backed by shady donors, have launched an aggressive legal assault to dismantle this vital election integrity law. They want to flood our state with chaos and undermine your vote.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5705d36df7044137bcb04be0a328b8de&_e=CabmqD_dHrNbkPfRX6vFhnSmTIK2uiLGZjMmAm1g85buKXC-BR6pWaVTtDob8HjakRexfHPrdr4pFvJzBdglx87NZ9mTjpeWSAhKhIe4YOEopkFGuNWD433jFqQ5dF6nBth1_B0e5Cu1IJ3X61X7thNX-GHOVxEjNoNwPQbQeKjHmUgT2aMhAaS2VEEmuWlCeia7MDWeeN-8kqlurAys-xQBAYyKn8nEIjeeyENYxuVcQI-vBQa3lSxF7_bgHXbrS3CrV8P45NubU7xO2ph-AjxflRWI4Uiuo1KEtCxZklRFvgqL1eCjTc2h5uG_QipF9sx_Afgr9tCuzYSb_tnQCWmVrZzeuWDpMdUaccnZef1aCm6ZHr8KfRwW7n6kF86G2Lw2jTECpYo_0tycjmy01oOogj7snFllBTaJn54kEzwAjKz3Zu47GttUQf_FAkgd)

**Fellow Conservative, here is what this law ensures, plain and simple:**

**> > Only U.S. citizens** may collect petition signatures

**> >** Petition gatherers must be **Florida residents** and pass a **background check**

**> >** Petitions must be returned in a timely manner to **prevent fraud and abuse**

[**Defend Election Integrity**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5705d36df7044137bcb04be0a328b8de&_e=CabmqD_dHrNbkPfRX6vFhnSmTIK2uiLGZjMmAm1g85buKXC-BR6pWaVTtDob8HjakRexfHPrdr4pFvJzBdglx87NZ9mTjpeWSAhKhIe4YOEopkFGuNWD433jFqQ5dF6nBth1_B0e5Cu1IJ3X61X7thNX-GHOVxEjNoNwPQbQeKjHmUgT2aMhAaS2VEEmuWlCeia7MDWeeN-8kqlurAys-xQBAYyKn8nEIjeeyENYxuVcQI-vBQa3lSxF7_bgHXbrS3CrV8P45NubU7xO2ph-AjxflRWI4Uiuo1KEtCxZklQePrKeuSocCigKgLDWDLKXs4obVzNEduAUv5Tu0daHEo4BpIiJNze2RYZYz6bTQYz2DUXiAXeEz_nhHSDXXWU1a9SgGlBGAkuA-Fia9al1f1y7413c5r6g-er326EaOnXPjMIc71DBFbHetQ8eUE7d)
**These common -sense measures strengthen our democracy. Yet, the Left is desperate to stop them.** We refuse to be bullied by their baseless lawsuits. We will defend Florida's Constitution, protect our elections, and stand up for **YOU.**

_**We will not back down.

We will fight.

But we need your help.

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, Florida Republicans passed a critical law to safeguard our ballot amendment process, ensuring fair and secure elections. But the Left is fighting back—hard. Well-funded, out-of-state liberal groups, backed by shady donors, have launched an aggressive legal assault to dismantle this vital election integrity law. | Fellow Conservative, Florida Republicans passed a critical law to safeguard our ballot amendment process, ensuring fair and secure elections. But the Left is fighting back--hard. Fellow Conservative, here is what this law ensures, plain and simple: > Only U.S. citizens may collect petition signatures > Petition gatherers must be Florida residents and pass a background check > Petitions must be returned in a timely manner to prevent fraud and abuse These common -sense measures strengthen our democracy. Yet, the Left is desperate to stop them. We refuse to be bullied by their baseless lawsuits. We will defend Florida's Constitution, protect our elections, and stand up for YOU. We will not back down. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: The Palestinian people will remain in Gaza
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Trump and Netanyahu’s proposed plan to forcibly relocate Palestinians and have the US occupy Gaza is morally repugnant and despicable. It’s ethnic cleansing
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1629%2E791427%2EYnHC6k)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-gaza/?source=em250508-1-180&akid=1629%2E791427%2EYnHC6k)
**Friend — The Palestinian people will remain in Gaza.**
Trump is once again pushing his proposal for the US to occupy Gaza and forcefully expel the Palestinians living there, while Israel continues its deadly 18 month bombardment of the strip.
To be clear, Trump’s plan would be a world-historic war crime. It’s ethnic cleansing, plain and simple.
But beyond that, this plan has no support among the international community, and I am confident that it will get no support from the American public.
Americans don’t want to see our troops sent to fight and die in another indefinite occupation in the Middle East, and certainly not for the sole reason of appeasing far-right leaders in the Israeli government and violent settlers who have played the biggest role in blocking any potential for peace in Israel and Palestine.
**The Palestinian people have called this land home long before the events of the last two years, and long before 1948. The Palestinian people will remain in Gaza.**
It’s now the responsibility of anyone who believes in dignity and freedom for Palestinians; anyone who believes in the need for international law; anyone who opposes hatred and violence, to make their voice heard.
**[Add your name to our petition telling Congress to hold the line on Gaza and block Trump’s plan. Our leaders shouldn’t sit back while Trump helps Netanyahu carry out ethnic cleansing.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-gaza/?source=em250508-1-180&akid=1629%2E791427%2EYnHC6k)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-gaza/?source=em250508-1-180&akid=1629%2E791427%2EYnHC6k)**
Donald Trump’s proposals would be a disaster for human rights and the promise of peace in Palestine. We must oppose it with everything we have.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1629%2E791427%2EYnHC6k)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1629%2E791427%2EYnHC6k)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1629%2E791427%2EYnHC6k)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1629_791427_YnHC6k&akid=1629%2E791427%2EYnHC6k)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: I'm running to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do—and spend—whatever it takes to defeat us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_tc?refcode=X_250508_trishalaunch_spl_tc_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_tc?refcode=X_250508_trishalaunch_spl_tc_act]
Friend, my name is Trisha Calvarese (D), and Michael let me know I could reach out. I just launched my campaign for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert (R), flip the House blue and stand up for working families in my hometown.
In a second, I want to tell you a little more about myself and why I’m in this race. But first, I need you to know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to take back the House. So if you’re ready to join our movement, please split $25 or more now between my campaign and Michael to defeat Boebert and build a better future for Colorado. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_tc?refcode=X_250508_trishalaunch_spl_tc_act]
My story begins in the rural Eastern Plains. My dad was a dedicated civil servant, and my mom was a child-care provider. From the beginning, they’ve been my models of what servant leadership means.
When they both became terminally ill with cancer less than two years ago, I returned home to provide end-of-life care for them. It was the toughest thing I’ve ever done.
It opened my eyes to how broken our systems are—and I couldn’t believe that our members of Congress weren’t doing more to fix them. So that’s what I’m doing: I’m running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in my hometown.
That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means creating good-paying jobs and opportunities right here at home.
I know the road ahead won’t be easy. Lauren Boebert is bought and paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do—and spend—whatever it takes to defeat us. But if there’s anything I’ve learned from growing up in Colorado, it’s this: There are things money can’t buy, greed can’t steal, and corruption can’t crush. It's us. We the people. This is our seat.
So, friend, I’m asking you to join our movement today: Will you please split $25 between my campaign and Michael's to defeat Lauren Boebert, take back the House for Democrats and give working families the voice they deserve in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_tc?refcode=X_250508_trishalaunch_spl_tc_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_tc?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_250508_trishalaunch_spl_tc_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_tc?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_250508_trishalaunch_spl_tc_act]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_tc?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=X_250508_trishalaunch_spl_tc_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_tc?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_250508_trishalaunch_spl_tc_act]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_tc?express_lane=true&refcode=X_250508_trishalaunch_spl_tc_act]
Thank you for your early support. There’s a lot of work ahead of us, but I’m so grateful to have you by my side. Together, I know we can win this thing.
Trisha Calvarese

It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means creating good-paying jobs and opportunities right here at home. I know the road ahead won’t be easy. Lauren Boebert is bought and paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do—and spend—whatever it takes to defeat us. But if there’s anything I’ve learned from growing up in Colorado, it’s this: There are things money can’t buy, greed can’t steal, and corruption can’t crush. It's us. We the people. This is our seat. So, friend, I’m asking you to join our movement today: Will you please split $25 between my campaign and Michael's to defeat Lauren Boebert, take back the House for Democrats and give working families the voice they deserve in Congress? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you for your early support. There’s a lot of work ahead of us, but I’m so grateful to have you by my side. Together, I know we can win this thing. Trisha Calvarese [] [] [] Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore. CLICK HERE TO RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS FROM OUR CAMPAIGN [] By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Senator Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: Announcing the launch of ModSquad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We need to uplift Democratic leaders who know how to deliver real results for the American people.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.F6evSA&refcode=em250508-1&refcode2=2280.135344._zR3o7&t=2&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)
---
Senator Catherine Cortez Masto here.
Right now, Donald Trump is throwing our country into chaos. The cost of living is skyrocketing, hardworking middle class families are being outrageously taxed from Trump’s trade war, and even basic health care services are at risk.
The American people are suffering. They want real solutions and sensible, commonsense governance and leadership. And if the Democratic Party is ever going to regain power in Washington, we need to support candidates who will provide it.
**That’s why today, I’m proud to help launch ModSquad for the 2026 election cycle — and join the ModSquad team as honorary chair.**
[**ModSquad is an organization dedicated to a simple mission: electing Democratic Senators who fight for hardworking families, lead with common sense, and deliver real results for their communities. If that’s a mission you’re on board with, please split a donation between ModSquad and Elissa Slotkin today →](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.F6evSA&refcode=em250508-1&t=3&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Elissa Slotkin and ModSquad instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.4mZ1pB&amount=5&refcode=em250508-1&t=22&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.Gq44lH&refcode=em250508-1&t=23&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.5unTaz&refcode=em250508-1&t=24&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.TzBQ83&refcode=em250508-1&t=25&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.O5J7sR&refcode=em250508-1&t=26&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.4mZ1pB&refcode=em250508-1&t=27&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
These next elections are the best chance Democrats will have to prevent Trump's attacks on working families from succeeding. **And I’m determined to win them.**
That means investing in leaders who understand the needs of American families, who are going to provide common sense solutions to the problems that Americans are facing, who are standing up to extremism and putting people over politics every single day.
**Moderate, commonsense Democrats are the only group that really overperformed in the 2024 election, and that’s our path forward. People want decency and real, workable ideas.**
ModSquad is committed to showing the American people that Democrats are listening to and responding to their needs. And I strongly believe that when Americans are better able to hear and understand the work that Democrats are doing in the Senate, we can and will win back the majority in Congress.
[**If our mission resonates with you, please, chip in $5 or any amount you can to ModSquad and Elissa Slotkin and become a founding member of our grassroots movement. Every dollar helps us elect Democrats who will fight — and deliver — for the American people:](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.F6evSA&refcode=em250508-1&t=28&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Elissa Slotkin and ModSquad instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.4mZ1pB&amount=5&refcode=em250508-1&t=47&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.Gq44lH&refcode=em250508-1&t=48&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.5unTaz&refcode=em250508-1&t=49&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.TzBQ83&refcode=em250508-1&t=50&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.O5J7sR&refcode=em250508-1&t=51&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.4mZ1pB&refcode=em250508-1&t=52&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
My home state of Nevada is one of the few states where both Donald Trump and a Democrat — my good friend Jacky Rosen — won in the last election. **To me, that represents where our country is as a whole — not locked in on a party, but looking for leaders who understand their lives and offer real solutions.**
I’ve won three tough statewide elections in Nevada by doing just that: showing up, listening, and focusing on what matters most to working families — lowering costs, keeping communities safe, and making government work like it should.
That’s what ModSquad is all about. We know that Democrats are fighting for the right things — lowering costs, expanding health care, and building up the middle class — and there are leaders in the Senate who are doing that work in real, pragmatic ways.
ModSquad is about lifting up those voices and amplifying the real work Democrats are doing here in the Senate to improve the lives of working families.**Together, we‘re working to better fulfill the Democratic Party’s promise to improve life for hardworking families across the country.**
[**So What do you say? Can I count on you to chip in today and help ModSquad fight for common sense policies, back strong Democratic leaders, and keep fighting for working families across the country?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.F6evSA&refcode=em250508-1&t=53&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Elissa Slotkin and ModSquad instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.4mZ1pB&amount=5&refcode=em250508-1&t=72&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.Gq44lH&refcode=em250508-1&t=73&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.5unTaz&refcode=em250508-1&t=74&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.TzBQ83&refcode=em250508-1&t=75&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.O5J7sR&refcode=em250508-1&t=76&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-masto-split.4mZ1pB&refcode=em250508-1&t=77&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7)**
---
****
_¡La lucha sigue!_ Thank you for joining the fight.
Catherine Cortez Masto
_Honorary Chair
ModSquad_

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=78&akid=2280%2E135344%2E_zR3o7).

Solicitations made by Elissa Slotkin are limited by Federal law. As a Federal candidates and officeholder she is soliciting only donations of up to $3300 per election from individuals and up to $5000 per election from multi-candidate political committees. She are not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labororganizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks.

name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Don't air Trump propaganda on Voice of America!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don’t poison Voice of America by airing pro-Trump propaganda](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2fae697a-30b9-4a8c-9cf7-528198ec6b88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18e866bb-b1a1-457e-b09d-f696e22e2a06/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Voice of America began broadcasting as a way to combat Nazi propaganda during WW2, and has been a powerful means of fighting lies from authoritarian regimes in the decades since. **But it is about to start broadcasting such propaganda itself — in support of authoritarian wannabe Donald Trump. **It will come from the right-wing, Trump-loving "One America News" (OAN), which will now be providing content for VoA (according to an [announcement](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e0bff48-68a6-4412-824a-03a5dc994191/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) from Kari Lake). We cannot allow this to happen. VoA cannot become a megaphone for drowning the world in conspiracy theories, right-wing extremism, and toxic Trumpian stupidity. [**Add your name, and demand that Voice of America reverse this, and not air OAN content.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0cf62745-64fc-4d0c-b2c3-3aee4b1861d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9d53a05-37fb-4785-9df4-fa1b341e621f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - Got a progressive cause or organization you want to promote? [Become a Left Action sponsor](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7305d8d8-aa65-45d9-b78f-51dd302094f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3685123b-6d8a-4c8f-a7c2-b520f7e54309/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8fbbf9f-d000-4c6a-b6ed-9d659ba04abc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3fa241d-9aef-4d89-bc0c-eb05011c5dc2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbaa5c71f-5a8d-4242-9e5f-67994fd302d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

### Join Mayor Shaunna O'Connell & Larry Quintal on the campaign trail
We're going door knocking on Saturday @ 1:00PM
---
---
| Friend,
Please, join Mayor Shaunna O'Connell & Larry Quintal for State Rep this Saturday to hit the pavement & meet the voters in Taunton & Easton.
Door Knocking for Larry Quintal for State Rep w/ Mayor Shaunna O'Connell Saturday, May 10th @ 1:00PM 📍 Meet-Up Location: 80 Broadway, Taunton
Whether you're a seasoned campaigner or new to canvassing, your support will make a huge difference.
Every door we knock for Larry brings us closer to flipping this seat red on June 10th and sending a message to the Beacon Hill insiders: the people are taking their voice back.
Mayor O'Connell & Larry will provide all the materials and training -- just bring your walking shoes and Republican spirit!
See you then, MassGOP Field Team

name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: Early Voting, Daisy Art Parade, Pancake Breakfast, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul
https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA [https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA] https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul [https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul] https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en]
Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
P.O. Box 13842
Roanoke, VA 24037
United States

**[They're being blocked, filtered, or sent straight to spam -- all because Big Tech HATES the GOP.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/EbWLf02dOGrtuVg2p7OZj48GZRIT01GeTiA_21x7KwDtTYwmawEpyU_8PP9t-xB24iZ7JoMfweAc0K0PPGFy1Iab4gFzWdg4MAv9yDHoLs47AGbZs3_dspbPLx8niI3lxVVmiHpGjhh46E9MoC8tHjJBv-NhaM3Utf_qUzjQg2CCBDNGI-nj6wxe8zkwgoAbS8Jb8_VUYtHjTYfo1BI2RLELVfOsMhfDuo29qRYB722whsYrFXXEgAbK9pGXZb1RD-Ef4HL1OZPEfK2HmsabsfRQbgSnh55jSFnJ2GuQZJKr6O7XZWbPKtuJrxj1qL0LsWn2s0jhlrcssbcdWBgm86I_dqVimdiRhnaT-ae6PWdsMwEquvVnQ9cWXRRNIkAxbVONHLSFmADrZwwGE0dp4tDBpV3xmKfc4ULnXXzeuMKKZRZ6pQ8DiPyRvWdcMgBRTHxJoZ-_-k7T4sxj_Ng7Whr_XrOAtX1X0aa2W7TPIRBNCeJAKsfVda4GWw_Y2gO-MdwKGVuRWnjuIK1eAdTmNqWSwbySIFrKIMTj89z-4YJHlGI7VpxX6vW6zJ1SrUqWsnrf5VnBXi698I9iUETHNWYroZrWznSY/J2rqlAXodASSGot2dW7QfOEm3sKLIzdi/8)**

So, if you're reading this, it means you're one of the few who slipped through their dragnet.
