We hold the trifecta. _This is our time to go on the_ _**_OFFENSIVE_**_** _! _** And I plan on doing just that in one of the biggest battleground states in the country... **Georgia Democrat Jon Ossoff represents one of our BEST chances to****FLIP****a Senate seat and EXPAND President Trump 's majority. ** Ossoff is openly running on a promise to **IMPEACH** the President the minute the Left regains control of Congress - _and he 's promising that to a state President Trump _**_WON_** _over Kamala Harris! _ So, will you join me in taking the fight _directly_ to the Democrats in Georgia where they're most vulnerable? **[Please make a grassroots contribution to help us FLIP Georgia's Senate seat and EXPAND President Trump's majority.](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MjE0NTQxMDEsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MTI4LTMxNjYzOGI1YjU1NDRlNjA4MmVkM2VmYTJjNTA2MzEwIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVkLWNydXovcGdfZV9nYS1ub21pbmVlLWZ1bmQtNWhkXzIwMjUwNTA4X2Ffb3RoZXI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9HQS1Ob21pbmVlLUZ1bmRfMjAyNTA1MDgmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1HQS1Ob21pbmVlLUZ1bmQmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NTQmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/V3tS0XMst3f9aRNCiPDYIg) ** Thank you, Ted Cruz

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: My new leadership position
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I want you to hear the big news directly from me.
| **__A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik on her New Leadership Position__**
---
Peter,
---
I just received the honor of being appointed to the position of Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership for the 119th Congress!
---
**This position has been used by prior Republican House leadership teams to deliver for the American people in critical moments for our country, such as the 1994 Contract with America and the 2010 Tea Party wave election.**
---
_I look forward to picking up the baton to help guide our House GOP Majority through another such moment as we execute on the mandate from the American people to pass the President’s America First agenda._
---
We’re truly on the brink of ushering in a new “Golden Age” for our country!
---
But at such a critical moment, with the very fate of America on the line, advancing the President’s agenda won’t be my only responsibility...
---
**_...he’s also entrusted me with using this new position in House Republican Leadership to protect our razor-thin majority._**
---
We simply cannot let the Democrats FLIP the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again!
---
_With the Left preparing to spend BILLIONS against us in the midterms, I have no choice but to do everything in my power to close the gap on their record-breaking war chest as quickly as possible._
---
**That is why, in my capacity as the _NEW_ Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I immediately authorized a 500% MATCH on all gifts for the next hour to help us kick off my first 24 hours in this new role with our biggest fundraising surge of the year! **
---
_If (and only if) you’re in the position to do so, I ask that you give any amount you can afford to take advantage of this match._
---

clean_body: I want you to hear the big news directly from me. | A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik on her New Leadership Position Peter, I just received the honor of being appointed to the position of Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership for the 119th Congress! This position has been used by prior Republican House leadership teams to deliver for the American people in critical moments for our country, such as the 1994 Contract with America and the 2010 Tea Party wave election. I look forward to picking up the baton to help guide our House GOP Majority through another such moment as we execute on the mandate from the American people to pass the President’s America First agenda. We’re truly on the brink of ushering in a new “Golden Age” for our country! But at such a critical moment, with the very fate of America on the line, advancing the President’s agenda won’t be my only responsibility... ...he’s also entrusted me with using this new position in House Republican Leadership to protect our razor-thin majority. We simply cannot let the Democrats FLIP the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again! With the Left preparing to spend BILLIONS against us in the midterms, I have no choice but to do everything in my power to close the gap on their record-breaking war chest as quickly as possible. That is why, in my capacity as the NEW Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I immediately authorized a 500% MATCH on all gifts for the next hour to help us kick off my first 24 hours in this new role with our biggest fundraising surge of the year! If (and only if) you’re in the position to do so, I ask that you give any amount you can afford to take advantage of this match. Thank you and God Bless, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |

name: House Republican DOGE Team [via Team Scalise]
subject: They want to keep the gravy train rolling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Democrats are using every trick in the book to undermine DOGE's mission and keep the gravy train rolling.

| |
---
| | | There's no use in beating around the bush when your hard-earned money is on the line.

**Thanks to the Democrats, honest taxpayers like you have unknowingly footed the bill for transgender animal experiments and hormone therapies in Guatemala _(we 're not kidding)..._**

But President Trump, Elon Musk, and the DOGE team are leading the charge to root out waste, fraud, and abuse in our government.

House Republicans are working in lockstep to help them change the course of our country and put more money back in YOUR wallet.

That's where our survey comes in. All of these cuts concern YOUR tax dollars. So it's incredibly important to know where you stand on DOGE's massive cuts, their work so far, and what other cuts you want to see, if any.

**[Will you take just five minutes to answer a few questions?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zprrbodfhrhcf4svfn3kr0veegej4l93lt7kb9dg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctj62ob4cth2bs "Will you take just five minutes to answer a few questions?") **
---
| | | [ACCESS OUR DOGE SURVEY HERE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7i2d6ja30adoku89mj7ndrirdh368b7d4r1p688_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctj62ob4cth2bs "ACCESS OUR DOGE SURVEY HERE")
---
Here's the bottom line:

**If we don't help get this across the finish line, no one else will. Democrats are using every trick in the book to undermine DOGE's mission and keep the gravy train rolling.**

It's absolutely critical we get the job done while Republicans hold the House, Senate, and White House. Otherwise, unelected bureaucrats, special interest groups, and the Deep State will win and the American People will lose.

Your input will help inform our next steps and make sure House Republicans do what it takes to further DOGE's impact and mission.

**[So please: We're humbly asking you to carve out some of your time to give us your HONEST feedback about DOGE and give your input on what we should do next.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbskqtre1g3vgmjmgcb7rd1555e9h1ou3rcdqo38_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctj62ob4cth2bs "So please: We’re humbly asking you to carve out some of your time to give us your HONEST feedback about DOGE and give your input on what we should do next.")**

---
Thank you,

House Republican DOGE Team
_via Team Scalise_

---
| |
* * *
---
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration
\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_

**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**

name: Team Rosen
subject: Do you stand with ActBlue against Trump's attacks?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Trump is trying to take away ANY power we have to make a difference
| | |
---
Friend: Donald Trump just ordered a baseless investigation into ActBlue – all in a desperate attempt to silence the voices of grassroots donors like _you_.
Why? Because Trump is scared of our grassroots power. He knows that supporters like you are **KEY** to defeating the GOP’s megadonors and billionaire allies.
**That's why we need 5,000 members of this team to join us in speaking out before midnight, and we're counting on you to add your name:**** [Will you please sign our petition now to stand with ActBlue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107327782/544324733/-1060309725?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5522-su-nd&refcode=jtk5522-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3YzllMC0yNjJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKyYAmfGD_EEnjT4mEKB-x6lNaxufZL52v5laP59gds=&emci=5fa1c510-6f2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=deb7c9e0-262c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=3800590)**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107327784/544324735/-1060309725?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5522-su-nd&refcode=jtk5522-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3YzllMC0yNjJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKyYAmfGD_EEnjT4mEKB-x6lNaxufZL52v5laP59gds=&emci=5fa1c510-6f2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=deb7c9e0-262c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=3800590)
---
Make no mistake: The ONLY reason Trump is targeting ActBlue is because it's been behind so many Democratic victories like ours in Nevada and others across the country.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: green chile chicken posole
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Cooking has always been a way for me to foster connection and build community.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1816%2E400544%2El1cPBB)
Hey — it's Deb.
One thing you should know about me is that **I love to cook.**
My love of cooking New Mexican cuisine started early, thanks to the hours I spent watching my grandmother bake bread in her mud oven and stir huge pots of posole. She wouldn’t let us kids in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours. I still hold those memories close as I prepare my favorite traditional New Mexican dishes.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250508_1_posole?amount=5&refcode=em20250508-1816&refcode2=1816_400544_l1cPBB&akid=1816%2E400544%2El1cPBB)_New Mexico chiles – the best in the world!_
**There’s something powerful about connecting with others over a home cooked meal.** When I was in law school at UNM, I’d make chicken green chile stew for student gatherings, and I made that same dish for my Congressional colleagues during the 2019 winter holiday season. I even cooked chile and tortillas for the water protectors when I traveled to Standing Rock during the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline.
Cooking became more than a hobby after I decided to start my own salsa business. I worked out of a commercial kitchen and bought my red chile pequin from a farm in northern New Mexico. I’d prepare my salsa and deliver jars to mom-and-pop shops across the state, often with Somáh riding with me in the back seat.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250508_1_posole?amount=5&refcode=em20250508-1816&refcode2=1816_400544_l1cPBB&akid=1816%2E400544%2El1cPBB)_Here’s Somáh posing with jars of my homemade salsa. Kids in New Mexico start early... 🌶️_
**For me, cooking has always been a way to foster connection and build community, which is exactly what we’re doing now as we grow our campaign for New Mexico.** I’ve had the chance to sit down with New Mexicans in living rooms and at kitchen tables to hear about their lives, their struggles, and their hopes for the future. Every conversation is another reminder of the incredibly high stakes in this race – and proof that if we organize around our shared values, we will win.
**[Will you donate $5 to power our grassroots campaign? If you donate through this link today, I’ll even send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250508_1_posole?amount=5&refcode=em20250508-1816&refcode2=1816_400544_l1cPBB&akid=1816%2E400544%2El1cPBB)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250508_1_posole?amount=5&refcode=em20250508-1816&refcode2=1816_400544_l1cPBB&akid=1816%2E400544%2El1cPBB)**
Happy cooking,
Deb 🌶️
P.S. Throughout my life, cooking has helped me bring my community together – and bringing people together is exactly how we’ll win this campaign. [**If you make a donation of any amount through this link today, I’ll be sure to send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole so you can cook it for your friends and family.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250508_1_posole?amount=5&refcode=em20250508-1816&refcode2=1816_400544_l1cPBB&akid=1816%2E400544%2El1cPBB)
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=2&akid=1816%2E400544%2El1cPBB)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=3&akid=1816%2E400544%2El1cPBB)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Democrats.org
subject: Four of the most vulnerable House Republicans
body:
---
Derek, take a look at these names: **Tom Barrett (MI-07)
Don Bacon (NE-02)
Mike Lawler (NY-17)
Brian Fitzpatrick (PA-01) ** These are four Republicans who are poised to once again vote to rip away health care access from their constituents. And they’re four of the most vulnerable House Republicans, representing districts that could very well flip in 2026. **So we’ve put them on notice.** We’ve launched a pressure campaign to get these representatives to listen to their constituents and vote against Trump’s budget bill and their party’s dangerous cuts to Medicaid. We’ll be applying pressure at events like town halls, online, and on the phone as we work to get as many constituents as possible to contact their representatives and urge them to do the right thing. **[Work like this is only possible with your help, Derek. With Medicaid on the line, will you pitch in $3 now to help fund the DNC’s work to protect health care for millions of Americans?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250508_3369_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3383_22930333_cmpfTc&akid=3383%2E22930333%2EcmpfTc)**

name: House GOP Investigates
subject: USAID's most egregious boondoggles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
DOGE is already saving America BILLIONS!

|
---
| | |
The waste and abuse are finally being exposed. **Elon Musk's DOGE has blown the lid off USAID's most egregious boondoggles, and it's worse than we thought.**

Here are just a few of the outrageous programs that USAID and our government was funding with YOUR tax dollars:

❌ **$1.5 million** to "advance DEI in Serbia's workplaces and business communities"
❌ **$70,000** for a "DEI musical" in Ireland
❌ **$47,000** for a "transgender opera" in Colombia
❌ **$32,000** for a "transgender comic book" in Peru
❌ **$2 million** for sex changes and "LGBT activism" in Guatemala
❌ **$6 million** to "fund tourism" in Egypt
❌ **Millions** of dollars to EcoHealth Alliance for COVID research
❌ **Funding** for contraceptive initiatives and programs that benefited terrorists in several countries

It's no wonder that Secretary of State Marco Rubio has called for a complete overhaul of USAID. **But we need to hear from YOU, Friend**.

**[Take our USAID audit survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcbol0bahk48e5lvggebgccv4qa201pf2oqh4g5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctj6apj2c3h2bs "Take our USAID audit survey")** and tell us which programs you think are the biggest waste of taxpayer dollars. name: House Republican DOGE Team [via Team Scalise]
subject: They want to keep the gravy train rolling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Democrats are using every trick in the book to undermine DOGE's mission and keep the gravy train rolling.

| |
---
| | | There's no use in beating around the bush when your hard-earned money is on the line.

**Thanks to the Democrats, honest taxpayers like you have unknowingly footed the bill for transgender animal experiments and hormone therapies in Guatemala _(we 're not kidding)..._**

But President Trump, Elon Musk, and the DOGE team are leading the charge to root out waste, fraud, and abuse in our government.

House Republicans are working in lockstep to help them change the course of our country and put more money back in YOUR wallet.

That's where our survey comes in. All of these cuts concern YOUR tax dollars. So it's incredibly important to know where you stand on DOGE's massive cuts, their work so far, and what other cuts you want to see, if any.

**If we don't help get this across the finish line, no one else will. Democrats are using every trick in the book to undermine DOGE's mission and keep the gravy train rolling.**

It's absolutely critical we get the job done while Republicans hold the House, Senate, and White House. Otherwise, unelected bureaucrats, special interest groups, and the Deep State will win and the American People will lose.

body:
AOC's socialism is a threat to American freedom and prosperity. We need your help to stop her...

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zafqi5p07nunjvvtjj9f0jgh9825lk1sbb813tvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctj6apj2cjh2bs)
---

_Dear Fellow Conservative,_

_**[We have some disturbing news to share with you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1f6pe6q7qote63fgkslrbqjhcu9kfoo9r9h5lfo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctj6apj2cjh2bs "We have some disturbing news to share with you.")**_ Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC) has just become the de facto leader of the Democrat Party. And her radical agenda is a threat to everything we hold dear.

Imagine a country where the government controls every aspect of your life, from your healthcare to your paycheck, a country where the socialist ideology of AOC and her allies reign supreme.

**This is not a hypothetical scenario.** AOC's rise to power is real, and her policies are already being implemented. _[She's using her massive social media following and record-breaking fundraising to spread her radical message and build a movement of far-left activists.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkapphbafbo5mc07do99rpav22m1v74kjn72kol8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctj6apj2cjh2bs "She's using her massive social media following and record-breaking fundraising to spread her radical message and build a movement of far-left activists.")_

_**But here's the thing:** _**we can still stop her.** We can still expose her radical policies and build a grassroots movement to counter her influence. We can still elect conservative leaders who will stand up to her extremist agenda.

_**[And that's where you come in to end this madness. Your contribution will help us launch a nationwide campaign to stop AOC and the Democrat Party's lurch to the left.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaip5lg3vh970umc2kho4e852u5dss9spmllm42o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctj6apj2cjh2bs "And that's where you come in to end this madness. Your contribution will help us launch a nationwide campaign to stop AOC and the Democrat Party's lurch to the left.")**_

Peter,

Earlier this week we came together to discuss our new report, _Repro Red Flags: Trump's First 100 Days_ and how abortion, birth control, IVF, and maternal health care are in SERIOUS DANGER. [**It's going to take all of us, Peter, to collectively fight back against the harm inflicted already.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107328597/544328207/2141984067?sourceid=1150647&utm_campaign=25emcus-0505aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=100days&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjI5OWQ4Ni0yODJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=za-mxTW__HhObPZqEJ_R9yMNXVD19fb2BBCY7Ns08e8=&emci=45058eae-242c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=46299d86-282c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237) | [**FIGHT BACK** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107328598/544328208/2141984067?sourceid=1150647&utm_campaign=25emcus-0505aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=100days&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjI5OWQ4Ni0yODJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=za-mxTW__HhObPZqEJ_R9yMNXVD19fb2BBCY7Ns08e8=&emci=45058eae-242c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=46299d86-282c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237 "FIGHT BACK")
---
In his first 100 days, Trump did some significant damage to our reproductive rights. It's largely flown under the radar, but we're sounding the alarms on his most egregious attacks—and calling out the cruel masterminds behind them.
[**JOIN THE FIGHT** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107328599/544328209/2141984067?sourceid=1150647&utm_campaign=25emcus-0505aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=100days&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjI5OWQ4Ni0yODJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=za-mxTW__HhObPZqEJ_R9yMNXVD19fb2BBCY7Ns08e8=&emci=45058eae-242c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=46299d86-282c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237 "JOIN THE FIGHT")
---
[**What makes me hopeful is our community of advocates, supporters, and donors who contribute to this fight so that reproductive rights are guaranteed as human rights in the U.S. and across the globe.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107328600/544328210/2141984067?sourceid=1150647&utm_campaign=25emcus-0505aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=100days&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjI5OWQ4Ni0yODJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=za-mxTW__HhObPZqEJ_R9yMNXVD19fb2BBCY7Ns08e8=&emci=45058eae-242c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=46299d86-282c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237) We won't stop until that is a reality.

[**Thank you for fighting with us.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107328601/544328211/2141984067?sourceid=1150647&utm_campaign=25emcus-0505aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=100days&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjI5OWQ4Ni0yODJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=za-mxTW__HhObPZqEJ_R9yMNXVD19fb2BBCY7Ns08e8=&emci=45058eae-242c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=46299d86-282c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237)

In solidarity,

Nancy Northup
President & CEO

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Oregon wolves are calling out for you!
body:
Peter, help us stop our Major Threat, SB 777: a bill that sets back the recovery and management of wolves. We need one final push from you to eliminate this bill!| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107329082/544330309/1168664123?contactdata=84vlFSmMFUl0NQKODnUCX1vei+mQvrMFV3qCYBFFIXN6rUWygLwM04b8vPZvWNFZfKrXSLUImYP0REFZ5EcLSdUWJr9UnAXB3rp9XqXAoqVmHKXdwBNDJoKE/KSN6iZV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmYWZhYWE4LTI5MmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8r0OSMGgyhm4QXvDgIGtF-7Yp28dCSYYtreMvwZp3UI=&emci=69882ec6-952b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=3fafaaa8-292c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)
---
Dear Peter, If you’ve missed our Major Threat emails, let me tell you about the Wolf Depredation Compensation Program Bill ([**SB 777 A**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107329084/544330311/1140938071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmYWZhYWE4LTI5MmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8r0OSMGgyhm4QXvDgIGtF-7Yp28dCSYYtreMvwZp3UI=&emci=69882ec6-952b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=3fafaaa8-292c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)). This bill would allow for up to 5x the fair market value paid for livestock confirmed killed or injured by wolves, draining the program's funds and jeopardizing wolf recovery. For those who are already familiar with this bad Wolf Depredation Compensation Program Bill ([**SB 777 A**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107329086/544330314/1140938071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmYWZhYWE4LTI5MmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8r0OSMGgyhm4QXvDgIGtF-7Yp28dCSYYtreMvwZp3UI=&emci=69882ec6-952b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=3fafaaa8-292c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)), you know that this bad bill endangers the recovery of Oregon’s wolves, and we must stop it. Only three seats separate control of the House, and if we’re going to push back against the administration, we can’t afford to lose here. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It’s only a matter of time before billionaires and special interests wade into this race, and we need a surge of grassroots support to stay ready. Thank you, Team Budzinski | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Nikki for Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States

As a mom, I know that every child in Delaware deserves an excellent education with first-rate public schools – no matter where they live or who their parents are.
And this starts with supporting our educators with better pay, safer work environments, and due respect in their fields.
That's why I've worked hard with other Senate Democrats to ensure that our teachers have the resources to succeed and ensure our kids have the opportunity to quality education.
**_And right now, public schools are under attack by the Trump administration, so it's more important than ever to stand with educators and give them the tools they need to thrive._**
**_[If you have a moment, can you add your name to our card and show appreciation to our educators?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107329170/544330492/161356463?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.08_Teacher-Week_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmRjY2RhZS0yOTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tKbNP8X5dtD-Kic30UroPbMoMGCaTNy8SgAAaRWniBw=&emci=30ae91a3-592b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=2fdccdae-292c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=11913588)_**

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: The Vatican Conclave, Faith in a Watered-Down World & a Trump-as-Pope Meme?
body:
Don't miss this one! No Doubt About It Episode 190 for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=173a960233&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | This week’s episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast is unlike any other—faith, global leadership, and a little humor all wrapped into one unforgettable conversation. [We’re thrilled to welcome back one of our favorite guests, Father John Carney](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=60a6ba5207&e=567664f14c), a retired priest with incredible insight and a personality that jumps right through the mic.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a8714c18fa&e=567664f14c)
|
# In This Episode:
---
| 🕊️ Vatican Conclave: What Happens Next? With the Conclave now underway, we turn to Father John for a behind-the-scenes look at how a new pope is chosen, how long the process might take, and what really happens inside the walls of the Vatican during this sacred decision. Father John brings decades of knowledge—and some eye-opening stories—on how the Church chooses its next spiritual leader.
💡 Faith in a World That Tries to Water It Down Mark and Father John dive into one of the most important questions of our time: How do Christians stay true to their faith when the world constantly asks them to compromise it? Father John offers practical and powerful wisdom for standing by Jesus Christ while the culture pushes conformity.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=953200611a&e=567664f14c)
---
| 🔍 Who Should Be the Next Pope? Yes—we go there. Mark and Father John share their preferences for the next pontiff. Mark even names his prohibitive favorite—and let’s just say it’s a bold pick you may not expect.
😂 Trump as Pope Meme? You read that right. Krysty asks Father John about the viral “Trump as Pope” meme. His response? Pure gold. A perfect blend of faith, wit, and wisdom.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6687dd1863&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---
| This episode blends deep insight, spiritual encouragement, and a few laughs—and it’s exactly what so many people are searching for right now.
**✅ Help Us Share Truth & Light**
📺 [**Like, Rate & Subscribe**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=843723ac31&e=567664f14c)**:** If this episode inspires you or makes you think, please like, rate, and subscribe to the No Doubt About It Podcast on your favorite platform and on YouTube. It helps us reach more people hungry for real, meaningful conversations.
💬 **Join the Discussion:** What do you think of the Vatican’s selection process? How do you stand strong in your faith today? [Jump into the comments on YouTube and share your thoughts! ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=47b86017ef&e=567664f14c)
💡 **Support Independent Voices of Faith & Reason:** If you believe in our mission to inform, uplift, and challenge, [consider donating to the podcast](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=da94686548&e=567664f14c) on our website. Every bit helps us keep going.
Thank you for being part of this incredible community.
Stay grounded. Stay faithful. Stay bold.

— **Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **
_Hosts of the No Doubt About It Podcast_
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bee09a401f&e=567664f14c)

| [|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=9441502ed5&e=567664f14c)

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23048%2E4449941%2EQoWooE) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23048%2E4449941%2EQoWooE) **WOAH. We’re weeping... with JOY!!** Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the ENTIRE GOP tried every dirty trick in the book to RUIN the campaign for a Constitutional Amendment to OVERTURN _Citizens United_. They KNOW they would never win another election if they couldn’t BUY it. _But now we’re over the MOON!_ Raphael Warnock
Chuck Schumer
Amy Klobuchar
Bernie Sanders
Jamie Raskin
Mark Kelly

Now EVERYONE agrees we need to get RID of _Citizens United_! We must be dreaming!!

[**_Look, we REFUSE to spoil our golden opportunity. It would be a SLAP in the face of every Democrat fighting to see this through! # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107330260/544334082/2039042026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGRmMzAwZTAtMmIyYy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FhTXoYlyqRbi5rdYeTTRLtpp9rCVl442Q942rKe48n0=)
What’s happening to our veterans right now deserves every ounce of outrage.

Elon Musk and Trump spent the last four months harping on government waste -- firing thousands of veterans from federal service. But that's not stopping them from throwing a massive military parade on his birthday.

Even Fox News is saying this stunt with tanks, fighter jets, and 6,000 troops could cost between $25 and $45 million.

**One big parade for one man’s big ego.**

Meanwhile, the veterans who actually served, and kept serving in civilian roles across the government, were _purged_ without hearings or cause.

This whole thing is an embarrassment. I joined the Army when I was 18. I didn’t serve to see my fellow veterans used as props or discarded like trash by a wannabe dictator and his billionaire friends.

That's why I introduced the **Protect Veteran Jobs Act** in Congress to reinstate these veterans. And it's why I’m going to keep holding the line against Musk and Trump in one of the most competitive districts in the country.

**[These two want me out of Congress. Let's make sure that we win the day. If you can, please rush in $3 today. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: our hardworking families are paying the price
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
| | Team,

This Friday at midnight, my campaign is facing a critical reporting deadline.

Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s DOGE minions are planning to FIRE our hardworking postal workers!

**If the MAGA mob gets their way, post offices across the country will be SHUT DOWN... we can’t let that happen!**

[**30,000 SIGNATURES DUE BY MIDNIGHT: Sign our urgent petition to stand with your local postal worker immediately »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal?source=VPP_20250508_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=19788%2E878179%2E3iTxD7) | [FIGHT BACK NOW: I STAND WITH MY LOCAL POSTAL WORKER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal?source=VPP_20250508_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=19788%2E878179%2E3iTxD7)

Millions of Americans rely on USPS for mail-in ballots, medication, paychecks, and more. **_We can’t afford to stay silent!_**

[**Add your signature to our time-sensitive petition by MIDNIGHT to stand with your local postal worker »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal?source=VPP_20250508_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=19788%2E878179%2E3iTxD7)

Together,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19788%2E878179%2E3iTxD7). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19788%2E878179%2E3iTxD7).**

clean_body: | Peter, Under far right leadership, our government is failing us. That's a big part of why I'm running. Our opponent is cozying up to Elon Musk and standing by as constituents lose access to critical services. I will always be willing to roll up my sleeves and actually get things done. But after this extreme Congress, the list of things we need to tackle goes beyond one or two bills, and we’ll have a lot to do when we flip this seat. That's why I'm coming to you today with a short survey asking what you want in Congress so I know what issues matter most to you. | ** We’re staying true to our values of not taking any voter for granted. That's how we've been doing things for generations in Wisconsin, and it's what you deserve. Things are tough right now, Peter. Trust me, I get it. Prices are still too high. Republicans are coming for our health care and Social Security to deliver a massive tax break to billionaires. People are being kidnapped off our streets. That’s why I wish I didn’t have to ask for money in emails like these. It’s one of my least favorite parts of the job. But if I’m being honest, it’s also a necessary part of the job. Elections typically come down to who has the most money to spend on running ads, training volunteers, and reaching voters — and since billionaires send more and more money to GOP candidates who will give them tax cuts and provide backing for Trump’s authoritarian agenda, it’s important to build a strong grassroots base that can stand up against them. Even just $1 will help me fight against Donald Trump and Elon Musk in Congress, defend working families from their billionaire-first agenda, stand up to the Trump administration’s lawlessness, and continue to listen and show up for Vermonters. **[So if you can, Peter — and only if you can — please pitch in $1 today. name: Working Families Party
subject: The biggest attack on health care in U.S. history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | **Breaking news out of Congress, Peter:** the House committee that oversees health care spending _just_ announced that next week they will be voting on a Republican budget plan that would slash hundreds of billions from Medicaid and other essential programs — all to fund more tax breaks for billionaires like Trump and Musk. If it passes, these cuts, affecting millions of Americans, could reach the full House floor for a vote as early as the following week. **Before these lawmakers cast their votes, we need to flood their offices with public pressure.**[**RSVP now to join a virtual phone bank on Monday, May 12th, from 2:00 to 4:00 PM ET. You’ll be calling voters in key Republican districts to help them tell their representatives: vote NO on these devastating cuts.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxLe0aWmJSfnO6THEkwHFbcX2nM1M0pHriqwWAjnV16gEyk_4FzNs-I5d9oRz_-bGONnimJ8c6dhDGaNazf69THmGlTR-Mcmk37UVp1oaSxVrorYgUoQw0ZIhbRsteoht7GbqJFljWG3Ye4GOm8AoXQ_e0bXEPOGRZgVmQON75W9qr0YnJzN_hQ5o0FBzc22xk83DPGiXA7hTn1JzY8ZQJbdN3UtpN5sYt9U3ifBHJ2Vn6nFzz6t_hjmBdvNDnfhtE/4gb/2GaIQD_RQbixB4n_pUgfHw/h0/h001.J5OyckzOzac8JbEOZXhGs4lFAq4rhdwjL7VutnTG4pw) **[Join the phonebank »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxLe0aWmJSfnO6THEkwHFbcX2nM1M0pHriqwWAjnV16gEyk_4FzNs-I5d9oRz_-bGOfnwEfdKtrU-WHs_O0vyzDruDPU0pKmgZjZL9jU81ujhg47cMC6PuJ_VvixqtcCPc6yN_GWz0NIMGqRWgghayvzPFvDBw7RT_LSEiJPG5kst_dHTcrqlKs8wl8NpJS9nzio6w4nZG9yL9ASq2u22tniRq1rCl96NVtGdXx31kJvQVvtkOBYbyOVEPrL96j6Cj/4gb/2GaIQD_RQbixB4n_pUgfHw/h1/h001.egLRrPS6o-p9L3UzUERwFhteC0MSa68yNoCEVDpzN6M)** This would be the biggest attack on health care in U.S. history, Peter. We’re talking about ripping care away from:
* Half of all kids in this country2
* Nearly half of all births in the country3
* Over 60% of nursing home residents4
* Millions of people with disabilities5
* Working adults with no job-based insurance6
* Families hanging on by a thread

These aren’t numbers on a spreadsheet. These are our neighbors, our elders, our kids — and the GOP is choosing billionaire donors over their _lives_. **But here’s the thing: the majority of Americans — including most _Republican_ voters — oppose these cuts.7 And the GOP knows it.** They’re vulnerable. For weeks, GOP town halls have been flooded with angry constituents. Massive protests are propping up across the country. Voters are waking up to the fact that Republicans in Congress are looting this country in broad daylight. **If we turn up the pressure now, we can force some of them to break ranks and vote NO.** [**Join a virtual phone bank on Monday, May 12th from 2:00 to 4:00 PM. Call voters in Republican districts so they can flood their reps with calls and remind them: vote for these cuts, and you _will_ lose your seat.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxLe0aWmJSfnO6THEkwHFbcX2nM1M0pHriqwWAjnV16gEyk_4FzNs-I5d9oRz_-bGO8ePlv3R8mIGk-QWyrjRqaQPITo7lfFAp5btgZnadQ838o6tmuJcVVzhkmIuvL1DDUAWIg7F03xnnEly1XbgFc_PB8g5djbSxd7EYr4cdPBTzLT-kqO1N6YToQddlJYer-Zd6kJPi6Qc4ctZN8HfpYKSjTrGAfQNFfReN8az2LFjIrWsMreOT2ZMKjXh54x3t/4gb/2GaIQD_RQbixB4n_pUgfHw/h2/h001._MrVc7LcZ_TWswUUMSrumQm6eCKthibi3e60nauwjtc) All you need is a phone, a laptop, and the determination to fight back. **[Join the phonebank »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxLe0aWmJSfnO6THEkwHFbcX2nM1M0pHriqwWAjnV16gEyk_4FzNs-I5d9oRz_-bGOKJKb7dgg8droQgOK0HKxXNngUObv_0VDCyTJ8yN4_9czB0vpUxt0_xpue9lAt6LN3e4S3e_sDXgGw7j6f5H8Hb6YL0l4WctvBn66DEEuWKWFYlAx2ez0rfQ8xpXlWiO5ApxXmPxSP_iIh7FWYAyN4Ff82_jBONjSDdXh1wU_rXHL4qM6BxsduKg041eqGLlA/4gb/2GaIQD_RQbixB4n_pUgfHw/h3/h001.Sf9YAcXSc6o27o9V9f8IKQhyaqE9YnBvWeaxeq8yLAk)** We’ve seen it before, Peter: when enough people speak out, Republicans cave. Let’s make sure they hear from their constituents loud and clear. In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. clean_body: | | | Breaking news out of Congress, Peter: the House committee that oversees health care spending just announced that next week they will be voting on a Republican budget plan that would slash hundreds of billions from Medicaid and other essential programs — all to fund more tax breaks for billionaires like Trump and Musk. If it passes, these cuts, affecting millions of Americans, could reach the full House floor for a vote as early as the following week. Before these lawmakers cast their votes, we need to flood their offices with public pressure. This would be the biggest attack on health care in U.S. history, Peter. We’re talking about ripping care away from: Half of all kids in this country2 Nearly half of all births in the country3 Over 60% of nursing home residents4 Millions of people with disabilities5 Working adults with no job-based insurance6 Families hanging on by a thread These aren’t numbers on a spreadsheet. These are our neighbors, our elders, our kids — and the GOP is choosing billionaire donors over their lives. But here’s the thing: the majority of Americans — including most Republican voters — oppose these cuts.7 And the GOP knows it. They’re vulnerable. For weeks, GOP town halls have been flooded with angry constituents. Massive protests are propping up across the country. Voters are waking up to the fact that Republicans in Congress are looting this country in broad daylight. If we turn up the pressure now, we can force some of them to break ranks and vote NO. All you need is a phone, a laptop, and the determination to fight back. We’ve seen it before, Peter: when enough people speak out, Republicans cave. Let’s make sure they hear from their constituents loud and clear. In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , Reuters , April 30, 2025. 2\. , Children's Hospital Association, April 11, 2025. 3\. , Medicaid.gov 4\. , McGuireWoods, April 8, 2025. 5\. , KFF, February 7, 2025. 6\. , KFF, February 4, 2025. 7\. , News from the States, May 1, 2025. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

|
---
| | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/vK-pbVaqms7EBsHj5B5-zoK-evLq2EfyVI0f2elN7S6JfC7MXReAwlMjSqC82QYEQQdw0acpVuOQjw8x0HbZ9T7F-h_iGw744jvNoPtQ3mHyqrB7BTmuHIiz4raZkv_wYURLEBHOVXbBxQreMWBLkbN5ZcS76OksnDP-EAEeHhT27sLN1F_4ORgGifdwcIiogphOczP-0ebSuZinNuTZuCKcw330bXa93QFyMyb_bHVRnpCZenjSR_il8nXuY2upvzbJzrsQTPxkLATV5ziUaz2euqwleVP8IY077ChwnTbDJgFun3-kHv634UfEoCWerE0u9c9JwgdYpmoR8HGJVLhG770WdFMvSRuzeacCPsuiDdRJc0VCMWs1sYwiEMyCWbEdrfySPfAUTzB4lYr24MLo2A1TyiEiZJ0-6sTv45Pr25oCjmcZ85s23HmPiweXaKMw9w2WHb33bt0GXPP9Y5YIJlE9jpCKGE7qz8MINed4LUl4P359/at675C0WPJRvpQCwIgeNRIlGR8Yq0MdX/8)
---

Closing the curtains on my campaign.

I'm at my wits' end, Peter.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

**[Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/A5h0B5oH2Y72GMHi2sBXY7Gd-zUb5LgP9HJ1e3lQHG-9N3lir334GFO1z3PSu7GMRRDcbEXedvwLldRJfyvza2sVBbA6NasfLxsowuZYzN2PWSckjo-rqq5XfsfFHxttbE54rDfRE61XgFlnJi_XYTaKBfepcxaBHWy4Qcnd7Tb9iRCKKml5GMeLpiYq3kZ5aGaZQI1IPgRvZzKre8YdndP8zC2SsVi8N1anU9_PL0GPPsJAvyjp5MFx4g1O38zgC533294zJeP_VwMoDTISLpnPufaVIHR1-8AnKHlvtI2NwSdVMRzmzL-t4aQYOFC3_v5HWN1aD_lnq2MzDeWK_zitVvWi8QC0NsefHv0rk5dH7QeCH2yaqp_09dfucJWNZFrCjPkcLhsL00p6z9IC8oxZF3d7IPntOPxL5F41bydS_tgRNtFYNmO8YGaFy8AR_gGpEszSxkGP5AdBaswQlA8JERYlYf3Y4BIPBLAkSItE_aumY04m/DjRhcNIScDDe5OBkAyVpeqXe7xpOdnif/8 "Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.")**

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat, and the DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, but Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrat impeachments and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as Secretary of the Interior starting in 2017 and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.
In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/z9pIIEHaPtGNLxDHd2q4x4kuY13FAQfoR5iwDCSCKbcoT75U_jue4XFycRaa0iQPYA98owugX4P1v-WaHDtmM5JfKXbKxvXSKIFwJ0J5TtruJk_OIiq23oPrGHuSgwaJfNdb21mHE5p9Anq3MdP11AOTPJuWnXnsI42ydhYf3vRzpSVwGo4u5LKRu1zPGt_GCuN26_gBCrg6dJJ3lQNVPltwvOYmfiIMDvwbrdL42Rp620KwpIFVJMYSr2EwiXSacOjk97ExDpMFO-h-JG5x1SluWXi8_SmhHEJ-nLcWafA27rHewF-porEd6mN41JocuRrjKVmwz83GFtjIlKmT9EkRMvsAoQKEijkt7NnoAXktdbN1mbQF3ZbgyJVfFGoSSD1NIcZs7DmFErkpxR_4GWVaM853en58hA6MEQ6juMVNmPajv_RvhZmg7twdhNzEK7Dhq9wB5daKr2P00uGYBoW2_BhXr4XBTcnLTssdOPxh0_yp9cNq/OyL4nt6pDyrXGFjV6VDUDCnnE5Frby7t/8 "But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.")**

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | | [Chip In NOW!](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/py3wYFhAn8I1bXRqRlN7WAbs4xXj9qg1I48rR38KFIphzHlfMuDypk29QzJSqN4S8xzZDUEqUwvHHN3KVvy_ZZN9SyGTrGY-O2Gmew9fLLRi7sEy3Tu_HKbb0GrMHMU5ghtWu-6JYmlUMgqUAZaP9lx6EiF-3koTt0FIl7n5T8xbwzqU861rVkBZ3UaYj0mE4-zMt-rYOYAAH4UcnxdWI-Io7T7F3SDHYHg-bwOdrsjhkCYn_Gj8PLkqELrdApyyxqFlX3_McJRlVsO6kG2blYplcnbzZloIWBmLqkJYx8Vj-jh3R_MPliEcgkKNrKIKszV944NoippEpadn5My-Gfg-Q6Sb1eMqgEtkvHOnlDzFGfayOUkxbW1hLc33FIlCtvc4bfCIdXN4Q5y5qJHbOlDi8SoYBQXp9Eb92wRcW7G5G_CZ4GpD-yGZCUB3l8cDKbrd6DyTLdUQlXuo_nD5ZBkWR6Sgdmw-yaRIxoWe-jz-z2JlF8_C/E7I8vMwfv2zjwbjYmDFVsdmS6F_4PLL3/8 "Chip In NOW!")
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly.

Thank you for your support,

Ryan Zinke

name: Jena Griswold
subject: The weaponization of the DOJ must end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg-msnbc?refcode=250508-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg-msnbc?refcode=250508-email]
Team,
Donald Trump is at it again—this time pushing to pardon Tina Peters, a former county clerk who was convicted of several felonies for compromising voting equipment in Colorado.
Tina Peters compromised her own voting equipment to try to prove Trump’s Big Lie. She was convicted by a jury of her peers in a conservative Colorado county and sentenced to 9 years of incarceration. She is no political prisoner. She is a criminal, just like the thousands of criminals Trump pardoned for trying to steal the election on January 6th.
I joined MSNBC to make one thing clear: This isn’t just about one case. It’s about Trump’s plan to rewrite history, erase accountability, and pave the way for future attacks on our democracy.
Watch the interview and donate to my campaign for Attorney General here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg-msnbc?refcode=250508-email]
Trump has weaponized the Department of Justice, and it shows just how far he will go to protect the election deniers, extremists, and lawbreakers who support him. This is why we need leaders who will stand up to him and protect our democracy, no matter what.
I’ve stood up to Trump before, even when it meant receiving death threats. And as Colorado’s next Attorney General, I won’t stop fighting.
But I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in today to help me stand up to Trump, defend the rule of law, and protect free and fair elections in Colorado? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg-msnbc?refcode=250508-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Trump and his allies are trying to rewrite the rules. We're fighting to protect them.
Thank you for standing with me,
Jena Griswold

body:
In the docuseries I'll be releasing shortly, you'll be able to see the first few chapters of the legal battle unfold, but the FULL TRUTH must he told and that will take our day in court.

| [****](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wdzqezFixFOO4Y9aLzssjw~~/AARclBA~/waq-xzjVAnO3xXTB25TI-qqqNrQIPnwd_ezusnHCo7xiVw4Y1NBpib4Gcs0y9ekj66sGy-tk8B6ACEqzP2zZWP9dbOstCCOOtwBpabGnuaRu00V0IPoPDEKdW589C0SQEK4aiBcB1M2TmMBks2O23j-PNaV6FxvwdV6aaA2lZWeSxZFROaWKaU1WfjDv_IIphnPOPwjRCpdDnHZk_N_iAQUwo9RI5nca6dxeQ2VIZfIbqhez9QrWHDXxm2ntBiwRe7lPsR0FOKb8Ubmy9dKPo8amM2Zxp_40fR6COuLf4R4~)
Dear Patriot,

The nightmare I could have never imagined has played out since February 2023, when my hand-selected board at Project Veritas **ousted me from the organization I founded** in a small room on top of a carriage house built by my grandfather.

As you know, Project Veritas sued me, and I counter-sued**. They are now on the run**.

**I 'm not seeking revenge or retribution . . . I'm seeking justice**, and [**I recently decided to tell the full, behind-the-scenes story**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wdzqezFixFOO4Y9aLzssjw~~/AARclBA~/waq-xzjVAnO3xXTB25TI-qqqNrQIPnwd_ezusnHCo7xiVw4Y1NBpib4Gcs0y9ekj66sGy-tk8B6ACEqzP2zZWP9dbOstCCOOtwBpabGnuaRu00V0IPoPDEKdW589C0SQEK4aiBcB1M2TmMBks2O23j-PNaV6FxvwdV6aaA2lZWeSxZFROaWKaU1WfjDv_IIphnPOPwjRCpdDnHZk_N_iAQUwo9RI5nca6dxeQ2VIZfIbqhez9QrWHDXxm2ntBiwRe7lPsR0FOKb8Ubmy9dKPo8amM2Zxp_40fR6COuLf4R4~) of what has happened and is happening with Project Veritas and the board members behind the coup.

[****](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wdzqezFixFOO4Y9aLzssjw~~/AARclBA~/waq-xzjVAnO3xXTB25TI-qqqNrQIPnwd_ezusnHCo7xiVw4Y1NBpib4Gcs0y9ekj66sGy-tk8B6ACEqzP2zZWP9dbOstCCOOtwBpabGnuaRu00V0IPoPDEKdW589C0SQEK4aiBcB1M2TmMBks2O23j-PNaV6FxvwdV6aaA2lZWeSxZFROaWKaU1WfjDv_IIphnPOPwjRCpdDnHZk_N_iAQUwo9RI5nca6dxeQ2VIZfIbqhez9QrWHDXxm2ntBiwRe7lPsR0FOKb8Ubmy9dKPo8amM2Zxp_40fR6COuLf4R4~)

# ACTION ALERT: VOTE YES ON HB 1586 / HB 4076 / HB 4535
|
---
HB 1586 by (Rep Hull) would allow Texans to print Reasons of Conscience Affidavits at home, streamlining the process to exempt themselves or their children from vaccination requirements.
HB 4076 (Rep Leach) would prohibit the denial of organ transplantation based solely on the organ recipient’s vaccination status. HB 4535 (Rep McQueeney) would require vaccinators to receive written informed consent prior to administering a COVID vaccine, and authorizes the development of an “information sheet” for COVID jabs that includes information on the risks and lack of safety testing for this particular shot.

TAKE ACTION NOW BY URGING MEMBERS OF THE HOUSE CALENDARS COMMITTEE TO PLACE THESE BILLS ON THE GENERAL STATE CALENDAR FOR A FLOOR VOTE!****
**1- Email the Committee Members**

|
---
| | [ Click here to generate an email to all committee members! ](mailto:todd.hunter@house.texas.gov,toni.rose@house.texas.gov,terry.canales@house.texas.gov,stan.gerdes@house.texas.gov,cody.harris@house.texas.gov,ana.hernandez@house.texas.gov,ann.johnson@house.texas.gov,jeff.leach@house.texas.gov,janie.lopez@house.texas.gov,ramon.romero@house.texas.gov,carl.tepper@house.texas.gov?subject=PUT%20THESE%20MEDICAL%20LIBERTY%20BILLS%20ON%20THE%20HOUSE%20CALENDAR!&body=Dear%20Representative%2C%0A%0AI%20am%20writing%20to%20you%20today%20to%20ask%20you%20to%20please%20advance%20these%20medical%20freedom%20bills%20to%20the%20House%20floor.%0A%0AHB%201586%20\(Hull\)%0AHB%204076%20\(Leach\)%0AHB%204535%20\(McQueeney\)%0A%0AThese%20bills%20would%20protect%20medical%20privacy%2C%20informed%20consent%2C%20and%20patients%E2%80%99%20rights.%0A%0AThank%20you%2C%0A%5BYOUR%20NAME%5D)
---
|

name: Sarah McBride
subject: the numbers just came out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
MAGA Republicans are on track to rip health care coverage away from millions of Americans.
#
The nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office confirmed what we already knew:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250508-1?refcode=em20250508-1977&refcode2=1977_21716_UK8Sn5&akid=1977%2E21716%2EUK8Sn5)
**MAGA Republicans are on track to rip health care coverage away from millions of Americans — all to appease Trump and give more tax breaks to his billionaire friends.**
It’s cruel. It’s devastating. And in Delaware, the impact would be enormous. Medicaid covers over 249,000 people, including nearly half of all kids in our state.
**But we still have time to stop it.**
[**Can you pitch in $5 or more to my campaign right now? Every dollar helps me respond, organize, and defend the care families rely on.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250508-1?refcode=em20250508-1977&amount=5&refcode2=1977_21716_UK8Sn5&akid=1977%2E21716%2EUK8Sn5)
Here’s the good news:
Some Republicans are starting to show hesitation. Dozens of GOP members signed a letter saying they won’t support reductions in Medicaid coverage for vulnerable populations. _That means they’re feeling the pressure._
So I’m doubling down.
**This week, I became the second Democrat to sign the _Hands Off Medicaid and SNAP Act_ — a bill to protect these life-saving programs from cuts.** And if Republicans truly mean what they say, they should sign it, too.
We can protect Medicaid, but only if we act fast, speak up, and make it impossible for anyone to look away.
[**I’ll never stop fighting to protect the care families count on. But I need you with me. So please, pitch in $5 or anything you can right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250508-1?refcode=em20250508-1977&amount=5&refcode2=1977_21716_UK8Sn5&akid=1977%2E21716%2EUK8Sn5)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250508-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250508-1977&refcode2=1977_21716_UK8Sn5&akid=1977%2E21716%2EUK8Sn5)**
In solidarity,
Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250508-1&t=1&refcode2=1977_21716_UK8Sn5&akid=1977%2E21716%2EUK8Sn5)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1977%2E21716%2EUK8Sn5)

It’s cruel. It’s devastating. And in Delaware, the impact would be enormous. Medicaid covers over 249,000 people, including nearly half of all kids in our state. But we still have time to stop it. In solidarity, Sarah

name: Oregon GOP
subject: For Immediate Release: Chariwoman Statement on Sinaloa Bust
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Time-sensitive testimony deadline: April 2 at 1 PM.

| |
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/g8Y9hrbW_EtN/ejlzU05NeFcvMEllTXQwS3ZvRzAzdVZMM1Zpd3JMS2pielY1ZmMzQmROSk1PNVEvaTFtNmxkRndDYTJUeXF1dW5DRUdGcGdVSGM4aURTQ0kxZW5MZTRUYXNBbUlOQTlvZVBMbTJtOTVHMWs9S0/)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
CONTACT:Oregon Republican PartyLaJuana Decker, Communications Chaircommunications.chair@oregon.gop
Release Date: May 8, 2025PRESS RELEASE: From the Desk of Connie Whelchel, Oregon Republican Party Chairwoman Oregonians woke up to disturbing news Tuesday: a Sinaloa cartel leader—a formerly-deported illegal immigrant living in Salem—had been arrested after trafficking millions of fentanyl pills and other deadly drugs throughout the western United States. The five-state federal investigation and arrests also yielded a record-breaking cache of lethal drugs—methamphetamine, heroin, and cocaine—41 firearms, and millions of dollars in cash. The scale of this criminal enterprise is staggering, and it was happening right here in our backyard. This discovery confirms what many Oregonians already know: Democrat policies have made Oregon a haven for criminal enterprises and a danger zone for law-abiding families. This isn’t about one arrest; this is about the environment that allowed it to happen. Oregon’s soft-on-crime sanctuary policies have created fertile ground for dangerous organizations like the Sinaloa cartel to thrive. Just two weeks ago, 46 Honduran nationals tied to the Sinaloa cartel were arrested in Portland on drug trafficking charges. Over 1.5 million lethal doses of fentanyl were seized in that operation—enough to kill every Portland resident twice. While the national death rate from fentanyl declined from 2022-2024, Oregon’s drug overdose death rate rose by over 31% between 2022 and 2023, and another 24% between 2023 and 2024. Fentanyl is now the leading killer of Americans aged 18 to 35. These aren’t just statistics—they are our sons, daughters, friends, and neighbors. Allowing foreign gangs, drug traffickers, and violent criminals to operate freely in our communities is not compassion—it’s gross negligence. And Oregonians are paying the price. Real compassion means welcoming immigrants through a legal process—ensuring they have the opportunity to work, thrive, and contribute without fear or exploitation. Real compassion means enforcing our laws and protecting our communities. That’s how we honor both American citizens and those seeking a better life in America. This latest bust is not just a tragedy—it’s a wake-up call. Oregonians must demand leadership that puts safety, security, and common sense ahead of failed ideology. We can—and must—do better. ####

Oregon’s soft-on-crime sanctuary policies have created fertile ground for dangerous organizations like the Sinaloa cartel to thrive. Just two weeks ago, 46 Honduran nationals tied to the Sinaloa cartel were arrested in Portland on drug trafficking charges. Over 1.5 million lethal doses of fentanyl were seized in that operation—enough to kill every Portland resident twice. While the national death rate from fentanyl declined from 2022-2024, Oregon’s drug overdose death rate rose by over 31% between 2022 and 2023, and another 24% between 2023 and 2024. Fentanyl is now the leading killer of Americans aged 18 to 35. These aren’t just statistics—they are our sons, daughters, friends, and neighbors. Allowing foreign gangs, drug traffickers, and violent criminals to operate freely in our communities is not compassion—it’s gross negligence. And Oregonians are paying the price. Real compassion means welcoming immigrants through a legal process—ensuring they have the opportunity to work, thrive, and contribute without fear or exploitation. Real compassion means enforcing our laws and protecting our communities. That’s how we honor both American citizens and those seeking a better life in America. This latest bust is not just a tragedy—it’s a wake-up call. Oregonians must demand leadership that puts safety, security, and common sense ahead of failed ideology. We can—and must—do better. #### | | | | | | | | | | | * | | | | |

subject: GREAT news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Friends,, Last year's Supreme Court election is finally over. Yesterday, Judge Griffin conceded.
We're not going to pretend like everything is fixed now. Opponents of voting rights still spent six months litigating this loss, trying to throw out thousands of legitimate votes. They still have a majority on the North Carolina state Supreme Court, and can still defend anti-voting initiatives that come from their state legislature.
But for now -- for one moment -- defenders of our elections and our fundamental right to vote prevailed. Your constant support and work to spread the word about this saga has been crucial. You have our thanks as we can all take a deep breath and turn our attention to other fights.
Onward,
The Voter Action Project Team
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=6UkQ7sW/bQtdOCJGLfa/y2neMf2m7LvRH+2DW2MRy8U8ddTVoLq/Bi1cBBiC8KYNqhJ4ZZ+AFYrVq2B/xPqBjbhugtAgA9ERPQYI417JU8Y=]
Popular Information: The five-month campaign to steal a North Carolina Supreme Court seat [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=6UkQ7sW/bQtdOCJGLfa/y2neMf2m7LvRH+2DW2MRy8U8ddTVoLq/Bi1cBBiC8KYNqhJ4ZZ+AFYrVq2B/xPqBjbhugtAgA9ERPQYI417JU8Y=]
The saga over this election continues, Team. Here's the latest update:
Last year, North Carolina passed a bill that reallocated power away from the Governor. This was a purely partisan move after the state legislature -- which had a supermajority of one party -- was upset that the other party had held onto the governor's office in the 2024 election, when State Attorney General Josh Stein beat Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, Mark Robinson.
The North Carolina Court of Appeals (one rung below the state supreme court) upheld that new law in a court challenge, so the North Carolina State Auditor -- a partisan elected politician of the same party as the state legislature's majority -- was able to appoint new members to the North Carolina Election Board. Instead of a pro-voting rights election board filled with appointments by the newly elected governor, opponents of voting rights now have a majority on the state election board.
This is yet another example in North Carolina where opponents of voting rights are more focused on protecting their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections. Hypocritical partisans are blatantly trying to steal this judicial election in plain sight. And you can bet they're going to try to do it in the 49 other states if they get away with it here.
We must keep the pressure up to stop this post-election interference with legitimate votes. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word and make these ballots count in North Carolina and stop suppression across the country >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=6UkQ7sW/bQtdOCJGLfa/y2neMf2m7LvRH+2DW2MRy8U8ddTVoLq/Bi1cBBiC8KYNqhJ4ZZ+AFYrVq2B/xPqBjbhugtAgA9ERPQYI417JU8Y=]

The backstory if you haven't been following this: After the 2024 election, the North Carolina state supreme court stepped in to stop the certification of the election for a justice on their court, which is a huge breach of power and a clearly partisan action in a state where judges are affiliated with political parties.
Back on Election Day 2024, incumbent Justice Allison Riggs (D) was reelected by a slim margin of a few hundred votes. Her disgruntled opponent, GOP Judge Jefferson Griffin, sued for and received two separate recounts -- both of which increased Riggs' lead.
After months of legal wrangling, the North Carolina Court of Appeals ruled in Griffin’s favor, deciding that 60,000 ballots in four heavily democratic counties must be recounted and verified. The ruling states that all 60,000 people must be notified and given 15 business days to provide proof of identity, or their vote will be thrown out. This ruling would have disenfranchised tens of thousands of people without showing any proof that any of these voters are actually ineligible.
After incumbent Justice Allison Riggs appealed a ruling to cure or discard 60,000 valid votes, a federal appeals court blocked the partisan North Carolina attempt to silence these voters . A George W. Bush-appointed and a Biden-appointed judge placed a hold on the cure process, with a Trump-appointed judge dissenting.
Now, vengeful partisans have taken control of the state elections board in order to steal this seat for good.
What's really the big deal here? If Judge Griffin's campaign thought the registration process was legally flawed, he should have challenged it *before* the election. He also should have challenged the process in every county, not just four that don't align with his political party. This is a blatant attempt to change the rules just because he lost. And his partisan cronies are going along with it to protect their power and their majority on the state supreme court.
We've got to make sure everyone knows about this egregious intervention before these votes are stolen and the voices of the people are silenced. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word? >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=6UkQ7sW/bQtdOCJGLfa/y2neMf2m7LvRH+2DW2MRy8U8ddTVoLq/Bi1cBBiC8KYNqhJ4ZZ+AFYrVq2B/xPqBjbhugtAgA9ERPQYI417JU8Y=]

clean_body: Friends,, Last year's Supreme Court election is finally over. Yesterday, Judge Griffin conceded. We're not going to pretend like everything is fixed now. Opponents of voting rights still spent six months litigating this loss, trying to throw out thousands of legitimate votes. They still have a majority on the North Carolina state Supreme Court, and can still defend anti-voting initiatives that come from their state legislature. But for now -- for one moment -- defenders of our elections and our fundamental right to vote prevailed. Your constant support and work to spread the word about this saga has been crucial. You have our thanks as we can all take a deep breath and turn our attention to other fights. Onward, The Voter Action Project Team Voter Action Project [=] Popular Information: The five-month campaign to steal a North Carolina Supreme Court seat [=] The saga over this election continues, Team. Here's the latest update: Last year, North Carolina passed a bill that reallocated power away from the Governor. This was a purely partisan move after the state legislature -- which had a supermajority of one party -- was upset that the other party had held onto the governor's office in the 2024 election, when State Attorney General Josh Stein beat Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, Mark Robinson. The North Carolina Court of Appeals (one rung below the state supreme court) upheld that new law in a court challenge, so the North Carolina State Auditor -- a partisan elected politician of the same party as the state legislature's majority -- was able to appoint new members to the North Carolina Election Board. Instead of a pro-voting rights election board filled with appointments by the newly elected governor, opponents of voting rights now have a majority on the state election board. This is yet another example in North Carolina where opponents of voting rights are more focused on protecting their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections. Hypocritical partisans are blatantly trying to steal this judicial election in plain sight. And you can bet they're going to try to do it in the 49 other states if they get away with it here. We must keep the pressure up to stop this post-election interference with legitimate votes. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word and make these ballots count in North Carolina and stop suppression across the country >> [=] If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [=] OTHER AMOUNT [=] The backstory if you haven't been following this: After the 2024 election, the North Carolina state supreme court stepped in to stop the certification of the election for a justice on their court, which is a huge breach of power and a clearly partisan action in a state where judges are affiliated with political parties. Back on Election Day 2024, incumbent Justice Allison Riggs (D) was reelected by a slim margin of a few hundred votes. Her disgruntled opponent, GOP Judge Jefferson Griffin, sued for and received two separate recounts -- both of which increased Riggs' lead. After months of legal wrangling, the North Carolina Court of Appeals ruled in Griffin’s favor, deciding that 60,000 ballots in four heavily democratic counties must be recounted and verified. The ruling states that all 60,000 people must be notified and given 15 business days to provide proof of identity, or their vote will be thrown out. This ruling would have disenfranchised tens of thousands of people without showing any proof that any of these voters are actually ineligible. After incumbent Justice Allison Riggs appealed a ruling to cure or discard 60,000 valid votes, a federal appeals court blocked the partisan North Carolina attempt to silence these voters . A George W. Bush-appointed and a Biden-appointed judge placed a hold on the cure process, with a Trump-appointed judge dissenting. Now, vengeful partisans have taken control of the state elections board in order to steal this seat for good. What's really the big deal here? If Judge Griffin's campaign thought the registration process was legally flawed, he should have challenged it before the election. He also should have challenged the process in every county, not just four that don't align with his political party. This is a blatant attempt to change the rules just because he lost. And his partisan cronies are going along with it to protect their power and their majority on the state supreme court. We've got to make sure everyone knows about this egregious intervention before these votes are stolen and the voices of the people are silenced. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word? >> [=] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. subject: Millions of people could lose healthcare coverage.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
All to fund billionaire tax breaks.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107336217/544355859/1328794144?refcode=ea.98e7825f-372c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.98e7825f-372c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4ZTc4MjVmLTM3MmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jjPxzySuB7VlyneKHASgIY5_TfCxgZfGCn8VangjJow=&emci=4c7c9bcb-202c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=98e7825f-372c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)
---
We know this isn’t our usual message — but when Trump and his GOP allies try to rip healthcare away from millions to fund tax breaks for billionaires, we can’t stay silent. **FIRST:** House Republicans introduced a budget plan that slashes up to $1.5 trillion from Medicaid and other critical safety net programs. **THEN:** A new report from the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office confirmed that millions of people would lose their Medicaid coverage under the GOP’s proposals. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107336218/544355860/-1401160525?refcode=ea.98e7825f-372c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.98e7825f-372c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4ZTc4MjVmLTM3MmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jjPxzySuB7VlyneKHASgIY5_TfCxgZfGCn8VangjJow=&emci=4c7c9bcb-202c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=98e7825f-372c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105) **NOW:** Even after public backlash, Republicans are still scheming to slip in backdoor cuts, verification hurdles, and work requirements that could quietly strip healthcare from up to 10 million people. **[Look, this fight is bigger than politics. It’s about people. It’s about whether we let billionaires and fossil fuel CEOs call the shots — or we take back power to build a future that works for all of us. We’re not letting it happen without a fight. So please: add your name now to DEMAND Republicans keep their hands off Medicaid.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107336219/544355861/-1401160525?refcode=ea.98e7825f-372c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.98e7825f-372c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4ZTc4MjVmLTM3MmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jjPxzySuB7VlyneKHASgIY5_TfCxgZfGCn8VangjJow=&emci=4c7c9bcb-202c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=98e7825f-372c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)** | [**ADD YOUR NAME →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107336220/544355862/-1401160525?refcode=ea.98e7825f-372c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.98e7825f-372c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4ZTc4MjVmLTM3MmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jjPxzySuB7VlyneKHASgIY5_TfCxgZfGCn8VangjJow=&emci=4c7c9bcb-202c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=98e7825f-372c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: All to fund billionaire tax breaks. | We know this isn’t our usual message — but when Trump and his GOP allies try to rip healthcare away from millions to fund tax breaks for billionaires, we can’t stay silent. FIRST: House Republicans introduced a budget plan that slashes up to $1.5 trillion from Medicaid and other critical safety net programs. THEN: A new report from the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office confirmed that millions of people would lose their Medicaid coverage under the GOP’s proposals. NOW: Even after public backlash, Republicans are still scheming to slip in backdoor cuts, verification hurdles, and work requirements that could quietly strip healthcare from up to 10 million people. | — Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Friend, this is your Vice President JD Vance.
