name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: No stranger to tough fights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Washington’s a different kind of warzone—high stakes, relentless battles, and no shortage of enemies. But I’m no stranger to tough fights. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3caaab3d7709422fade36141c1cc1bfb&_e=ko6SlbZuCJSiPk4_FlNrGJ9bYygq3IsUS3h6V0Ax_Ds85ziyZoW19XHzevA5FD89-4eoaoS9IEaTFyPBOpsJASH7b4-dv3x7GjhJY0d_uoEp1SG6MNqIPETj1xFcXlj6KmOt2KmiCXiqSlQIFAt2VedTqF3HH_y4KY6gUupCBVwubMhZqLEmpFUyqmmBfgyT9Bs6eR-whfWDpnb8v2Of9DlA9PkZjYuuj0weEkV-B6j7_-zJ-z7cdBCnpkTzaeAmahfhos3IUq0Rm4E-94iyYyBwcD-Bo0m6Hxb81TWXyAUeWXSnUH5tPMXNjRqTvJ7VS6ncfLQ8OoDLgVX6zsdjOnMo98JsJAfZsyVd-_Px2LB4AN2vijX9WLsnqC54hW6Zy7Iwtn1DgRNlVDW9xsqM9w%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

The biased hacks at Politico have decided to take aim at me, a Navy SEAL, for daring to shake up their cozy DC bubble.

I came to Congress with a mission: to serve our nation as fiercely as I did on the battlefield. As a SEAL, I learned to confront threats head-on, and that’s precisely what I’m doing against the entrenched elites and corrupt insiders running our government into the ground. But the liberal media, desperate to protect their cronies, smeared me for my resolve to drain the Swamp.

I’m Sen. Tim Sheehy, and _**I’m fighting to dismantle the status quo, but I’m up against a ruthless coalition of fake news outlets, spineless RINOs, and vengeful Democrats.**_

Fellow Conservative, _**[I need your support to stay in this fight and keep the pressure on those who would rather live in a dystopian, egalitarian society than the free and great nation our forefathers have spent the last 300 years building.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3caaab3d7709422fade36141c1cc1bfb&_e=ko6SlbZuCJSiPk4_FlNrGJ9bYygq3IsUS3h6V0Ax_Ds85ziyZoW19XHzevA5FD89-4eoaoS9IEaTFyPBOpsJASH7b4-dv3x7GjhJY0d_uoEp1SG6MNqIPETj1xFcXlj6KmOt2KmiCXiqSlQIFAt2VedTqF3HH_y4KY6gUupCBVwubMhZqLEmpFUyqmmBfgyT9Bs6eR-whfWDpnb8v2Of9DlA9PkZjYuuj0weEkV-B6j7_-zJ-z7cdBCnpkTzaeAmdKXD_kV6pCWaVrbslrJVbgwLuaPadd0GqWVSVkvzZoBLFsAZDlFQqrwiPaNSJwehp6_76UJLdb1JkqCJ4Z2Af8CDB585Z8T0uz0wDmTow4mi3FnNPuYuYQJGjGZKIdtDczdMlaQRtQpujDbpxBWAAQ%3D%3D)**_

[**Chip in $10 to aid me in my fight**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3caaab3d7709422fade36141c1cc1bfb&_e=ko6SlbZuCJSiPk4_FlNrGJ9bYygq3IsUS3h6V0Ax_Ds85ziyZoW19XHzevA5FD89-4eoaoS9IEaTFyPBOpsJASH7b4-dv3x7GjhJY0d_uoEp1SG6MNqIPETj1xFcXlj6KmOt2KmiCXiqSlQIFAt2VedTqF3HH_y4KY6gUupCBVwubMhZqLEmpFUyqmmBfgyT9Bs6eR-whfWDpnb8v2Of9DlA9PkZjYuuj0weEkV-B6j7_-zJ-z7cdBCnpkTzaeAmNTd7ekB3jAg1CVXjE2kUcVhvcD7A7mPqAzu7_ynNpUedNcU8WVTTzbhV6yWr3d4fHg9koQYN_W_ghOXQxvpxTfCI1eY9FL5XZxnk7eA1ybdMtb98m8yWKrRFS4ku-itVTR8Y2D0E8eRM5dkdpnrFrQ%3D%3D)
The mainstream, liberal media attacks me for my SEAL mindset—the unyielding drive to complete the mission. They ridicule my loyalty to President Trump’s America First agenda, which dares to put our country back on top. _**They hate that I’m exposing the waste and fraud in our government, now laid bare by Trump’s DOGE initiative.**_

But here’s the truth: they’re terrified because YOU elected me and President Trump to upend their corrupt system.

Let’s be clear: Politico’s hit job is a calculated move to shut me down. If they can muzzle me, they’ll come for you next. I’m holding the line, but I need your help to fuel this battle for America’s future:

[**Chip in $10 to aid me in my fight**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3caaab3d7709422fade36141c1cc1bfb&_e=ko6SlbZuCJSiPk4_FlNrGJ9bYygq3IsUS3h6V0Ax_Ds85ziyZoW19XHzevA5FD89-4eoaoS9IEaTFyPBOpsJASH7b4-dv3x7GjhJY0d_uoEp1SG6MNqIPETj1xFcXlj6KmOt2KmiCXiqSlQIFAt2VedTqF3HH_y4KY6gUupCBVwubMhZqLEmpFUyqmmBfgyT9Bs6eR-whfWDpnb8v2Of9DlA9PkZjYuuj0weEkV-B6j7_-zJ-z7cdBCnpkTzaeAmKv_2zQ7ClNvVvHtZ1yC4KrlYQ3tzH8pSKym5S5n20o06o2EjbBUjtx4hF4XepPbyfTHF4utzIalwh2TddTRK1wm6Y000pYkRX2UJ2U6YMFPf8F5RWUbSkddpouMKlZVsMM8PvD_ugZmpt-RtzIfURA%3D%3D)
I appreciate your continued assistance. ****

I appreciate your assistance,
Tim Sheehy
U.S. Senator - Montana
_
__
__
_

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

I’m holding the line, but I need your help to fuel this battle for America’s future: I appreciate your continued assistance. ** I appreciate your assistance, Tim Sheehy U.S. Senator - Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: You may have seen this major news: | Trump directs Justice Dept. to investigate ActBlue, Democrats’ cash engine — The New York Times And now, there’s more: Trump’s attack on ActBlue violates the First Amendment — The Hill ActBlue is Democrats’ top fundraising platform, which has raised over $17 billion since it was established — including over $400 million since Trump took office in January. Last month, Donald Trump signed a memorandum to ”investigate” and target ActBlue. Legal experts say this is a direct violation of the First Amendment and Supreme Court precedence. The MAGA movement is scared of our power, and now they’re attempting to silence us. = | = We will not bend to Trump’s blatant abuses of power. Elon Musk spent nearly $300 million of his personal funds in the last election cycle to elect Trump and the GOP majority — and he has already pledged to spend over $100 million on the midterms. And now, the MAGA movement wants to stall our momentum. It’s clearer than ever that Trump is fulfilling his promise to enact revenge on his political enemies — with the full force of the federal government behind him. We won’t back down. = | = Thank you, Team Gillibrand * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Colonel Pam Stevenson
subject: McConnell is out. I am in -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |

| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb90c4c0-07e3-43eb-8fe6-d8fb20562a21/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T310fc9e3-968f-4f7f-af91-eda8c29538e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Peter, I have some huge news to share with you: I am running for Senate here in Kentucky to replace Mitch McConnell. In a moment, I’m going to tell you about my vision for this election — and I would love it if you took the time to read my full message. But if you’re short on time, will you chip in $10 to help me become the next Democratic U.S. Senator? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa7f4ca1-6f66-4e23-ab01-acf6995f5b46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I was born and raised right here in Kentucky. I’ve spent my life in service to our communities, state, and country. I served as a JAG attorney in the U.S. Air Force for 27 years with the rank of Colonel. In the Air Force, I successfully negotiated several hostage crises and prosecuted violent criminals and child sex offenders. I’m a nonprofit founder for veterans in need, ordained minister, and the Floor Leader of the Kentucky House Democrats. I know firsthand the challenges Kentucky and our country are up against. [So now, after 27 years of serving our state and our country, I am running for Senate, but I can't start this fight alone. That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally: Will you chip in $10 before midnight TONIGHT to fuel my grassroots campaign and show the world I have what it takes to win this race? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4245524-209d-4248-8071-50d3954ca6c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m ready to run for U.S. Senate to defend our freedoms and build an economy that works for everyone – no matter your background. Every American deserves access to food, clean water, healthcare, and shelter. But Mitch McConnell and the GOP do not see things the same way. During his 40 years in the US Senate, he’s put his personal quest for power and his special-interest allies ahead of our state, nation, and Constitution every time. I’m ready to turn the page. But I need you with me. [I promise you I will put everything I have into winning this race and being a voice for every single American. But I can’t do it alone — and I’ll need the help of grassroots supporters like you every step of the way. So I’m humbly asking: Will you pitch in $10 before midnight tonight and uplift my campaign with an unbeatable show of support? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6905400-90e4-48db-a946-1ed7c834bf6b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T12e2c801-a396-48ca-81cf-c19f246af32a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| In the Air Force, they taught us to live by “Duty. Honor. Country.” I ask you to stand with me and live by “Duty. Honor. Kentucky.” Thank you, Colonel Pam
Floor Leader, House Democrats
Candidate for US Senate

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0d05a74-00c7-4a61-aded-0ee474da3377/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter - The Senate's last-ditch chance to restore election integrity is **NOW!**

You already know the shocking truth: illegal immigrants are being allowed to vote in radical-left cities like San Francisco and New York City. _**But with President Trump 's leadership and a conservative Senate majority, we've never been closer to ending this disgraceful attack on our republic.**_

The House passed the SAVE Act to permanently ban illegal immigrants from voting--a victory conservatives like us have fought tirelessly for.

_But here 's the danger:_ Democrat senators are already plotting to filibuster this bill. If we fail, millions of illegal aliens admitted under Biden's open-borders regime could swing elections in 2026, 2028, and beyond. **We can 't let that happen!**
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/S1PCQXosw8DNLLopPqdvMkHP8unkL9wXXkLnbtX8FIjIA4GJypyrB8kL1oQ8pvDJBRorNukv7YMW5ixsUzLqxWP-iCNss72ofszlurCsA2xJcFwRpOurV0-ZOH82m7OiC8rgpsOKzkXu-H1vkG6S85SrXR-V6tNVMejhIDUrXNHcrN9tCkfgDFSqK2nm4QT6pnhX1opV-NfElEdHMQU-LTNjccLr5Lu96mNj2tDMJrGwDyQVX72BXlTh7oyLqP6xthP9th2qL3iZlAYvt0IwhBARDGGVR6yWfFOPD_5bHDzDCgJ5ztVWERfgb04jxnR3-mnSZhHpDtLwJxuYSMKp-LaBM133j84x_NI2nMAVEJdsP6qsBafDYjLTroEc8pzxA0QqRy9eH3bidlubDG4zzFfR6GulB4A8kDrSSQGmDh_OYU2t6iDcO1VveBtPLQ-lS4Grw5MDtRr_jzhyvp6MglunU5t2FGB1xvgbeHwGpA/e5VMuBpJjCG7Ed_FJPa6NllDEvRgMmf2/8)

_**[Heritage Action needs your immediate support to pressure these Senate Democrats and ensure the SAVE Act survives the radical left's obstruction.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/XVf-5CN23pp3HJjE7s3zVn2D3_MBnNpzb4yNoOorjogFlKQ0PSOYEadutDpTAlWuUB5p0iVamUdEPLOo7Q7y3Bfz7bVhtV3LuNhsr8H_jQSuxXKruNqJ7oMi9GTjI7wtqfVIxw2bg6W40YggmXcS8SvZARZLcjzK-3KXfWVv1RDTt5H5vn4ZvkxN6f3RYlUItvbF72SGh0Nr2Mv4I-tMdNXh2ntnCNEfLOEpCq20bxruexU2--H81sJ5F3oYeoAGBNbpP1Vo06QX4qIjKL5udbRrqL18QlM0Zp6OnfzflHSI5Hd9eeIF1wHpQVEG7ya-yeFhwwXCPpnHBUSFN5zELoDMagQW92WNj80wVQoHzJTzuyDPwwabPxpYPjr3cCORUPWhsMkVzwZnC_KJEE5Oe5z-i6iP2x74YUDlurXhG7hZgyJCAZLX8xFc_YHACa6OecJqRfHULj6JgnAtoBpDotAXxrh51GooXJfF_Er4jg/R4UUgfu8s8BSIOB6DF_s5G2aeWzYivbt/8)**_
---
__What's at stake?__
* Illegal aliens are influencing school board elections, mayoral races, and even congressional elections.
* A permanent political advantage for Democrats who rely on importing voters.
* The erosion of your voice in elections--forever.

__What's the solution?__
* Flood Senate Democrats with calls and emails demanding they end this betrayal.
* Expose their radical votes to their constituents back home.
* Mobilize grassroots conservatives in battleground states to hold their senators accountable.

subject: Did you sign the thank-you letter to Sec. Rubio yet?

body:
We’ll be sending this off tonight — make sure your name’s on it.

|
---
| | | **Hey Peter,**

We're getting ready to send this **OFFICIAL THANK-YOU LETTER** to Secretary Marco Rubio -- but we just checked and your name **is MISSING!!!**

We don't want him to miss your support, especially with everything he's taking on at home and abroad!

So before we hit "send," we're giving you one last chance to add your name:

Dear Secretary Marco Rubio,

Thank you for stepping up and taking on one of the toughest jobs in Washington.

For years, America's foreign policy has been a mess -- bloated, directionless, and full of waste. But you've brought order, accountability, and courage to the role.

You've:

Taken on foreign corruption

Called out China's lies and aggression

Fought to keep taxpayer dollars out of woke global nonsense

And made it clear: America comes FIRST again.

You weren't chosen for this mission because of your resume -- you were chosen because you've EARNED the trust of the American people.

We're grateful for your leadership. And we want you to know: We have your back.

On behalf of proud America First conservatives across the country, thank you, Secretary Rubio. Keep leading. We're behind you.

Sincerely,
Peter

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: The next big fight in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Speaker Mike Johnson wants the House to vote on a full budget package by the end of this month.
That means we’re about to face another all-out fight to protect critical programs.
In their budget proposal, House Republicans floated trillions in tax cuts for the wealthy without saying where they’d find the money. Now the rubber meets the road — and we know where they’ll look: Medicaid .
Cutting Medicaid at all is outrageous. Even Donald Trump promised not to touch it during his campaign.
But slashing it by billions just to hand more tax breaks to billionaires? That’s not just outrageous — it’s immoral.
Millions of Americans of all political persuasions all across the country rely on Medicaid to get the health care they need without going broke (including 1 in 6 people in San Diego County). So cutting it would be catastrophic, and we need to approach this fight with a unified front.
If you’re with me and ready to speak up to protect Medicaid, will you add your name right now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yl7rjY9djUa6rEhVhJalvA2]
This isn’t a Republicans vs. Democrats thing. It’s a making-the-mega-rich-richer vs. regular-people-affording-basic-health-care thing. So why is the GOP lining up to fight for billionaires instead of their own constituents?
To please Donald Trump, of course.
I won’t sit back and watch these devastating cuts be written into law without a fight, and I hope you’re with me.
If you’re ready to fight for Medicaid, add your name to my petition today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yl7rjY9djUa6rEhVhJalvA2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yl7rjY9djUa6rEhVhJalvA2]
And if Medicaid has made a difference in your life, I’d love to hear your story. Just reply to this email.
More soon,
Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Senator Tom Cotton
subject: A warrior ready to serve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
He’s been on the front lines before. Now he’s stepping up again.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team, listening is one of my favorite parts of the job. When I first ran for Governor, I visited all 83 counties in Michigan to speak with voters about their concerns, worries, and needs, and learn more about the qualities they were looking for in their next governor. Some Michiganders told me that they’re worried about the high cost of living, others told me they needed someone to “fix the damn roads,” and many expressed their concerns that their children are going to grow up with fewer rights than their parents and grandparents did. **I’ve fought like hell to address those concerns** by putting more money back into the pockets of Michiganders, growing our economy, fixing our roads and bridges, and protecting our fundamental freedoms from people who want to take them away. **We’ve accomplished so much in Michigan, and now, I’m working to take our movement nationwide by electing Democrats who share our values. ** It’s no small task, and it’ll take even more people joining us to continue delivering results and elect Democrats nationwide who will do the same. So I’m reaching out to ask all of our supporters to share more about what issues you care about the most. **[Building a winning movement starts by making sure we’re talking about the issues you most care about. So please, take a few moments to let me know what’s on your mind by completing Fight Like Hell PAC’s Official Priorities Survey today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107340292/544370031/-900845195?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250508_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjk0OWRkNDUtNDAyYy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=G2LMtFguI2PN37AIxbsZ3QYvKH5XItlzYLtu8blUuH0=&emci=32c7ab3f-402c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=6949dd45-402c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1028753)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107340293/544370032/-900845195?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250508_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjk0OWRkNDUtNDAyYy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=G2LMtFguI2PN37AIxbsZ3QYvKH5XItlzYLtu8blUuH0=&emci=32c7ab3f-402c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=6949dd45-402c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1028753)

**If a president’s answer to “do you need to uphold the Constitution” isn’t _yes_ , HE NEEDS TO BE IMPEACHED IMMEDIATELY. **
Since taking office, he has:
* Illegally impounded funds appropriated by Congress
* Illegally fired civil servants, independent commissioners, and dismantled agencies
* Torn up the right to due process with illegal deportations
* Enriched himself with cryptocurrency corruption

name: Team Ilhan via Justice Democrats
subject: JD Vance just attacked Ilhan
body:
#
Peter,
JD Vance just attacked Ilhan and tried to incite the far-right against her once again.
A fear-mongering, conspiracy-peddling social media account took an 8-year-old video of Ilhan and clipped it out of context.
Then JD Vance amplified the false smear — calling Ilhan a “disgrace” and “sick”.
**[The attacks are only going to ramp up from here with Donald Trump and his far-right nationalist buddies back in power. Can you please split a $5 donation between Ilhan’s campaign and Justice Democrats today to help us fight back against their lies and smears?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250508-io?refcode=em20250508-36657&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36657_1203867_eJACmE&akid=36657%2E1203867%2EeJACmE)**
No matter your politics, the Vice President of the United States should not be using their platform to elevate conspiracies and make personal attacks.
The clip they chose was an important and nuanced conversation about a report that said white supremacists were responsible for 78 percent of “extremist-related murders.”
They tried to remove all context from that to say Ilhan was calling for genocide.
That’s rich coming from the people actively supporting a genocide in Gaza.
But this is how the far-right operates. We know that they will do anything they can to take down Ilhan. Their billionaire cronies and super PACs will spend limitless sums on smear attacks just like this.
So we have to fight back.
**[Please, if you can, split a $5 donation between Ilhan's campaign and Justice Democrats to stand with Ilhan and help us keep her critical voice in Congress. She cannot do this alone.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250508-io?refcode=em20250508-36657&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36657_1203867_eJACmE&akid=36657%2E1203867%2EeJACmE)**
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250508-io?refcode=em20250508-36657&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36657_1203867_eJACmE&akid=36657%2E1203867%2EeJACmE)**
Thank you,
Team Ilhan

clean_body: Peter, JD Vance just attacked Ilhan and tried to incite the far-right against her once again. A fear-mongering, conspiracy-peddling social media account took an 8-year-old video of Ilhan and clipped it out of context. Then JD Vance amplified the false smear — calling Ilhan a “disgrace” and “sick”. No matter your politics, the Vice President of the United States should not be using their platform to elevate conspiracies and make personal attacks. The clip they chose was an important and nuanced conversation about a report that said white supremacists were responsible for 78 percent of “extremist-related murders.” They tried to remove all context from that to say Ilhan was calling for genocide. That’s rich coming from the people actively supporting a genocide in Gaza. But this is how the far-right operates. We know that they will do anything they can to take down Ilhan. Their billionaire cronies and super PACs will spend limitless sums on smear attacks just like this. So we have to fight back. Thank you, Team Ilhan Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Donald Trump and national Republicans can’t afford another loss, so you can bet that they are turning all their efforts toward recruiting an extremist candidate in New Hampshire and flipping the Granite State red. We aren’t going to let them, but if we’re going to fight back, we need your help TODAY to raise the resources we’ll need to fight back against the MAGA billionaires. name: Media Alerts [MarieForCongress.com]
subject: “Loyalty to your soil and to your community”
body:
| | _“I think having loyalty to your soil and to your community — and not something that has been focus-grouped in D.C. or that came from a think tank but what matters to people at home — that is what is fun.
**I don’t want to be a mouthpiece for any agenda besides my community. Because it matters to me** ...If you can build a political body that is bringing that local lens together — fierce loyalty to the specifics of our community — that is how you build the Venn diagram of what is a useful federal policy. **That’s how we break the stranglehold, this duopoly. It’s being useful and relevant and building good policy out of the urgent, specific realities of our community.** ”
(Marie on “The Ezra Klein Show,” May 6, 2025)_
Peter – Marie has always forged her own path, from opening an auto repair shop to building her own house, and in her work in Congress. She’s been consistently named one of the most bipartisan members of Congress because her utmost loyalty has always been to the people of Southwest Washington.

**This week, Marie sat down with the _New York Times’_ Ezra Klein to discuss how she strives to find common ground and deliver positive change in a time when political divisions run deep.**
_**“But talking to people about the things they care about and fighting for the agenda and priorities of my community — that is the job of a representative.”**_

conservatives

From Fort Worth to Houston, conservative extremists just lost big in
Saturday’s local elections. School board candidates running to ban books
and silence LGBTQ+ students were resoundingly defeated – including all
seven GOP-endorsed school board candidates in contested races in Tarrant
County.

These weren’t fluke wins. They were organizing
victories.

Right-wing super PACs have spent years cutting massive checks to buy
control of local government – but we’ve proven something powerful:
organized people can beat big money.

That’s why Powered by People isn’t waiting. Our volunteers are out there
every day, registering voters and building power through real
conversations with real people.

This work doesn’t stop after one victory. If we want to keep winning, we
have to double down right now. Republicans are on the back foot — we can’t
let up.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107342916/544379229/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250508_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5ZGRiYy00NzJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rug5kcKnjEZQxX16eR5381wGVBup8DgtjFSk_vmAMlY=&emci=8d79ddbc-472c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=9379ddbc-472c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15529135) | Team — Republicans know their policies are deeply unpopular with voters. But instead of doing something about it — like voting to lower costs, expand healthcare access, improve our schools, and more alongside House Democrats — they are going into hiding. **This spineless behavior is not acceptable for members of Congress. They are acting like school-age children, hiding from their responsibilities instead of owning up to their votes.** Speaker Mike Johnson and his Republican caucus are skipping town hall meetings, postponing important committee markup meetings, and voting on nonsense legislation like renaming the Gulf of Mexico. I have had it with their cowardly behavior. If they are going to strip access to Medicaid, SNAP, Head Start, and more from my constituents, _then they need to answer for their actions._ **[I am hard at work delivering for CT-05 — and I am also working hard to defeat Republicans at the ballot box next year. name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: This is incredible
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Donald Trump’s plan is backfiring.
#

Team, this is incredible.
Donald Trump recently launched partisan investigations against ActBlue. He then doubled down on social media just days later, vaguely suggesting that officials at the company “should all be in jail.”
For years, ActBlue has helped organizations like ours raise money online. Those small-dollar donations are the reason why Donald Trump and his billionaire buddies can’t buy our elections.
They know that too — which is why they are trying to shut down the platform altogether.
**Unfortunately for them, their plan is backfiring.** The energy we’ve seen since his announcement has been through the roof — _just look at how our donations have SPIKED:_
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250508-1-no&t=1&akid=10407%2E3935704%2EmtVNVz)
Donald Trump and his friends are trying to silence you. We cannot let them take away our voices without a fight.
[**Help us continue raising a bullhorn against Donald Trump. Will you make your first grassroots donation to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250508-1-no&t=2&akid=10407%2E3935704%2EmtVNVz)

name: BREAKING NEWS ALERT
subject: Trump impeachment soon?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204ndqenyikeddu0oiygrosczay6351fa4jehwvi4ffsr9oxx43dxn16mvpl1voncs01385065r120to31f&__stmp=svylg9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svylg9&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jzjxvago5ptf034ezcqcbmjosdatepbel8fut5ztovl7q40g0m3eb718igysjfmf2sh27ba4gr9loz0eb3wut9nskj9ydd06g5y0lz2f2lmc55p1b1fr0fyj2jqx7wy1qi2xjwrs8r1c6d1zp65b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svylg9&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svylg9&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svylg9&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svylg9&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jzjxvago5ptf034ezcqcbmjocqck05zzd60k6o14uix28qcdctckhctd3pc6qqbgkpjq893lj34macczu8aq3hx7zg2xabn6cishg53rrro8s328ckj1zf96dgauaq5xd5dkc12s3sdras4kmgxe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svylg9&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svylg9&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
Senate Dems need you in this fight!
| **FIRST: Bernie Sanders launched his Fighting Oligarchy tour!

THEN: Cory Booker made HISTORY with his 25 hour speech on the Senate floor!

_NOW: Adam Schiff is SLAMMING Trump and his MAGA mob for putting billionaires over the American people! ⬇️_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89903?t=6&akid=19789%2E878179%2EfI_5ol) [**We need 2,000 supporters reading this to join the fight and THANK Senate Democrats like Sanders, Booker, and Schiff for always having our backs! You’ve been hand-selected »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89904?t=7&akid=19789%2E878179%2EfI_5ol) | [**THANK SENATE DEMOCRATS: DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89904?t=8&akid=19789%2E878179%2EfI_5ol)

TO: Senator Cory Booker
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Senate Democrats,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge against Donald Trump and his MAGA minions as they attack our democracy!**

I know that Trump has put a huge target on your backs — so it means the world that you aren’t backing down even a little bit.

**_Our work is far from over:_ Republicans are plotting to END Social Security and Medicaid, DESTROY the federal government, and make Trump an untouchable KING.**

As a proud Democrat, you have my word that I will join your fight and do _everything_ I can to help take back the Senate and stop this dangerous administration.

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89904?t=9&akid=19789%2E878179%2EfI_5ol) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89904?t=10&akid=19789%2E878179%2EfI_5ol)

**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: House Republicans move to sell off public lands
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI0NjU2MzQS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjIyMDExMDUxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
URGENT: House Republicans want to sell off public lands to polluters to pay for tax breaks for the wealthy. We can stop them, but we need your help to raise $30,000 by May 31 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Zzb0Mq- DEVELOPING... House Republicans are in committee meetings now, preparing to push forward the most destructive bill of Trump’s presidency. When he took office, Trump called for “one big, beautiful bill” covering
virtually every harmful MAGA priority, from cutting healthcare for low-income
people, to slashing pay for federal workers, to giving handouts to fossil fuel
executives and gutting clean energy incentives. As debate on that bill advances, one part of the plan is selling off public lands in order to fund tax cuts for billionaires. But Republicans have a problem: they know this is deeply unpopular, even with some in their own party. And if they lose more than three votes, their plan will fall apart. We have a real chance to stop them from selling off our nation’s public lands to
Big Polluters to enrich the wealthiest people in the country. But we need your help, Peter. We’re aiming to raise $30,000 to ramp up the pressure at this key moment. Will you renew today to help us stop Congress from pushing through any sale of public lands? $5 is all it takes >> https://links.messages.lcv. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP FOR $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. Let’s be clear: public lands belong to allof us. And people across the political spectrum want to see them protected and
open for everyone to enjoy. These are the places where people take their families to hike and fish, gather
with family and friends on once-in-a-lifetime trips, and connect with our shared
history and nature. These treasured landscapes power local economies and house
irreplaceable ecosystems. We need your help to protect them. Here’s what your gift will do: Power a grassroots movement to oppose the sale of public lands by organizing people to join protests and rallies around the country. Attacks on public lands are wildly unpopular in blue AND red states — and we need lawmakers on both sides of the aisle to feel the heat.
Support targeted actions to pressure Congress to protect public lands. That means making sure critical members of Congress are getting non-stop calls and letters from their constituents demanding protections for our lands.
Push for action at the state level. Your support funds our work with partners around the country to mobilize the public to demand action from state legislatures, too. Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike want to see public lands protected, not sold off for oil and gas drilling to fund tax cuts for the ultra-rich. This is a fight we can win. Your renewed support for just $5 will help us mobilize a movement, unify key House members to vote NO on selling off public lands, and protect our nation’s most treasured places. https://links.messages.lcv. Let’s send a message to Congress, loud and clear: we won’t let them take what
belongs to all of us to enrich polluters or bankroll tax cuts for the wealthy. Thank you for being with us in this fight. Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12465634&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIyMDExMDUxMgS2&spReportId=MjIyMDExMDUxMgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12465634&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIyMDExMDUxMgS2&spReportId=MjIyMDExMDUxMgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfE7wYwT_

Peter, after Marjorie Taylor Greene faced allegations of insider trading AND had protestors at her Georgia town hall TASED last month, Georgians are ready to fire her for good. And we’re seeing an INCREDIBLE surge in donations pouring in from every corner of the state ↘↘ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107343530/544381408/-40001252?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_050825_MTG_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWIwZmVhNy00YTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BQNEK6cde2dCoB0ko1xdRfEZCYzzkliASMtC1ffZFrY=) But we have a long way to go before we can declare victory. This week, Brian Kemp announced that he won’t be running for Senate in 2026 — meaning MTG is likely to jump into the race any day now. Every vote will matter, and we have no room for error if we want to keep Georgia’s Senate seat blue. And our Senate seat is the most important seat in the COUNTRY to protect if we want to retake the majority in 2026.
We have the energy and enthusiasm to keep Georgia’s Senate seat blue — but we can’t take anything for granted.
With MAGA dark money flooding our state like never before, now is the time to double down on our voter turnout efforts.
[It’s time for Marjorie Taylor Greene’s political career to come to a screeching halt. | Peter,

At the Emerge 20th Anniversary Gala last week, keynote speaker VP Kamala Harris delivered a powerful reminder: **in the face of fear comes courage.**

In just over 100 days since Donald Trump’s return to the White House, he’s threatened reckless trade wars that will invite a recession, ignored court orders threatening the people’s constitutional rights, and pushed for cuts to Medicaid and Social Security to pay for tax cuts for his ultra-wealthy donors and supporters.

Trump and his allies are abusing every loophole, testing our system of checks and balances, and consolidating power in pursuit of a narrow, self-serving vision for America – one where truth tellers are punished, loyalists are rewarded, and working families are left to fend for themselves.

subject: Your pocketbook > The Trump-Musk agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
Speaker Johnson and the MAGA Majority in Congress are so busy trying to execute the Trump-Musk agenda, they’ve turned their backs on working families.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344416/544384243/-629675555?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFkYTFiNzItNGQyYy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fFLusWV9Z0F8nGl8XFiCiDWhGia5FxQHCxOYPEv332k=) Friend, I’ve been in Congress for over 100 days, and I have yet to vote on a single bill that will lower costs for Oregonians. Not because I don’t want to. **_Because Mike Johnson won’t let me._** Speaker Johnson and the MAGA Majority in Congress are so busy trying to execute the Trump-Musk agenda, they’ve turned their backs on working families. They haven’t introduced a single cost-saving bill to the House floor in over 100 days – **and I won’t stand for it.** **Congress’ priority should be combating rising costs, lowering prescription drug prices, and providing relief for hard working families.[If you agree, will you add your name today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344417/544384244/-179142022?refcode=email_050825_costs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFkYTFiNzItNGQyYy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fFLusWV9Z0F8nGl8XFiCiDWhGia5FxQHCxOYPEv332k=&emci=5ea941d5-862b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=81da1b72-4d2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=14434323)** **[ADD YOUR NAME: Tell Speaker Johnson to bring a cost-fighting bill to the House floor!>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344418/544384245/-179142022?refcode=email_050825_costs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFkYTFiNzItNGQyYy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fFLusWV9Z0F8nGl8XFiCiDWhGia5FxQHCxOYPEv332k=&emci=5ea941d5-862b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=81da1b72-4d2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=14434323)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344419/544384246/-179142022?refcode=email_050825_costs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFkYTFiNzItNGQyYy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fFLusWV9Z0F8nGl8XFiCiDWhGia5FxQHCxOYPEv332k=&emci=5ea941d5-862b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=81da1b72-4d2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=14434323)

subject: What Barack Obama said about Haley Stevens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Folks: Democratic Congresswoman Haley Stevens just announced she’s running for Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat! [**(You can become a Founding Donor to her battleground campaign – which The Cook Political Report has already rated a “Toss Up” – by splitting a $20 donation between our campaign and Seth Moulton here.)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344446/544384364/698416938?refcode=250508_MFC_Stevens_ObamaVal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQyZjA0OS00ZDJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ssu236PDFBYtEGDRdSZo1udiKAp-WVq7XpCNvOfOAW0=) Rep. Stevens has a proven track record of fighting for Michiganders, the Michigan economy, and good union jobs. In fact, before her time in Congress, Rep. Stevens was chief of staff for the U.S. Auto Rescue Task Force under President Barack Obama, _**which saved over 200,000 Michigan jobs.**_ _**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344447/544384365/698416938?refcode=250508_MFC_Stevens_ObamaVal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQyZjA0OS00ZDJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ssu236PDFBYtEGDRdSZo1udiKAp-WVq7XpCNvOfOAW0=)**_ Michigan has long been the backbone of the American economy, but right now, Donald Trump’s shoot-from-the-hip tariffs are causing chaos and uncertainty throughout the economy, especially in the auto industry. That’s why we need strong Democrats like Haley Stevens in the U.S. Senate to help take back our Senate majority and serve as the ultimate check on Trump’s reckless agenda. But with Michigan’s Senate race set to be one of the most expensive and competitive of the midterms, Haley needs a strong grassroots team to help her compete against Trump and the GOP, who are slated to shell out tens of millions of dollars to defeat her. **As her campaign gets underway, can we count on you to help us hit our $1 million launch goal? We’re counting on your grassroots support to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats.[Click here to become a Founding Donor and split a gift between Seth Moulton and our grassroots campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344448/544384366/698416938?refcode=250508_MFC_Stevens_ObamaVal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQyZjA0OS00ZDJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ssu236PDFBYtEGDRdSZo1udiKAp-WVq7XpCNvOfOAW0=)** Thank you, Team Haley

subject: I could very well be facing my toughest and most expensive reelection race ever.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344550/544384729/339890710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM2_250508_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDA4ZjE2Ny00ZTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8MSFGZ6sreZ21cfAho_3k4v6t91Si3K1W-OA8yI0eo=) Derek,

I just checked in with my team about our fundraising numbers for the month, and unfortunately, we're not where we wanted to be by now. Here's why I'm asking you to [_**chip in to my reelection campaign**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344551/544384730/339890710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM2_250508_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDA4ZjE2Ny00ZTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8MSFGZ6sreZ21cfAho_3k4v6t91Si3K1W-OA8yI0eo=), and why we can't afford to fall short of our fundraising benchmarks.

As I dive into this 2026 campaign—an election where the very future of our country is going to be at stake, an election where we’ll see if Democrats have what it takes to stand up to the Trump administration— _I have to be realistic._

Look at the presidential election. Billionaires were virtually willing to spend _anything_ and go through any dark money channel to buy a policy from the Trump administration. **It would be naive of me _not_ to expect that these same powerful folks put up a $50 or $100 million superPAC against me.**

We have to be ready. I could very well be facing my toughest and most expensive reelection race ever.

[_**So, Derek, even if it’s $5 or $25, if you can chip in to my reelection campaign to protect my seat and help Democrats take back the Senate, it makes a huge difference.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344552/544384731/339890710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM2_250508_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDA4ZjE2Ny00ZTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8MSFGZ6sreZ21cfAho_3k4v6t91Si3K1W-OA8yI0eo=) Peter,
In case you missed it, Governors Hochul and Walz participated in the Meidas Touch Democratic Governors' town hall about Trump’s first 100 days in office last week.
They joined Governors J.B. Pritzker and Maura Healey to talk about how Democrats have stood strong and fought back against the extremism of the Trump administration.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344681/544385527/1285346561?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGMzZWI1ZS00ZjJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbcWz7V-a_xg-ZBfCbMtwSBKcRwQC_xdgVuGo26-HWY=)
As Governor Hochul told the thousands of people watching the livestream,
_“We need to organize, take this anxiety and anger, and turn it into action. Action means we’re mobilizing already for 2026.”_
**100 days of Trump down, a lot more to go — but we’re better off if we band together and fight back against the harmful agenda from Trump. **
That’s how we’ll defeat his policies and protect our progress here in New York, Minnesota, and beyond.

name: Karen Bass
subject: Preparing for the 2028 Olympic Games
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Re-Elect Karen Bass for Mayor 2026 (FPPC ID #1471359)
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344813/544385763/-1881768774?refcode=AU_KRB_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250508_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGRlMWE2NS00ZjJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEubDk3ilD4CXNo0wYaX8UZ6c9vBLU1rZlrsMWr9Ab4=)
---
Hi there, it’s Mayor Karen Bass. The City of L.A. is hitting the ground running to prepare Los Angeles to host the 2028 Olympic Games. **Today, I am proud to announce that the historic Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum will play a vital role in the 2028 Olympics — becoming the first ever venue to host the Olympics in three different Summer Games.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107344814/544385765/-120583419?refcode=AU_KRB_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250508_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGRlMWE2NS00ZjJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEubDk3ilD4CXNo0wYaX8UZ6c9vBLU1rZlrsMWr9Ab4=) Hosting the Olympic Games is a generational opportunity — one that will benefit Angelenos as we prepare, as well as for decades after the Games are played. Our preparations are well underway to support local small businesses, fuel job creation, and create environmental and transportation improvements throughout Los Angeles. We must continue our vital progress to ensure L.A. is ready for the Olympic Games. Thank you for being a part of this work. **Eric Holder Statement on Federal Court Ordering Alabama to Maintain a Voting Rights Act-Compliant Congressional Map**
Today, Eric H. Holder, Jr., the 82nd Attorney General of the United States, issued the following statement on an Alabama trial court’s decision in _Caster v. Allen_ , reaffirming that under the Voting Rights Act (VRA), Alabama must have two Black opportunity districts:
“This is a good day for democracy. The generations of Black Alabamians who fought to achieve equal representation had their sacrifice and commitment recognized today. Because of their tenacity and hard work, Black Alabamians will continue to vote on a fair congressional map that gives them their legally mandated voting power and allows them to elect a candidate of their choice in two districts.
“The relentless efforts of some in Alabama to deny black state citizens the rights they deserve and force them to vote on a racially discriminatory map are truly shameful—but their failure is also instructive. The court has made clear that the anti-democracy forces attempting to reverse new, more fair Voting Rights Act-compliant maps in other states will not succeed in taking this nation backwards.”

[All On The Line](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107345461/544387927/-1578943632?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhNmE1ZmNlLTRmMmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eLJCHUZ_U6w_JM0yFUz01NQnJZLlTiyDum01kl0N1W8=&emci=9d075a69-442c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ba6a5fce-4f2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=8431045) is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. body:
It’s likely that people in the 1950s couldn’t have imagined how much the U.S. job market would change over the next few decades — or how quickly innovation would make once-common jobs almost obsolete.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Roger Stone just called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I called out Trump for his blatant corruption... In response, they sent Roger Stone after me.
#

Trump’s longtime political advisor, Roger Stone, just called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
You heard me right.
I called out Trump for his blatant corruption — making millions of dollars from his own crypto coins — and I co-sponsored a bill to make it illegal for the President, the Vice President, administration officials, and members of Congress to do the same.
In response, they sent Roger Stone after me.
When I joined the Navy, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. I did it again when I was sworn in as Arizona’s United States Senator. I will continue to uphold that oath, and because it matters to our democracy, I will do everything I can to stop the blatant corruption in Washington.
Guys like Donald Trump and Roger Stone are only looking out for themselves. And it’s clear they’re scared of the attention we’re bringing to them and their corrupt deeds.
I’ll be honest with you, though. If Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and now Roger Stone are all lining up against me, it’s going to take a big team to fight back.
[**Please, if you can afford it, make a donation as we take on the corruption in Washington and fight back against the Trump Administration. It adds up fast when lots of people are chipping in.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-may25.akVXmo&refcode=em250508-1-500&t=1&akid=6064%2E6688874%2E1KRR8a)

Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem went to war against notorious Democrat clown Sen. Chris Van Hollen for his defense of illegal alien and suspected gang member Kilmar Abrego Garcia.
**[He had to learn the hard way...](https://substack.com/redirect/cc8c4198-c250-4f8f-a24b-86e817b97aef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/cc8c4198-c250-4f8f-a24b-86e817b97aef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cc8c4198-c250-4f8f-a24b-86e817b97aef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Van Hollen grilled Noem during an explosive senate hearing on Tuesday about the deportation of criminal aliens to El Salvador. He immediately took an aggressive and unfriendly tone.
"I just asked you Madam Secretary whether or not you or the Department of Homeland Security are taking any action to facilitate the 9-0 Supreme Court decision to facilitate his return, this is a very simple question!" Van Hollen told Noem.
"This administration is complying all federal court orders," Noem answered, triggering Van Hollen.
"That's not what I asked you!" the senator snapped.
**[Noem said decided to say the quiet part out loud,](https://substack.com/redirect/cc8c4198-c250-4f8f-a24b-86e817b97aef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "You're advocacy for a known terrorists is alarming to me! He's a human smuggler and a terrorists and he's not a U.S. citizen!"
Watch the heated moment here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/cc8c4198-c250-4f8f-a24b-86e817b97aef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Brandon Gill makes witness PANIC, exposes damning past tweets mocking conservative parents**
GOP Rep. Brandon Gill grilled U.S. Fencing official Damien Lehfeldt, surfacing his eyebrow-raising past tweets mocking concerned parents of female athletes forced to compete against biological males.
**[Gill has no mercy and makes pay for what he said...](https://substack.com/redirect/ad2fda2e-7189-4821-8953-14ed8d9801b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ad2fda2e-7189-4821-8953-14ed8d9801b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ad2fda2e-7189-4821-8953-14ed8d9801b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Do you think that parents who don't want their daughters competing against men in women's sports are 'whiny?'" Gill asked.
"No sir," Lehfeldt quickly answered.
"Why did you write that on social media? I've got a picture here where you've posted that," gill said, holding up a print of his tweet. "You were allegedly responding to a parent who didn't want their daughter being beaten up by men in sports competition. You said 'I'm not going to pull her from the sport and write a whiny email announcing my departure.'"
"I want to be crystal clear, that was an inappropriate message," Lehfeldt said.
"Do you think that (parents) are cowardly Why did you write that on social media?!" Gill pressed again.
"No, I regret it sir, I deleted it shortly after posting it, I certainly don't feel that way," Lehfeldt backpedaled.
Watch Gill take this woke witness to the wood shed live in front of the nation:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ad2fda2e-7189-4821-8953-14ed8d9801b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: John Fetterman
subject: this one hit close to home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10081%2E434096%2EwC8gWA)
| | |
---
Hey, Derek, it’s John, and **this one hit close to home.** 👇

You might have seen the news: **The Trump administration has placed the majority of AmeriCorps members on leave.** That means folks who signed up to volunteer in their communities – and live on a stipend of about $13 a day – have been forced out.
This is ridiculous. AmeriCorps has bipartisan support, and I can tell you firsthand: These people make the world a better place. 💯
I joined AmeriCorps in 1995 and served at the Hill House in Pittsburgh’s historic Hill District. I taught GED classes and helped set up the neighborhood’s first computer labs. It changed my life. And it helped my community.

**👉 AmeriCorps brings people together. It isn’t a part of some “woke” agenda or culture war bullsh*t. It’s national service. It’s the best of us.**
And Trump wants to gut it – why? So he can give himself + his rich pals another tax break? Now _that’s_ a bullsh*t agenda.
[**🚨 We need to speak up. If you can afford it, I've set a goal to raise $5,000 to show there is overwhelming public support for these programs and the good folks who serve in them. Will you toss in $5 to help me fight back against these cuts?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50993?refcode=jtk88-fr-fl&t=2&akid=10081%2E434096%2EwC8gWA)
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk88-fr-fl&t=3&akid=10081%2E434096%2EwC8gWA)
---
Trust me – nobody joins AmeriCorps to get rich. They do it because they *care.* Because they want to serve. Because they want to give back to their communities.

👉 Tutoring kids. Helping senior citizens. Fixing homes after hurricanes. Supporting veterans.
AmeriCorps members do good work day in and day out, and now Trump’s guys are telling them to f*ck off.
**We need to come together for this. We gotta tell the Trump administration:[Put AmeriCorps workers back on the job NOW. Stop screwing with people who are *actually* trying to make their communities better. Will you join me in this fight by giving $5 before midnight? ](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50993?refcode=jtk88-fr-fl&t=4&akid=10081%2E434096%2EwC8gWA)**
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk88-fr-fl&t=5&akid=10081%2E434096%2EwC8gWA)
---
Thanks so much. Public service means a lot to me, and I appreciate your support.

John ❤️

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=jtk88-fr-fl-footer&t=6&refcode2=10081_434096_wC8gWA&akid=10081%2E434096%2EwC8gWA)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

subject: You're Registered to Vote, Now What?

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/NPP_Ed_logo_RGB_green1-01.jpg]
Hi Friend,
Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter!
In our previous edition we warned about the slippery slope we were in when it came to deportations.
Since, the Trump regime has wrongly detained dozens of U.S. citizens — including a ten-year-old Texas girl [https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/us-citizen-child-recovering-brain-cancer-deported-mexico-undocumented-rcna196049] recovering from brain cancer, a 19-year-old U.S. citizen with learning disabilities who was [https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/04/us-citizen-jose-hermosillo-wrongly-detained-ice-patrol-governments-account-false/?fbclid=IwY2xjawJ2Qi9leHRuA2FlbQIxMQBicmlkETFPbU5wOTFVREhWYktoNnc5AR7Fe9oVKjamHuG3WmhfyvfnCRNedF3MORvKe81-https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/04/us-citizen-jose-hermosillo-wrongly-detained-ice-patrol-governments-account-false/] wrongfully incarcerated [https://popular.info/p/federal-immigration-authorities-wrongfully] for 10 days in a privately run immigration detention facility in Arizona or a 20-year-old born in Georgia [https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/us-born-citizen-detained-ice-immigration-florida-rcna201800] , and arrested in Florida.
All mistakes, that cause fear in the American population. The deportation of Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, who, due to an “administrative error,” was sent to a dangerous and violent mega-prison in El Salvador, does not help ease the fear.
The Fifth and Fourteenth Amendments to the Constitution [https://www.law.cornell.edu/wex/due_process] establish the right to due process — the Fifth Amendment says that “[n]o person shall ... be deprived of life, liberty, or property, without due process of law.” The Fourteenth Amendment extends this obligation to the states.
No PERSON. This is true even for the undocumented, even if someone is here without authorization.
Due process for Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, should have included notice of deportation and the opportunity to contest it before it happened. Now even as the Supreme Court has ruled for his return, he has yet to be returned home
We remember Fannie Lou Hamer's statement: "No one is free until everyone is free," which is more relevant today than ever.
REGISTER TO VOTE [https://vote.pa/check/?org=nppef]
Social Media of the Week
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/Screenshot%202025-04-24%20110558.png] "I'll tell you what freedom is to me: no fear." – Nina Simone
Nina Simone was a classically trained pianist (not common for a young Black woman in the 1950s) who fused her foundation with jazz, gospel, blues, and folk to create a sound entirely her own, defying all genres.
She didn’t fit into a box or label, nor did she try to.
Simone was denied entry to a prestigious music school, the Curtis Institute of Music in Philadelphia, because of her race. This moment fueled her lifelong work in civil rights.
Her songs like “Mississippi Goddam” became an anthem for civil rights and Black empowerment nationally.
"An artist's duty is to reflect the times." – Nina Simone
#NinaSimone [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/ninasimone?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R] #BlackHistory [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/blackhistory?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R] #CivilRights [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/civilrights?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R]
SHARE ON FACEBOOK [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/ [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
Let's save our planet by saving our democracy.

Happy #EarthDay [https://www.instagram.com/explore/tags/earthday/] from NPPEF - remember you have the choice to voice your vote for leaders and legislations that protect our only home, planet Earth.
SHARE ON INSTAGRAM [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7237344C447445787878394747342B75584E47375A57552F745265427662334B544A4A36505A58657A5871474B7A5A6E53705571424758325657365969365747/editor_images/WCM%20logo.JPG] #CourtsMatter
The U.S. Justice Department withdrew its lawsuit [https://triblive.com/news/pennsylvania/justice-department-drops-lawsuit-accusing-pennsylvania-city-of-diluting-power-of-hispanic-voters/] that accused the heavily Hispanic city of Hazleton in Pennsylvania of illegally diluting the political power of its growing Hispanic population. The department’s initial lawsuit, filed in January, said the “at-large” system of electing city council members, as opposed to electing them by district, was unfair to Hispanic voters and prevented them from getting elected to city council. Hazleton’s 30,000 residents are about two-thirds Hispanic, according to U.S. Census figures. One-third is non-Hispanic white.
Closer to Philadelphia, the largest health system in Delaware County began closing two hospitals [https://6abc.com/post/crozer-health-hospital-emergency-rooms-stop-accepting-patients/16228691/] Wednesday after a federal judge in Texas approved their bankruptcy proceedings. The emergency rooms of Taylor Hospital in Ridley Park and Crozer-Chester Medical Center in Upland are expected to close today, Friday, April 25th. Emergency medical services will end next Friday, on May 2. Crozer's ambulatory centers at Brinton Lakes, Broomall, Haverford, and Media are expected to remain open.
This November, voters will have the power to retain or vacate three seats of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
The votes cast by powerful Pennsylvania voters in November will impact our lives for years to come, as Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court will make decisions about our election administration, immigrant rights. access to abortion, the safety of our workplaces, how bankruptcies are handled, and the right to unionize. Make sure you can voice your vote!
CHECK YOUR REGISTRATION [https://vote.pa/check/?org=nppef]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/DelCo_2.png] We are hiring!
Let's provide civic education together!
We're looking for people passionate about voting rights in Erie, Lawrence, Lehigh Valley, Bucks, Montgomery, Chester, and Delaware County to help us shape the future of Pennsylvania.
Join our team and help us provide civic education in our communities and register folks to vote!
Positions start at $20 an hour.
Interested? Contact jobs@nppef.org
EMAIL US [jobs@nppef.org]
News You Can Use
State Rep. David Rowe (R-Union) wants to introduce a bill to make it easier for hunters and fishermen to get registered to vote [https://www.palegis.us/house/co-sponsorship/memo?memoID=46210] . He represents a lot of sportsmen in the rural 85th state House District, which includes parts of Union, Juniata, and Mifflin counties and all of Snyder County.
“The bill will not complicate the process of getting a license. The bill will not add another step to the hunting license process,” Rowe told Capital-Star [https://penncapital-star.com/government-politics/general-assembly/state-rep-david-rowe-wants-to-make-it-easier-for-sportsmen-to-register-to-vote/] . “Rather, it will simply make it more accessible. So, for sportsmen that are going to a state office, there will be paper registration forms available for them to simply grab.”
As a voting rights organization, we applaud all legislation that would make it easier for people to register to vote, and make our voices to be heard at the ballot box.
Meanwhile, Pennsylvania’s first two openly autistic legislators, State Reps. Jessica Behnam (D-Allegheny) and Abigail Sailsbury (D-Allegheny), condemned the comments made by the Department of Health Secretary, Robert F. Kennedy Jr., attacking autistic people [https://www.witf.org/2025/04/23/pa-lawmakers-some-on-the-autism-spectrum-denounce-rfk-jr-comments/] . They are also opposed to his plan to collect private medical records from US citizens to research autism. Remember that slippery slope regarding immigrant deportations?
And if you are waiting for a tax return but have defaulted student loans, there is a chance the government will garnish your return and even your wages. The Department of Education announced Monday it will restart collections on defaulted federal student loans on May 5 [https://thehill.com/homenews/education/5259465-education-department-defaulted-federal-student-loans-debt-collection-trump-mcmahon] , including potentially garnishing wages for millions of workers. The Treasury Offset Program allows the government to withhold federal payments such as tax returns for individuals in default. After a 30-day notice, the federal government could also begin garnishing a borrower’s wages. So make sure to check your statement.
NPPEF on the Ground
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/IMG_2941.jpg] Engaging the young
Regional Organizing Director, Daniel Levin providing civil education to students. Did you know that as long as a student is 18 years of age on or before the day of the next election - they can register to vote?
Many 17 year old students don't know this and might pass up the opportunity to register to vote, thinking they have to be 18 at time of registering.
It's our passion to bridge the gap here on civic education.
