clean_body: My updates from the last few months. | | | | | A NOTE FROM CHRISSY | | my bipartisan bill PASSED THE HOUSE There isn’t a lot that Democrats and Republicans in Congress agree on these days but one glimmer of hope was the unanimous passage of my bill, the Mathematical and Statistical Modeling Education Act. This bill will provide grants to K-12 schools to support innovative STEM curricula, ensuring our students can become the best in the world and are not left behind in the global economy. Now, I urge the Senate to also pass this bill so we can get it signed into law. Learn more about the bill . | | HUMANITARIAN AID TO GAZA As famine spreads and the loss of life continues, I joined almost 100 of my fellow Democrats in Congress to call on the Israeli government to lift the blockade of humanitarian assistance into Gaza. While I share concerns about Hamas diverting the aid, I believe the United States, the Israeli government, and humanitarian organizations on the ground should do what they can to minimize the risk and get the relief to Palestinian civilians. | | PAID LEAVE IN PENNSYLVANIA I’ve been a leader on pushing paid leave policies at the federal level. In fact, I introduced bipartisan legislation last week on paid leave - legislation that was more than two years in the making. The Pennsylvania House Labor and Industry Committee has advanced the Family Care Act, a bill to create a paid family leave program in our state and I'm encouraged to see paid leave progressing in Pennsylvania. I urge State Rep. McClinton to bring this bill to the statehouse floor for a vote to show the rest of the nation what’s possible and provide this crucial benefit to Pennsylvanians. I’ll keep doing the same in Washington. | | I VOTED "NO" ON THE SAVE ACT In April, House GOP Representatives passed the SAVE Act, an extremely misleading bill that will make it more difficult for all Americans to vote – especially women and troops stationed overseas. This is not voter reform, it's voter suppression – and it will impact thousands of people in Berks and Chester counties. As your elected representative, working tirelessly to protect our democracy, this was an easy NO vote for me. | | SIGNALGATE We learned that senior national security officials, including Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, shared war planning information over a Signal group chat, putting our national security and the lives of troops at risk. Like you, I was shocked. As an Air Force veteran and a member of the House Intelligence Committee, I understand – to my core – how reckless and dangerous this behavior is. That's why I introduced legislation to require Secretary Hegseth to do the right thing and step down. I’m fighting to hold those responsible accountable – and I won't stop until they are. | | PENN STATE BERKS COMMENCEMENT On Saturday, I have the honor of speaking to this year’s Penn State Berks graduating class. It's an absolute privilege to speak to the next generation of leaders, and I can't thank Penn State enough for having me. I wish you a terrific Mother’s Day weekend. There's work to be done, Chrissy | | = | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. Box 222 Devon, PA 19333 United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. name: Ro Khanna
subject: We won't let Republicans ignore us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
FIRST: We held successful “Benefits Over Billionaires” town halls in red congressional districts in California, New Jersey, and Nebraska. Thousands showed up to protest cuts to Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare.
THEN: I announced two new town halls in Lehigh and Bucks County, Pennsylvania.
NOW: Republican Rep. Ryan Mackenzie, who represents Allentown, is attacking me for doing what he won’t—listening to his constituents.
People are angry. So am I. That’s why we’re holding these town halls, to hold Republicans’ feet to the fire and stop the attack on working people.
If you’re with me, will you rush a donation of $5 or more today? Your contribution will help us to cover the variety of expenses associated with these town halls and allow us to stay on the road to reach as many people as possible nationwide. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benefits-over-billionaires-town-halls?refcode=20250508-allentown&amount=5]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benefits-over-billionaires-town-halls?refcode=20250508-allentown [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benefits-over-billionaires-town-halls?refcode=20250508-allentown]
As Republicans follow orders to dodge their constituents, Democrats must be loud and clear in rejecting the failed policies that put billionaires and corporations over the working class:
* NO to $880 billion in Medicaid cuts.
* NO to gutting Social Security benefits.
* NO to cuts to Medicare.
* NO to Tax breaks for corporations and the ultra-wealthy.
Will you help me get back out on the road to lift up local leaders and fight back against Trump’s agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benefits-over-billionaires-town-halls?refcode=20250508-allentown]
These town halls would not be possible without thousands of people like you chipping in $5, $10, or $20. I don’t take a dime of PAC money or lobbyist money. That means these town halls are funded completely by supporters like you. By the people, for the people.
If you can support our people-powered campaign, please contribute what you can.
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benefits-over-billionaires-town-halls?refcode=20250508-allentown&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benefits-over-billionaires-town-halls?refcode=20250508-allentown&amount=10]
DONATE $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benefits-over-billionaires-town-halls?refcode=20250508-allentown&amount=20]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benefits-over-billionaires-town-halls?refcode=20250508-allentown]
Thanks for your support, your activism, and everything you do.
Onward,
Ro

clean_body: [] Peter, FIRST: We held successful “Benefits Over Billionaires” town halls in red congressional districts in California, New Jersey, and Nebraska. Thousands showed up to protest cuts to Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare. THEN: I announced two new town halls in Lehigh and Bucks County, Pennsylvania. NOW: Republican Rep. Ryan Mackenzie, who represents Allentown, is attacking me for doing what he won’t—listening to his constituents. People are angry. So am I. That’s why we’re holding these town halls, to hold Republicans’ feet to the fire and stop the attack on working people. If you’re with me, will you rush a donation of $5 or more today? Your contribution will help us to cover the variety of expenses associated with these town halls and allow us to stay on the road to reach as many people as possible nationwide. [] [] As Republicans follow orders to dodge their constituents, Democrats must be loud and clear in rejecting the failed policies that put billionaires and corporations over the working class: NO to $880 billion in Medicaid cuts. NO to gutting Social Security benefits. NO to cuts to Medicare. NO to Tax breaks for corporations and the ultra-wealthy. Will you help me get back out on the road to lift up local leaders and fight back against Trump’s agenda? [] These town halls would not be possible without thousands of people like you chipping in $5, $10, or $20. I don’t take a dime of PAC money or lobbyist money. That means these town halls are funded completely by supporters like you. By the people, for the people. If you can support our people-powered campaign, please contribute what you can. DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $20 [] DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Thanks for your support, your activism, and everything you do. body:
Healthcare and nutrition are basic needs, and proposed cuts to programs will threaten lives. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWDFlqPLdtQYTJwzUWH5Piz1im0ZsTiJ0MyN6wpPfMg5igT6obfctcvNJLF7xkTZYBkYXOBjDOar884V1vI_AWDcojbY3tztd9dx8D0YWNOzXP1_phtOA52h-Tc5zQdnEMgHauDuZxs9Yde5iaAVWPrFm46lbnvm8zympVOedAIkjHq8PBkjoWVKfISi2lwICU/4gb/4EY84PngSCGZZaYhwzqk3Q/h0/h001.vCsCtPYlvGXD58u9V2knvLS4IGOMvJODd46A7oRvCTg)

Friend, Congressional Republicans are trying to fast-track a budget that takes critical health and nutrition programs away from our communities in order to pay for even more tax breaks for billionaires and large corporations. They know this is deeply unpopular with the American people, which is why they are attempting to hold this budget vote quickly, within the next two weeks. **My Democratic colleagues and I are fighting back. This week, we introduced a Hands Off Medicaid and SNAP discharge petition, which, if passed, would prevent the largest cuts to Medicaid and food assistance ever.** Right now, 101 of my colleagues and I have added our names to the discharge petition. We need 218 signers in order to force a vote in the House of Representatives. [**Click here to add your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of the Hands Off Medicaid and SNAP discharge petition and demand Congress act to protect these life-saving programs!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9Fm2Mas4UdC2klm0c-ARXo9KZqkD2XBimLszUXQWgUjZV-BjO6uc4cI2YUwUIezh9r5asdNRw2hQ9kHwoNF-P4kuMPME4V0i-7iA9m4ogPEkadaPs0UdR4acZDCtQ6aSGCCfhbXe8Zs-w8S6RDVFwRmXOCVBWKYsrBeGQq6DWdRMwes10RKLMXCno6ZqTDZDOtzdAITOUeNS9lRHktKGFR-OnjS8Ek7JkEShLoz2hoQ-X1cEOc3jH315Gg26MjuxRHrtCh4mAY4cD06tb6gdQlv4k6_6za-0IjAf9PXdcKjF_CW9DhoXEt2UtyL1GSMo8MG6_Sa22Ys0I3wAsbI9ZNZ7rnC5KlP6xv7TozzqNIkOMNWPShCvA79UHrRwAB-tl5R/4gb/4EY84PngSCGZZaYhwzqk3Q/h1/h001.v_VPumIOop7pOdrXJ9vafJkFVKmcpM0_SjlzVMEBGEU) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9Fm2Mas4UdC2klm0c-ARXo9KZqkD2XBimLszUXQWgUjZV-BjO6uc4cI2YUwUIezh9r5asdNRw2hQ9kHwoNF-P4kuMPME4V0i-7iA9m4ogPEkadQEJ26Cok8OTKplUJxxIusbKppoCDkO2OSCf943_J5m60FhdPYr9tiF1LBd0_sRtL_8dY6yxpV5r6RyJvuNpPfXW1dN6VGlBuolSAZnvaAIZkYnJi1m4ORwhAPGbDe5g-GtN3bfDg8ZpnQJKQljy7hF7_zUsDFwf0802_438VxG-VD-F0xexF18bJEEXZL7SGZ7BE971URJrd56dlq3GxSFjGMjic5nuPOFABv2eczzFOayLtUEHfNNFKBUD_N10BkMwjdWjhPdCqxKoTSQsSK/4gb/4EY84PngSCGZZaYhwzqk3Q/h2/h001.Gpk6d9_7dKcOCHl8IA9VTS9Mbed_Tr3ABzRh3LsqUSo)
---
Nearly 80 million people rely on Medicaid and the Children’s Health Insurance Program (CHIP) to meet their basic healthcare needs.1 And more than 40 million people rely on SNAP nutrition benefits each month to put food on the table.2
But that only just begins to tell the story of the critical impact that Medicaid and SNAP have on our communities. More than 40% of births in the U.S. are covered by Medicaid, including roughly 50% of births in rural areas.3
Medicaid also covers more than 60% of nursing home care, making it the primary funder for the majority of nursing home residents in the U.S.4
**Proposed cuts to nutrition benefits will impact kids, veterans, seniors, people with disabilities, and more.** Food security is linked to so much more than just reducing hunger.
Having enough nutritious food has health, life, school, and work benefits that affect every aspect of our lives. SNAP improves food security and allows families to maintain healthy diets, which in turn leads to long-term positive health outcomes.5
Plus, each $1 spent on SNAP generates more than $1.50 in economic activity, supporting local farmers and grocery stores while also creating jobs.6
**Healthcare and nutrition are basic needs.** Cutting these to pay for more tax cuts for billionaires is obscene.
[**Add your name now as a grassroots co-sponsor of the Hands Off Medicaid and SNAP discharge petition to demand Congress block any cuts to Medicaid and SNAP in the forthcoming budget.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9Fm2Mas4UdC2klm0c-ARXo9KZqkD2XBimLszUXQWgUjZV-BjO6uc4cI2YUwUIezh9r5asdNRw2hQ9kHwoNF-P4kuMPME4V0i-7iA9m4ogPEkafFtwhbw1iV3T_QvGt6h7WgLHbtlFqATFfF1DjgteeisEmSiYyMQhuD61IPWSb51eGfPVkSJrs4hyttRODLiPy8OWfIvco3v-vJ0nxco_BJnuHf44dPp9yQpVIWlMwxNc4NcStEdCOP--BrntOu5xNCc90pI6W71YEU-55NJTpipXlro_d6NKX9Ac769Es7EEfh2OChPXrO-YgznxwDJw3EDLca0TgkUjk__IZzLfsatJnQcY4Z3kP8FC4uhZHaZuNvHXHIBkMjxhzH891Wfc6r/4gb/4EY84PngSCGZZaYhwzqk3Q/h3/h001.Sz9W6fCGmfQOZxeyzJr0J5XSF1Jj23kaaNQrZ2-WqVQ)
Together, we’re standing up to the billionaire bullies who seek to control our democracy and steal from our communities.
Always serving you,
Rashida

name: Tim Hogan (via Democrats.org)
subject: Introduction:
body:
It’s Tim Hogan, the new War Room Director at the DNC.
---
Hi Derek, It’s Tim Hogan, the new War Room director at the DNC. The War Room is the DNC’s new rapid response operation to innovate in how Democrats communicate and hold the Trump administration accountable. In leading this work, my job is to make sure we effectively share Democratic wins online, strengthen our opposition to Trump, and implement an expansive research operation to put Republicans on defense in their districts. To do all of this, we’ll need resources to hire talented and diverse staff and build long-lasting Democratic infrastructure. That’s why I'm writing to ask you to make a donation to the DNC. $3, that's the ask. $3 to drive a cohesive daily message emphasizing the harm that Trump and his allies are doing to millions of people. $3 to leverage a deep bench of surrogates to reach beyond Democrats’ traditional audiences and make sure our message is reaching people all over the country, online, in Republican spaces, and beyond. $3 to expand our media monitoring and research operation to ensure that we’re countering Trump and his allies’ consequential lies in every appearance, interview or social media post. No donation is too small. I’ve spent the last 15 years working at the intersection of politics and media on campaigns to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, especially in the Midwest. I know better than anyone that it’s time for the Democrats to step up our social media presence and to build online infrastructure that lasts for years to come. Any amount will help us build the foundation we’ll need. The number of donations we'll receive from Democrats like you will take care of the rest. [Can you please use this link to contribute $3 (or whatever you can afford) directly to the Democratic National Committee to help us build the strongest possible Party? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250508_3373_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3373_22930333_SisoPA&akid=3373%2E22930333%2ESisoPA) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250508_3373_fr&refcode2=3373_22930333_SisoPA&akid=3373%2E22930333%2ESisoPA)**

Tim

body:

Peter, I am shocked. I have reached out to 50+ supporters today, and you are the first person who has taken the time to read my message.

I sincerely hope that you listen to what I need to say.

Now, since you are doing me a favor, I want to be completely honest with you..... However, I fear you might not like what I have to say.

I am Young Kim, an immigrant, a mother, a conservative American Patriot, and a chief irritant to career politicians in Washington.

Unfortunately, I do not fit in the category that many in Washington would like to place me in:

I am a woman, I own a small business, and I am **NOT** a part of the wealthy elite. I was not born as an American citizen, and English is not my first language. However, I am a proud American Patriot, tried and true.

Now, I am in Washington fighting for **YOU** and other everyday Americans who want to see lower taxes and the American Dream protected.

But, I am **REVOLTED** by what I've seen here, and you should be too.

Peter, so many in Washington don't care about you, but I do.

There are too many politicians who are there for themselves, furthering their own agendas and tossing the everyday American, like you and me, under the bus. They want **MORE** power, **MORE** influence, and **MORE** money - all for themselves. These lawmakers do not care about you, and it is **APPALLING**.

All I can say is: I call it like I see it, and I do not like what I've seen, but I will never let these career politicians forget about **YOU**. This is how I have found myself as a major target of Left-Wing Super PACs and Democrat campaign funds, who are desperately trying to defeat my battleground campaign in this cycle.

Again, to be forthcoming..... I fear this time they have a good chance to succeed if I do not meet my fundraising goals. | | | [CHIP IN TO SUPPORT YOUNG KIM](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/IiotMcdqacPy9D7Fm2ZDVla-5jHgUvxyJOT6j9mxjyhdDTJCrySlPPzNXFSYQiT232KKDJyaxP7CXCwmaZOQEcNaRqnLuiz3awQdfwE3CeK6ezeiuvEppgLKBx3JOBTo_Ddp57QdIQtT3l82N5ViV6G154RT6GqLLcYog2okYtHTu3KA5V-IGLYVzYqWhfHUHZC6TE6hq_hRTmCvS0xiFMDNWMmajYgILJ6mEuQVvgEmLQxK03AztoCwUrJ1GMHjVtj1roSxsBrAFUG7HSdVNXNzZZYRM3e2u5jTRkGd8uLAJZn7LDEtGCqE46U4wZISNZHIfEwhnv1bHYfl-JppziiGgo88vBGP6HEEEhBxVzmtrvDvsW-aUTjRjQRRep05fPTEG4KBUpzuqwPoEiNBSHBZlz27AqIASzllqcYhO50y454aN1DwJFH7fhjAYE6CTBLS8fRbeMxdPoR49pBC-INxqyRLNiXdmVEBEfRP6XozBnJNKffdl9uIESiuMrw_4JY4-eFIwnDA-4UsxQ/vFiZpaoUhq3IhFRliYeiItNFRChO6lgT/8)

clean_body: I sincerely hope you listen to what I need to say. | | | | | | Peter, I am shocked. I have reached out to 50+ supporters today, and you are the first person who has taken the time to read my message. I sincerely hope that you listen to what I need to say. Now, since you are doing me a favor, I want to be completely honest with you..... However, I fear you might not like what I have to say. I am Young Kim, an immigrant, a mother, a conservative American Patriot, and a chief irritant to career politicians in Washington. Unfortunately, I do not fit in the category that many in Washington would like to place me in: I am a woman, I own a small business, and I am NOT a part of the wealthy elite. I was not born as an American citizen, and English is not my first language. However, I am a proud American Patriot, tried and true. Now, I am in Washington fighting for YOU and other everyday Americans who want to see lower taxes and the American Dream protected. But, I am REVOLTED by what I've seen here, and you should be too. Peter, so many in Washington don't care about you, but I do. There are too many politicians who are there for themselves, furthering their own agendas and tossing the everyday American, like you and me, under the bus. They want MORE power, MORE influence, and MORE money - all for themselves. These lawmakers do not care about you, and it is APPALLING. All I can say is: I call it like I see it, and I do not like what I've seen, but I will never let these career politicians forget about YOU. This is how I have found myself as a major target of Left-Wing Super PACs and Democrat campaign funds, who are desperately trying to defeat my battleground campaign in this cycle. Again, to be forthcoming..... I fear this time they have a good chance to succeed if I do not meet my fundraising goals. | | | "So please, I humbly ask, will you be one of the FEW patriots to chip in today to keep this small business owning mother and immigrant fighting for YOU in Washington? Help me keep our majority in the House! " I will NEVER forget your generosity and support. | | - Young Kim (CA-40) | | Paid for by Young Kim for Congress P.O. Box 17490 Anaheim, CA 92817 | |

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: Connecting the dots
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250508-1345-foote&t=1001&akid=1345%2E342411%2EaLQIMN ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Only 11% of Americans feel they are better off since Donald Trump took
office:^1

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250508-movement.ftrjdS&refcode=em20250508-1345&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1345%2E342411%2EaLQIMN ]^[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250508-movement.ftrjdS&refcode=em20250508-1345&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1345%2E342411%2EaLQIMN ]Headline from "The Times" on "100 Days of Trump". Headline reads
"You're failing on the economy, Americans tell Trump in Times poll".

That’s staggering — and it’s our opportunity to reach the other 89%.

Our Squad has been connecting the dots between Trump’s authoritarianism
and his millionaire and billionaire megadonors at town halls, on the
Fighting Oligarchy tour, and in the streets.

People are ready to listen. [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250508-movement.ftrjdS&source=em20250508-1345&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1345%2E342411%2EaLQIMN ]Can you chip in $3 today to
help us spread the word about Trump’s economy and how fighting oligarchy
will fix it?

While Trump fuels division and enriches the ultra-wealthy, working people
are paying the price. Instead of helping to lower costs for families,
Trump enacted a disastrous tariff scheme to enrich himself and his
friends.

Trump’s approval rating is at just 39%—one of the worst on record for a
new President.

The Squad is the antidote to Trump’s kleptocracy. We’re hosting town
halls, organizing to build community, and taking direct action where it
matters most to fight back against his corporate coup on our democracy.

But defeating Trump’s agenda takes more than criticism. It takes a
positive vision for the future. We need to show the working class that if
we organize and take power, we can build a society that works for all of
us.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250508-movement.ftrjdS&source=em20250508-1345&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=1345%2E342411%2EaLQIMN ]Help strengthen our movement to stop Trump’s economic train wreck and
win Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and economic justice. Pitch in so
we can keep organizing against oligarchy!

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250508-movement.ftrjdS&refcode=em20250508-1345&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1345%2E342411%2EaLQIMN ]Contribute ››

Thank you,

Squad Victory Fund

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

^1.
https://www.thetimes.com/us/american-politics/article/trump-polls-100-days-approval-3bxfj8k0z

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1345%2E342411%2EaLQIMN

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: GoldCo
subject: Chuck Norris: God, Gold, & Guns
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e14511969/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvU2pqc2V0bUQ4cg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDg/LbmNsYmdBdTNxNg/qP2hpZHM9bmM4YUV1Vzd3SVlOYjhscw/gaB03kg/sco9b8bcc52)
| | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | Hello, it’s Chuck Norris here! My wife Gena and I are devout Christians, but we respect all people of faith regardless of their religion. We all know we must place our trust in God and that he will provide for us. But that doesn’t mean we don’t have to act responsibly for ourselves and the families, whom he has entrusted to our care. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: John Hickenlooper
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2540%2E4032634%2ETeRLzL)
---
Americans are feeling the devastating consequences of Donald Trump’s reckless and destructive policies. His approval ratings are tanking, and if the election were held today, he’d likely lose. That’s why this is the exact moment Democrats need to get in the ring and fight for our vision for a stronger, fairer America. For an economy that works for everybody, not just the very wealthy. For schools where every kid gets a fair shot at an education. For basic policies that will help the middle class, from affordable childcare to universal healthcare. **Democrats have to fight everywhere in 2026 — and for us to win, we need to start building strong infrastructure right now. Taking back our Senate majority means we need to go on both offense and defense. That’s why I’m asking if you’ll support my friend and colleague John Hickenlooper of Colorado who’s up for re-election in 2026.** [**Democrats have got to defend every seat, and we can do that by standing up for the working class. That’s what John Hickenlooper is doing. Will you chip in $5 or $10 that will be split between our campaign and John’s re-election so that, together, we can fight back against Donald Trump’s extremist vision for America?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2999?t=8&akid=2540%2E4032634%2ETeRLzL)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2999?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2540%2E4032634%2ETeRLzL)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2999?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2540%2E4032634%2ETeRLzL)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2999?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2540%2E4032634%2ETeRLzL)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2999?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2540%2E4032634%2ETeRLzL)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2999?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2540%2E4032634%2ETeRLzL)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2999?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2540%2E4032634%2ETeRLzL)
---

---
I want to tell you a bit more about John and why his re-election really matters. John’s a former small business owner who’s taken on the corporate special interests running the show in Trump’s Washington. He’s been fighting to rebuild our economy and make it work for the many rather than the few. Before running for office, he was a laid-off geologist who felt that the voices of everyday Coloradans weren’t being heard. He knows a thing or two about what laid off federal workers are experiencing right now under Trump. Mostly, John’s a regular guy who cares about real people. Time and again, I’ve seen him put solving problems for working families ahead of politics. **It’s critical that we support good Democrats like John everywhere if we want to take back the Senate in 2026 and put a stop to Trump’s extremist agenda. That work starts _now_.** [**John flipped his seat in 2020, and we’ve got to make sure this seat stays blue. That’s why I’m asking if you’ll split a donation between my campaign and John Hickenlooper’s so we can work to take back our Senate majority in 2026.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2999?t=14&akid=2540%2E4032634%2ETeRLzL) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2999?t=12&akid=2540%2E4032634%2ETeRLzL)
---

body:

# [#]
I wanted to quickly reach out to say thank you, Peter.

Thank you for being a part of our grassroots team. It really is folks like you stepping up at critical moments, like last month’s fundraising deadline, that power our campaign.

I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on this team.

It means so much to me to know that I have your support as I continue to fight back against extremists in Congress to protect the hard-working people of New York, our country, and our democracy.

Thanks again for your support.

George

P.S. If you’re able, you can help jump-start our May fundraising by chipping in here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-may25?refcode=SBD_GL_EM_FR_050825_EOMTY_120DO_D1_S1] Every bit really does make a HUGE difference.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Republicans selling OUR public lands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39708%2E3422442%2ELRKdrK)
I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this, Derek.
As part of their effort to give tax breaks to billionaires, Republicans just approved a measure to sell off hundreds of thousands of acres of our public lands.
**Republicans literally want to sell OUR public land in an attempt to line the pockets of the ultra wealthy.**
Our public lands are national treasures that belong to all of us as Americans. They should be protected for future generations to enjoy.
Instead, House Republicans’ new proposal would allow mining and other resource extraction on our public lands, potentially threatening environmentally sensitive areas.
Our leaders need to be speaking up in defense of our public lands. I had a track record of doing that in Congress, and as governor, I will continue to be a champion for our natural resources.
**[Will you support my campaign for governor with a $10 donation, so I can keep fighting to protect our planet on behalf of our kids and grandkids?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250508_1_ak?refcode=em20250508-39708&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39708_3422442_LRKdrK&akid=39708%2E3422442%2ELRKdrK)**

clean_body: I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this, Derek. As part of their effort to give tax breaks to billionaires, Republicans just approved a measure to sell off hundreds of thousands of acres of our public lands. Republicans literally want to sell OUR public land in an attempt to line the pockets of the ultra wealthy. Our public lands are national treasures that belong to all of us as Americans. They should be protected for future generations to enjoy. Instead, House Republicans’ new proposal would allow mining and other resource extraction on our public lands, potentially threatening environmentally sensitive areas. Our leaders need to be speaking up in defense of our public lands. I had a track record of doing that in Congress, and as governor, I will continue to be a champion for our natural resources. –Katie Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

name: David Hogg
subject: Re: They are pissed at me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Peter,

I’m always direct in these emails. Papering over bad news doesn’t help our
team win.

It is a hell of a lot harder to slow, derail, and stop Trump from crashing
the economy, disappearing people, and leading our country into ruin with a
weak Democratic Party.

With a record low approval rating, that is where we are right now. If the
midterms were held today, we would lose.

And yeah, a few members of the old-school Democratic establishment are
pissed at me for calling us weak. They can’t understand why Leaders We
Deserve would consider primarying old, ineffective members of Congress who
are asleep at the wheel during the most consequential moments in our
political history.

In today’s party politics, there’s an unwritten rule. If you win a seat,
it’s yours for life. No one serious in your party will challenge you. This
is a culture we have to break.

I am doing this so that we have a stronger party. We stand a significantly
better chance at defeating MAGA if we can build a more effective
Democratic Party that gives voters a real alternative — a vision for the
future they believe in.

The answer lies in building the party we all know we could be. A party
that restores people's faith in Democracy by using it to revive the
American Dream through lowering costs and fighting special interests. To
do that requires serious change, though.

Yes, there are incredible Democratic leaders that we already have who are
stepping up. But unfortunately there are far too many who are asleep at
the wheel and completely failing to meet the moment. That is unacceptable.

We cannot recycle the same playbook and expect different results. So last
month, Leaders We Deserve launched a $20 million fund to usher in the next
generation.

1. Primarying asleep-at-the-wheel Democrats in deep blue seats. It might
seem counterintuitive to do this in blue seats, but people decide
their votes based on what they think about Democrats and Republicans
overall. The weak, ineffective, out-of-touch members of Congress are a
liability for us all.
2. Supporting young, frontline Democrats running in tight red-to-blue
races. Making sure the next generation of leaders in tough districts
have our full support, and that the old, ineffective guard doesn’t
weigh them down.

When we challenge the status quo, some incumbents will rise to the
occasion and emerge stronger, reminded of who they serve. Others will
demonstrate exactly why they need to be replaced. Either way, the party
gets stronger, and the American people win.

This $20 million initiative is ambitious. But it’s not a random number
pulled out of a hat. Based on how much these elections cost, it’s the
amount of money that we think makes a serious dent in the way people think
about the Democratic Party. It allows us not just to run in one or two
important races, but to run in several and make a genuine splash.

But here’s the catch. That $20 million only happens if we raise it
together. I’m not independently wealthy. We don’t have a cadre of secret
billionaires waiting in the wings to fund this effort. This isn’t a
lottery ticket.

This action plan for a renewed, stronger Democratic Party comes down to
each of the people reading this email doing what they can with what they
have. If we all rise to that level, we will hit this $20 million goal and
the plan will work.

I know that everyone reading this email isn’t in a position to donate.
That is okay. And I believe we can fund this effort successfully in a
truly progressive way. Here’s how:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

⇢HIGH EARNERS: If you have done well and can afford it, please consider
investing more for those who can’t. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd_em_20250508_1_infuriated?refcode=em20250508-2103&amount=1000&refcode2=2103_587540_KtOm4L&akid=2103%2E587540%2EKtOm4L ]Click to donate $1,000, [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd_em_20250508_1_infuriated?refcode=em20250508-2103&amount=500&refcode2=2103_587540_KtOm4L&akid=2103%2E587540%2EKtOm4L ]$500,
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd_em_20250508_1_infuriated?refcode=em20250508-2103&amount=100&refcode2=2103_587540_KtOm4L&akid=2103%2E587540%2EKtOm4L ]or $100, [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd_em_20250508_1_infuriated?refcode=em20250508-2103&refcode2=2103_587540_KtOm4L&akid=2103%2E587540%2EKtOm4L ]or as much as you can.

⇢MEDIUM EARNERS: Give what you can. What’s more important is that we’re
all in this together. If thousands of people give small amounts each
month, this plan will still work. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd_em_20250508_1_infuriated?refcode=em20250508-2103&amount=25&refcode2=2103_587540_KtOm4L&akid=2103%2E587540%2EKtOm4L ]Click to donate $25 — [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd_em_20250508_1_infuriated?refcode=em20250508-2103&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode2=2103_587540_KtOm4L&akid=2103%2E587540%2EKtOm4L ]or $5 each
month.

⇢EVERYONE ELSE: If you are not in a position to donate, that’s okay. We
each have a role to play in this plan, and yours might be to do all of the
free things you can do. Get active on social media. Tell your friends
about what we’re doing. Forward this email around. You are just as
important in this fight.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

We’ll check in periodically with you on our progress here. But I really
believe that today we’re going to make a big step in the right direction
on fundraising for the plan.

Thank you for reading, especially a long email like this one. It means a
lot to me personally to be in this work and this fight with teammates as
dedicated as you. The energy I draw from people like you is what keeps me
fighting every day. So thank you.

David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1001&akid=2103%2E587540%2EKtOm4L
Update Your Information: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=2103%2E587540%2EKtOm4L

Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE #192
Washington, DC 20003
info@leaderswedeserve.com

[PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE]

name: Team Bonta
subject: Trump doesn’t want to fight discrimination
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250508&t=1&akid=1778%2E1088799%2ERQ1bFq)
Once again, Donald Trump’s administration is attacking civil rights. This time, they’re trying to weaken protections that ensure fair housing opportunities for all.
**The Department of Housing and Urban Development just put forward a rule that guts critical requirements meant to combat housing discrimination,** despite them being mandated by the Fair Housing Act. It walks back requirements that address patterns of segregation, prevent discrimination, and promote diverse communities.
_This move undermines decades of hard-won progress._ It clearly ignores the law’s intent and makes it easier for the government to look the other way when individuals and families are discriminated against.
We aren’t letting them get away with this. **That’s why Rob co-led a coalition of 18 attorneys general who sent a letter to the administration calling out this proposal** for ignoring the law and making it harder to advance equity in housing.
Our Attorney General will never be quiet or sit idly by when Trump attacks California’s ability to make progress for our people. That’s why he co-led this letter, and why he’s been hard at work protecting the Golden State. But we need your help to keep him focused on these fights instead of fundraising.
**[Can you chip in $5 or more to fuel our campaign and help us re-elect Rob so he can continue to stop the Trump administration from rolling back our progress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250508?refcode=em20250508-1778&amount=5&refcode2=1778_1088799_RQ1bFq&akid=1778%2E1088799%2ERQ1bFq)**

Team Bonta

Trump Tariffs — When I hear Trump’s approval ratings are low and the economy has something to do with it, I’m reminded that the greatest example of corruption in modern society is academic elitists ensuring average people don’t understand the rudimentary of finance.

In short, we have gotten used to the high of convenience and materialism. While convenience can be valuable in the short term, it can also be very detrimental in the long run. There’s no easy way to kick heroin, it’s going to hurt. Again, yet another example of citizens on both ends of the political spectrum, not quite understanding what’s happening and how dangerous globalism is.

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5e24c46fd0924834b9e1d3f8582ee7ff&_e=cONBnxIUgHFOpaKEsF_i_fV5PMGIPwUsfDk6sXxH1ySQ2SI6PX0kKm-gTJP118_9prThFoKyeoKV7dH5Uw9PMUbamfb_oNLFwxP2bXLXtRvciLdNwCj0H1W5rXfYyUIYfdA-_tVVnhk7MU7tWCZxurXZdIxB9bEB_eW-SdlT4mD-Pep2NPQzTKF4JcDSQR2Ye0QEfIc4dWJ0zwN3BD59ap4YxkBo55dnAt12FWNtOX_GeluLvu8IvhSSnduVcYwZCnvquVoLpUqMjMRMrL89z5IG-Lak6FVvH2UeIy_F7N0VEVld-G9ZlfXcMWnb5fIdd9lonQMrZcB9xOqW66mLUg%3D%3D)

Royce White for U.S. Senate MN 2026 The People Are Coming Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. name: Fair Fight
subject: A defining moment in the fight against modern-day voter suppression and intimidation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
We’re going back to court. Here’s why. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107350642/544406331/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250508_f_TrueTheVote_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDgxMjI4Zi02NTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5nQKK_qFuqMeBYXxAvWHTfkeN43uOuucO4eNu0DIZBQ=&emci=f680228f-652c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=0081228f-652c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1037277)

| | Team, A student who was getting ready to vote said he felt “accused of doing something wrong” and feared he wouldn’t be able to cast his ballot. A veteran described experiencing “[p]ossible PTSD.” Other Georgians reported feeling “overwhelmed” and “isolat[ed].” And a woman testified that she was discouraged from voting. All because they’d had their voter eligibility formally challenged ahead of the 2021 U.S. Senate runoff elections in Georgia — thanks to a far-right group called True the Vote. Remember the context of that time period: A massive, multiracial coalition of Americans had just turned out to elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as president and vice president after Georgia had gone blue in a presidential election for the first time in 28 years. The upcoming runoffs would now decide control of the Senate. Right-wing, anti-voter extremists had just seen the power of the people, and they were determined to snuff it out. **True the Vote announced that they would challenge the eligibility of over 364,000 Georgians, ultimately challenging over 250,000 voters — disproportionately people of color.** **Mass challenges intimidate eligible voters into silence, and this was the largest known incident of its kind in Georgia’s history.** **The Voting Rights Act makes it illegal to intimidate or attempt to intimidate voters — so we sued True the Vote for violating this bedrock law.** Brave Georgians testified about how True the Vote’s challenges had a chilling effect on their ability to exercise the right to vote. A federal judge said that True the Vote’s information “utterly lacked reliability” and “verged on recklessness.” **And next Tuesday, we’ll be back in court for our appeal in Fair Fight v. True the Vote** — because this case is a defining moment in the fight against modern-day voter suppression and intimidation, and we’re not backing down. Mass challenges may be more subtle than literacy tests or poll taxes, but they’re Jim Crow 2.0. They cause confusion, create fear, and suppress participation in our democracy. And Georgia law allows unlimited challenges by private citizens — a dangerous endorsement of a tactic used to target Black and brown voters without real evidence. Now, this fight isn’t just about Georgia — since 2020, voter suppression activists have initiated mass voter challenges in at least 9 states. And this fight isn’t just about one court case — it’s part of our broader strategy to protect the freedom to vote, from grassroots organizing to public education. In addition, our case sends a message to other groups planning future mass challenges: we won’t let up in our fight to ensure voters can enjoy all the protections the law provides. We won’t let reckless, racially targeted voter suppression tactics go unchallenged. And we’ll keep shining a light on this key tool in the national voter suppression agenda — because that’s key to dismantling the anti-voter playbook. In solidarity, The Fair Fight Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107350643/544406332/1297451850?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250508_f_TrueTheVote_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDgxMjI4Zi02NTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5nQKK_qFuqMeBYXxAvWHTfkeN43uOuucO4eNu0DIZBQ=)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: President Trump ordered an investigation of ActBlue. Here's what that means and how we're responding.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
We’ve seen this playbook before. He tried to subvert our elections before. We can't let him do it again.
Peter,
President Trump just ordered the investigation of ActBlue – the fundraising platform used by my campaign and nearly every Democratic candidate across the country.
**Let’s be clear:** Trump is trying to sabotage the engine that powers Democratic campaigns.
We know this isn’t just about ActBlue. This is about consolidating power and going after his opposition. He’s seen our momentum. He’s seen the strength of our small-dollar donations. He’s seen the power of YOU.
Now, he’s going after Democratic infrastructure – trying to dismantle it ahead of our election this November, the midterms, and beyond.
We’ve seen this playbook before. He tried to subvert our elections before. _We can't let him do it again._
**[Now, I'm asking you to donate $10 to our campaign and Heartland Patriots to help send a strong message to this White House. Our election is just months away, and we need to raise every last resource to flip Virginia blue and take on Donald Trump's extremism across the country.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88295?refcode=em20250508-8924&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8924%2E614464%2EHKw6gv)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88296?refcode=em20250508-8924&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8924%2E614464%2EHKw6gv) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88296?refcode=em20250508-8924&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8924%2E614464%2EHKw6gv) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88296?refcode=em20250508-8924&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8924%2E614464%2EHKw6gv) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88296?refcode=em20250508-8924&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8924%2E614464%2EHKw6gv) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88296?refcode=em20250508-8924&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8924%2E614464%2EHKw6gv) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88296?refcode=em20250508-8924&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8924%2E614464%2EHKw6gv) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88295?refcode=em20250508-8924&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8924%2E614464%2EHKw6gv)

Let's keep pushing forward together.
Thank you,
Abigail Spanberger
